Performance Marketing Specialist

Monitor trends and continuously improve campaign strategies

 Ads, or similar



Strong analytical and data-driven mindset

Ability to manage multiple campaigns efficiently



Good English communication skills

Remote working environment



Flexible working hours



Work with international projects and clients



Growth opportunities in performance marketing

title: SEO/Google Business Profile Auditor
description:
Apply here: 



We're looking for a detail-oriented virtual assistant to run Google Business Profile (GBP) audits for prospective clients. This is a part-time role — roughly 1-2 hours per day for $4/hr pay — where you'll research local businesses, assess their online presence, and compile findings into a clean report we send to prospects.



What You'll Do:

Look up a business's Google Business Profile and gather key info

Run local keyword ranking scans using our heatmap tool to see where the business ranks in Google Maps for relevant search terms

Identify the top 3-5 local competitors

Compile everything into our report template

Deliver the finished report file via Slack and Google drive

What We're Looking For:

Familiarity with Google Maps, Google drive, and Slack

Comfortable with basic web tools and following step-by-step processes

Strong attention to detail — data accuracy matters

Good written English

Reliable availability during 9-11PM Eastern Time

This is NOT:

A full-time role (it is 1-2 hours/day, Monday-Friday)

A creative or strategy role — you follow our process and templates exactly

mber to support our dental billing operations. Experience with dental billing is required, and familiarity with Medi-Cal Dental (Denti-Cal) is a plus. This is a remote, part-time role starting at 20 hours per week, with the opportunity to ramp up to 40 hours per week over time.



You will work directly with our principals and operations team. This position requires availability during Pacific Time business hours (7a to 3p PT / 11p to 7a PH)



To verify you read the application carefully, please include the name of the Los Angeles-based Major League Baseball team in the subject line of your application.



Responsibilities:

- Manage and submit dental insurance claims accurately and in a timely manner

- Follow up on outstanding claims and resolve denials or rejections

- Process patient billing, payments, and account adjustments

- Coordinate with front office and clinical teams to ensure accurate coding and documentation

- Track accounts receivable and report on collection status

- Maintain organized and accurate billing records

- Support related administrative or financial tasks as needed



Qualifications:

- 2+ years of dental billing experience required

- Strong understanding of U.S. dental insurance systems and claim workflows

- Experience with Medi-Cal Dental (Denti-Cal) is a plus

- High attention to detail and excellent organizational skills

- Excellent written and spoken English communication

- Proficiency with dental billing software and Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel

- Comfort working independently and reliably during Pacific Time business hours



Expectations:

- Part-time (20 hours/week) to start, with ramp-up to full-time (40 hours/week)

- Availability during Pacific Time business hours

- Daily updates and communication with the team

- Must have reliable internet and a computer with video call capability



Strong work ethic and commitment to high-quality work



We’re looking for someone who is trustworthy, self-motivated, and eager to be part of a small, high-performance team. We treat our tea
mbers well and hope to build a long-term working relationship.



For qualified candidates who interview, we are happy to provide references to a previous virtual assistant who worked with our team.

title: Level 2 Help Desk Technician
description:
Summary  

A Level 2 Help Desk Technician will handle everything from routine troubleshooting to complex escalations. In addition, you’ll act as a Project Engineer, providing technical support, working on assigned IT projects end-to-end, and driving the successful onboarding of both client and internal systems.  

 

Key Responsibilities  



Help Desk & Customer Support  

- Respond to customer inquiries via phone,
, or chat.  

- Diagnose and resolve issues related to hardware, software, and network connectivity.  

- Guide customers step-by-step to resolve technical problems using remote-desktop tools and help-desk software.  

- Document and track all interactions and resolutions in the ticketing system and knowledge base.  

- Escalate unresolved or high-priority i
 to Level 3 support and follow up to ensure a timely resolution.  

- Maintain professional, courteous communication to uphold high customer satisfaction.  



Technical & Project Engineering  

- Provide technical support to guide customers remotely, including installation, configuration, and maintenance of computer systems, networks, and peripherals.  

- Perform scheduled maintenance and software updates to ensure systems run optimally. 

- Participate in small- to mid-scale IT projects—from involved in the planning through execution and close-out—ensuring scope, budget, and timelines are met. 

- Collaborate with the remote support team to transition complex i
 into formal service requests or project tasks.  

- Use project management tools to track deliverables, report status, and communicate with stakeholders. 

- Oversee the onboarding of new internal systems—developing processes, conducting user training, and ensuring seamless integration.  

- Educate client IT staff on best practices for IT security, maintenance, and system administration.  



Qualifications  

- High school diploma or equivalent; some college coursework or technical certifications preferred (e.g., CompTIA A+, Network+, Microsoft Certified Professional). 

- 2+ years of experience in a helpdesk or in an MSP environment.  

- Hands-on experience as a technician or project engineer supporting Windows Server, Microsoft 365, and common IT systems.  

- Solid understanding of computer hardware, mobile devices, networking fundamentals, and basic cybersecurity principles.  

- Familiarity with remote-desktop applications, helpdesk/ticketing software, and project management platforms.  

- Strong document-creation skills, with emphasis on developing clear, step-by-step SOPs and How-To Guides for both internal teams and end-users.  

- Excellent troubleshooting, problem-solving, and documentation skills. 

- Excellent English verbal and written communication; able to translate technical concepts for non-technical audiences. Meaning you can speak Human and Tech and make it understandable to others who are not tech-savvy.  

- Ability to work both independently and collaboratively within a distributed remote team.  



Preferred Skills  

- AI-Enabled and for working with large language Models for troubleshooting and engineering.  

- Experience scripting for deployment of tools and updates in RMM (e.g., Datto RMM, EDR) and MDM (e.g., Microsoft Intune) environments.  

- Experience supporting macOS and Linux endpoints.  

- Hands-on knowledge of Azure AD, Okta, and other identity-management platforms.  

- Exposure to server virtualization (Hyper-V, VMware) and basic cloud infrastructure. 

- Understanding of Google Workspace administration. 

- Prior experience managing end-to-end IT projects, including stakeholder coordination and change management.  

- Certification or coursework in cybersecurity fundamentals (e.g., Security+, CISSP Associate).  



Why You’ll Love Working with Us  

You’ll join a dynamic team where your technical expertise and project-engineering skills will directly impact customer satisfaction and successful IT outcomes. We offer continual learning opportunities, certification support, and a collaborative environment that values innovation and professional growth.



Notes: When reaching out, please include your CV and your DISC assessment, thanks!

title: Operations & Staffing Coordination Specialist
description:
We’re looking for an Operations & Staffing Coordination Specialist to support a fast-growing operations and logistics platform that powers real-world & on the ground operations (e.g., delivery robots, on-demand moving boxes, and brand events) across the United States.



In this role, you’ll help coordinate staffing, support workers, and keep daily operations running smoothly. You’ll also monitor ongoing tasks, respond to issues, and make sure updates are shared with the team.



This role is a good fit for someone who is organized, proactive, and comfortable solving problems in a fast-moving environment.



Responsibilities:

- Support daily operations by coordinating staffing needs, schedules, and operational tasks.

- Fill shifts in real time by communicating with workers and responding to last-minute staffing requests.

- Help workers with questions and make sure they have the information they need to complete their assignments.

- Communicate with clients and internal teams to keep everyone updated on staffing and operations.

- Monitor ongoing operations and flag issues early so they can be resolved quickly.

- Help coordinate day-to-day operational activities when needed (schedules, on-ground tasks, etc.)

- Track updates, schedules, and tasks in internal systems.

- Assist with onboarding and documentation.

- Work with the operations team to improve workflows and processes.

- Create or update SOPs and checklists to help keep operations organized.

- Support operations during busy periods, including weekends when needed.



Requirements:

- 3+ years experience in operations support, staffing coordination, dispatch, customer support, or similar roles.

- 1+ year WFH experience working directly with US-based clients

- Team Lead or Subject Matter Expert experience preferred.

- Experience in startups or fast-growing companies is a plus.

- Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail.

- Comfortable handling multiple tasks at the same time.

- Able to stay calm, solve problems, and quickly learn new tools and processes in a fast-moving environment.

- Experience using tools such as Google Workspace, Slack, Airtable, Notion, or similar systems.

- Self-starter who asks questions, takes ownership, and looks for ways to improve processes.

- Experience in staffing platforms, marketplaces, logistics coordination, or operations support is a plus.

- Available to work weekends when needed.



Salary and Benefits:

- Base salary: 55,000 PHP per month

- 100% remote / work-from-home

- Flexible work arrangements with a supportive team

- Opportunity to grow with a scaling operations business and take on increasing responsibility



When applying, send your resume link, explain why you're a good fit. Also copy and paste this Job ID: rec3k2P8qsKXsE0Ya into your
 response, along with this message: “I’m excited to be applying to Job ID:rec3k2P8qsKXsE0Ya!” This will let us know what job you’re applying for as well as show us that you actually read this entire job description (attention to detail is everything). Thanks and hope to hear from you soon!

title: Property Management Operations Specialist
description:
EXPERIENCED PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VA (BUILDIUM REQUIRED – READ BEFORE APPLYING)

Pacific Homefront Property Management (California, USA)



We are hiring ONE experienced Virtual Assistant with real, hands-on Buildium experience to support and help improve our property management operations.



IMPORTANT:

If you do NOT have actual experience using Buildium in a property management role, do not apply.



This is not a beginner role. We are looking for someone who can operate independently, solve problems, and help improve systems.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Manage property operations inside Buildium



Tenant communication, rent tracking, and delinquency follow-ups



Maintenance coordination and vendor communication



Lease tracking, move-ins and move-outs



Identify issues and propose improvements to workflows



Support owner communication and reporting



Help maintain and improve SOPs and systems



REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Minimum 3+ years U.S. property management experience



Hands-on Buildium experience (not just “familiar with it”)



Strong understanding of rent collection, maintenance coordination, and leasing processes



Ability to work without constant supervision



Strong English communication (written and verbal)



Stable internet and professional work setup



DO NOT APPLY IF



You have never used Buildium in real work



You need step-by-step instructions for everything



You are applying to multiple jobs without reading this post



WHAT WE VALUE



Initiative (you identify problems before we do)



Accountability (you own results, not just tasks)



Organization and attention to detail



Ability to think and make decisions independently



GROWTH OPPORTUNITY

This role can grow into a Team Lead or Operations Manager position based on performance.



HOW TO APPLY (MANDATORY)

To be considered, your application MUST include:



The word HOMEFRONT at the top of your application



A brief summary of your Buildium experience (specific tasks you performed)



Your years of U.S. property management experience



A short example of a time you solved a problem without being told



Your current number of clients or jobs



Applications that do not follow ALL instructions will be ignored.



COMPENSATION

Based on experience and skill level, with opportunity for long-term growth.



If you are looking for a serious role where you can grow, take ownership, and help build a strong operation, we want to hear from you.

title: Community Relationship Builder (Calls + Discord Engagement)
description:
HOURS 10AM EST to 8PM EST STANDARD TIME

If you can not do these hours, do not apply!



Read carefully before applying:

This role requires daily social outreach inside 
 communities, voice calls, detailed Google Sheet tracking, and consistent follow-up across 300+ active relationships. This is not a passive VA role.





We are hiring a highly fluent English speaker to build relationships and generate qualified leads through 
, voice calls, and structured follow-ups.



This is NOT a hard sales role.

You are NOT closing deals.

You are also NOT cold messaging strangers.



This is a high-activity, structured role for someone who is charismatic, highly organized, and consistent.



------------------------

WHAT YOU WILL ACTUALLY DO

------------------------



1. Join active 
 communities

- Be active in public chat

- Engage naturally in conversations

- Become someone people want to talk to

- Build familiarity and trust inside the community



2. Get people to come to you

- Your job is NOT to cold DM random people

- Instead, you will communicate well in public chats so people want to message you, reply to you, and build a connection with you

- You may also continue conversations with people who are already warm and responsive



3. Build real relationships

- Add people as friends when appropriate

- Continue conversations in DMs only when natural

- Make people feel comfortable, understood, and interested in talking more

- Your goal is to make people like you and trust you



4. Get on voice calls

- Speak with prospects casually

- These are not aggressive sales calls

- Ask questions, build rapport, and understand their goals

- Help them feel comfortable enough to take the next step



5. Guide qualified people forward

- Naturally guide interested people toward our program

- Move serious people to the next step

- Get qualified people into our 
/system

- Encourage them to complete an application if they are a fit



6. Track and follow up at high volume

- You will manage 300+ active relationships/leads at once

- Every person must be tracked in a Google Sheet

- You will log notes, status, last contact date, and next follow-up date

- Consistent follow-up is a major part of this role

- This is detailed, repetitive work and must be done properly



------------------------

IMPORTANT: THIS ROLE IS HIGH VOLUME

------------------------



- You will be talking to many people every day

- You will manage hundreds of ongoing conversations

- You must stay organized and follow up consistently

- This is not passive work

- This is not a casual chatting role

- This is not a role for someone who avoids structure



If you do not like repetition, detailed tracking, follow-up work, or managing a large number of relationships, this role is not for you.



------------------------

COMPENSATION

------------------------



This role pays:

- A small hourly base

- Plus performance pay per lead / qualified result



This is not a large fixed salary role.

The upside comes from performance.



Example:

One current tea
mber is earning around $1,460 USD/month through lead-based performance.



The better you perform, the more you can earn.



------------------------

YOU ARE A GOOD FIT IF:

------------------------



- Your English is extremely clear and natural

- You are easy to understand on calls

- You are charismatic and know how to make friends quickly

- You are comfortable in 
 communities

- You are comfortable getting on calls

- You can handle high-volume follow-up work

- You are organized and consistent

- You can manage a Google Sheet every day without losing track of people



------------------------

YOU ARE NOT A GOOD FIT IF:

------------------------



- You want to cold message strangers

- You avoid calls

- You prefer low-effort chat support work

- You dislike repetitive follow-ups

- You are disorganized

- You cannot manage many conversations at once

- Your English is not strong enough for natural conversation



------------------------

NOT REQUIRED

------------------------



- Sales experience

- Closing experience



We care more about:

- communication

- charisma

- consistency

- organization

- follow-through



------------------------

TO APPLY, YOU MUST SEND:

------------------------



1. A 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself

2. A 2-minute mock call:

   “You are meeting someone new and building rapport”

3. A screenshot of your internet speed

4. A short written answer:

   “How would you get people in a 
 community to want to talk to you without cold DMing them?”



Applications without these will be ignored.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller
description:
Part-Time Cold Calling Sales Rep / Real Estate (Land)



3-Month Contract | 20 hrs/week | Opportunity to Extend



We’re not looking for average — we’re looking for someone who thrives on outperforming targets and turning discipline into results.



At our company, we operate by three core values: Relentless Excellence, Disciplined Results, and Continuous Innovation. These aren’t just words — they guide how we work every day.



This role is focused primarily on cold calling landowners, identifying selling opportunities, and qualifying motivated sellers to keep our acquisition pipeline strong. If you’re competitive, organized, and enjoy conversations that lead to deals, this role could be a strong fit.



This is a part-time contract role for 3 months with the opportunity to extend based on performance.



Please follow the application process



Do NOT call,
, or DM about this role



JOB DESCRIPTION Video: 
/share/9d
beb2407d1ef59b12



APPLICATION LINK: b.link/ColdCalling



Company: 



Position Details:



- Pay: $10/hour + weekly performance bonuses

- Schedule: Monday – Thursday

- Hours: 2:00 PM – 7:00 PM (20 hours per week) EASTERN TIME ZONE

- Contract: 3-month contract with opportunity to extend

- Payment: Weekly (Mondays via 
)

- Start Date: ASAP



Role Responsibilities:



Cold Calling (Primary Focus)

- Call landowners to identify selling interest

- Build rapport and gather property details

- Qualify motivated sellers and identify potential deals



Lead Qualification

- Identify motivated sellers

- Segment prospects and move qualified opportunities forward



CRM & Reporting

- Log conversations and update records in the CRM

- Share notes and insights with the acquisitions team



Process Adherence

- Follow call workflows and company processes

- Provide feedback on messaging and lead quality



Collaboration

- Stay aligned with acquisition goals and pipeline targets



Attendance & Performance

- Hubstaff Monitoring: Tracks time, activity, and screenshots

- Punctuality is crucial: 3-strike rule. No-call/no-show = termination

- Communication: Active communication in GChat is expected



Role Requirements:



Experience

- Required: At least 6 months of outbound sales or cold calling experience



Reliable Work Setup

- High-speed internet

- Working camera

- Noise-canceling headset

------------------------

mber is earning around $1,460 USD/month through lead-based performance.

 communities

title: Accountant
description:
Privately Held Investment & Wealth Management Firm



Our finance team plays a central role in the business, ensuring leadership has clear, accurate financial information to guide strategic decisions.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented accounting professional who takes pride in maintaining clean books, building structured processes, and delivering consistent, dependable work. This role owns core accounting operations and is responsible for maintaining accuracy and discipline across recurring monthly cycles.



You’ll work directly with leadership and operate with a high level of autonomy. Success in this role requires strong judgment, follow-through, and comfort managing both day-to-day accounting and critical monthly deliverables in a fast-moving but well-structured environment.



What You’ll Own

• Day-to-day accounting operations across multiple entities

• Timely and accurate month-end close processes

• Account reconciliations and financial reporting

• Payroll processing (Gusto)

• Commission calculations tied to assets under management

• Maintaining organized and reliable financial data

• Preparing account summaries and supporting leadership reporting



What We’re Looking For

• 2+ years of experience as an Accountant or Senior Accountant

• Experience with QuickBooks and Gusto

• Strong Excel proficiency, including working within shared spreadsheets

• Experience in wealth management, financial planning, or financial services

• Prior experience working for a U.S.-based financial company

• Experience calculating commissions and performing reconciliations

• Strong understanding of accounting principles, financial reporting, and compliance (GAAP/IFRS, tax, audits)

• Experience preparing account summaries

• Familiarity with tax reduction strategies is a plus

• CPA preferred, but not required

• Willing and able to complete a background check requiring fingerprinting



How You Work

• Comfortable navigating shared file systems and cloud-based environments

• Confident working directly in shared documents without relying on local downloads

• Quick learner who adapts easily to new systems and processes

• Proactive communicator, comfortable engaging directly with leadership (Slack-based communication)

• Confident asking questions and seeking clarification

• Reliable, analytical, and highly detail-oriented

title: Business Development Representative
description:
We are hiring a Remote Business Development Representative (BDR) to help us book qualified sales calls with Amazon brands that fit our ideal client profile.



Role Overview:

You will be responsible for outbound prospecting, lead qualification, and booking discovery calls for our sales team. This is a performance-driven role with a clear short-term target and long-term growth opportunity.



About Us:

Sequence Commerce is a full-service e-commerce advertising agency that helps brands grow on Amazon and Walmart through strategy, advertising, and account management.



We work with emerging DTC brands, established enterprises, and high-growth companies looking to scale profitably in marketplace ecosystems.



What You’ll Do:

- Research and identify Amazon brands that match our ideal customer profile

- Build lead lists and find the right decision-makers

- Reach out through
, LinkedIn, and other outbound channels

- Start conversations and qualify prospects based on our criteria

- Book sales calls with qualified leads for our team

- Keep prospect data organized and updated

- Follow outreach processes consistently and hit weekly activity goals



Target for First Month:



To be considered successful in this trial role, you must:

1. Book 10 qualified calls within your first month

2. Those calls must show up

3. Leads must match our ideal customer profile



Compensation:

- Trial / Performance-Based Phase - $100 CAD per qualified booked call that shows up



Full-Time Opportunity:

If you perform well and are a strong fit, we may offer a full-time role with:

- $500 CAD base pay

- $100 CAD per qualified booked call that matches ICP



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:

- Has experience in B2B lead generation, appointment setting, or sales development

- Is confident writing clear, personalized outreach messages

- Can research companies and decision-makers effectively

- Understands how to qualify leads before booking calls

- Is organized, proactive, and results-driven

- Is comfortable working remotely and independently

- Has strong English communication skills



Bonus If You Have

- Experience prospecting e-commerce or Amazon brands

- Experience using LinkedIn,
 outreach tools, or CRM systems

- Experience booking calls for agencies or service businesses

- Familiarity with Amazon sellers, marketplace brands, or e-commerce growth services



Ideal Prospect Profile:

You will be targeting Amazon brands that are likely to need help with growth, advertising, and marketplace strategy.



We are generally looking for brands that:

- Sell on Amazon (Any marketplace)

- Need better advertising performance, growth strategy, or marketplace support

- Are a fit for a professional agency relationship

- Revenues over $50,000 USD/month or $500,000 Per Year



How We Measure Success

We care about results, not just activity. Success in this role is based on:

- Number of qualified calls booked

- Show-up rate

- Lead quality

- Consistency of outreach and follow-up

- Ability to generate real pipeline opportunities



To Apply Please include:

- A short summary of your BDR or appointment-setting experience

- Examples of industries or clients you have booked calls for

- Your approach to finding and qualifying leads

- Why you are a good fit for this role

- Your availability and timezone



Important Note:

This role is ideal for someone who is confident in outbound prospecting and wants to earn based on performance first, with the opportunity to grow into a longer-term position.

title: US Tax Preparer & Coordinator
description:
Tax Preparer / U.S. Business Tax Coordinator



Employment Type: Full-Time (Independent Contract)



Location: Remote - WFH



Job Summary



We are seeking an experienced Tax Preparer / Business Tax Specialist with strong practical knowledge of U.S. business taxes. This role focuses on preparing and supporting federal, state, and local tax filings for our business clients.



This position does not require a PTIN, EFIN, CPA, or EA, but does require demonstrated hands-on experience preparing business tax filings, payroll-related tax forms, and compliance reports. The ideal candidate understands how business operations connect to tax reporting and can work accurately under deadlines.



Key Responsibilities



Business Income Tax Preparation



    Prepare and review federal business tax returns, including:

    Schedule C (Sole Proprietors)

    Form 1065 (Partnerships)

    Form 1120-S (S Corporations)

    Form 1120 (C Corporations)

    Assist with state business income and franchise tax filings

    Support preparation of quarterly estimated tax calculations



Payroll & Employment Tax Support



    Prepare and review payroll-related tax filings, including:

    Form 941 (Quarterly Payroll Tax Returns)

    Form 940 (FUTA)

    W-2 and W-3 forms

    State payroll and unemployment filings

    Assist with payroll tax reconciliations

    Respond to IRS and state payroll notices



Sales Tax & State Compliance



    Prepare state and local sales tax returns (monthly or quarterly)

    Assist with sales tax reconciliations

    Support multi-state sales tax compliance when applicable

    Identify basic sales tax nexus considerations



Year-End & Compliance Filings



    Prepare information returns, including:

    Form 1099-NEC

    Form 1099-MISC

    Assist with amended returns and corrections

    Support compliance tracking and filing deadlines

    Maintain organized workpapers and supporting documentation



Required Knowledge & Experience



    Demonstrated experience preparing U.S. business tax filings

    Strong understanding of:

    Business income taxation

    Payroll and employment taxes

    Sales tax reporting

    Quarterly estimated taxes

    Ability to read and interpret IRS and state tax notices

    Experience working with accounting records and financial statements

    High attention to detail and deadline management



Preferred (But Not Required)



    Experience working in a tax firm or accounting practice

title: VA Accountant
description:

The role requires strong knowledge of QuickBooks and SAGE Intacct, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently in a remote setting while collaborating with the finance team during PST business hours.



Responsibilities:

-Prepare and review tax returns for individuals and businesses.

-Ensure all filings meet U.S. tax regulations and requirements.

-Assist in tax strategy development to boost financial efficiency.

-Stay on top of tax law changes and conduct research as needed.

-Support financial reporting for audits and tax-related documentation.

-Collaborate with the finance team to manage inquiries and ensure smooth operations.

-Keep accurate and organized financial records.



Qualifications:

-Proficiency in QuickBooks and SAGE Intacct is a must; CPA certification is a big plus.

-Solid experience in U.S. tax accounting (corporate & individual).

-Familiarity with tax software (e.g., QuickBooks, SAGE).

-Strong knowledge of IRS regulations and tax compliance.

-Detail-oriented, with excellent problem-solving skills.

-Strong communication skills (written & verbal).

-Ability to work independently and meet deadlines in a remote setting.

-3-5 years of relevant experience in tax accounting (preferred)

title: Paid Ads Specialist (Google, Meta & Local Services Ads)
description:
We’re looking for a results-driven Paid Ads Specialist to manage and scale lead-generation campaigns across Google Ads, Meta 
 & Instagram), and Local Services Ads (LSA). This role focuses on lead quality, efficiency, and real business growth — not just traffic or vanity metrics. If you are analytical, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple client accounts, we’d love to hear from you.



What You’ll Do

- Build, manage, and optimize Google Search, Performance Max, Meta Ads, and LSA campaigns

- Monitor CPA, ROAS, lead quality, and performance trends

- Structure campaigns by intent, service, and location

- Launch full-funnel strategies (prospecting, retargeting, conversion optimization)

- Write and test ad copy and creatives (RSAs, Meta creatives)

- Manage budgets, pacing, and scaling strategies

- Monitor search terms, negatives, and lead quality signals

- Create clear performance reports and insights for the team



Requirements

1. 3+ years experience managing Google Ads and Meta Ads

2. Hands-on experience with Local Services Ads (LSA)

3. Strong knowledge of Search campaigns, smart bidding, and keyword strategy

4. Experience with Meta audiences, testing, and scaling

5. Familiar with GA4, Google Tag Manager, and conversion tracking

6. Comfortable handling multiple client accounts

7. Data-driven and detail-oriented



Tools You’ll Use

- Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, Local Services Ads

- Google Analytics 4 (GA4), Google Tag Manager

- Looker Studio, Google Sheets / Excel

- CRM & call tracking tools (GoHighLevel experience is a BIG plus)



Nice to Have

- Agency or multi-account experience

- Lead-generation background (healthcare, home services, local businesses)

- Experience improving lead quality, not just increasing volume



What We Offer

1. Full-time, long-term remote role

2. Stable workload with growth opportunities

3. Competitive salary (based on experience)

4. Supportive, results-focused team environment

5. Opportunity to manage high-impact ad accounts



How to Apply:

Please send the following to 

1. Your updated resume

2. A short video introduction highlighting your relevant experiences

3. Portfolio



Shortlisted candidates may be asked to complete a short practical assessment.

title: Executive Assistant & Client Operations Manager
description:
About Us

SelfDeveloped LLC is a U.S.-based growth marketing and systems agency. We help real estate educators, home service companies, and coaching businesses build full-funnel marketing systems — ads, copywriting, GHL automations,
/SMS sequences, and ongoing campaign management. Our founder has generated $50M+ in client results across 120+ clients over 10+ years.

We're growing fast and need someone who can help keep everything running smoothly behind the scenes so our clients feel taken care of and nothing falls through the cracks.



The Role

This is not a task-list job. We're looking for a sharp, proactive Executive Assistant and Client Operations Manager who can operate as a true right hand to the founder.

You'll be the connective tissue between the founder, clients, and vendors. You'll own communication, follow-through, and organization so the founder can stay focused on strategy and delivery.

If you're the kind of person who notices what needs to happen before being asked, follows up without being reminded, and takes pride in making other people's lives easier — this role was built for you.



What You'll Be Doing



Managing the founder's calendar, scheduling calls, and sending reminders

Handling client check-ins and follow-ups via
 and DM on behalf of the founder

Sending contracts, proposals, and onboarding documents using our templates

Making edits and updates to documents, SOPs, and client-facing materials

Pulling reports, screenshots, or data from tools like GHL, Google Drive, and ad platforms when needed

Drafting and sending
s or messages as directed

Organizing files, inboxes, and project notes to keep everything clean and accessible

Flagging anything that needs the founder's attention before it becomes a problem





You're a Great Fit If You:



Have at least 1–2 years supporting a U.S.-based agency, coach, or online business owner

Write professional, clear English — clients will see your messages

Are comfortable inside tools like GoHighLevel (GHL), Google Workspace, and Slack or similar

Are highly organized and detail-oriented without needing to be micromanaged

Are proactive — you bring solutions, not just updates

Are available during overlapping U.S. Central Time hours (Nashville, TN)

Are reliable, loyal, and looking for a long-term home, not just your next gig





Bonus Points If You Have:



Experience inside a marketing or funnel agency

Familiarity with ClickFunnels, Meta Ads Manager, or
 platforms

Experience managing client communications on behalf of a founder



To Apply

Record a short 1–3 minute Loom video introducing yourself and answering this question:

"Tell me about a time you caught something falling through the cracks for someone you supported — what happened and how did you handle it?"

Include the video link along with your resume and a list of tools you're comfortable working in. Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed.

title: Appointment Setter & Cold Caller — U.S. Marketing Agency
description:
About Us

SelfDeveloped LLC is a U.S.-based growth marketing and systems agency. We help real estate educators, home service businesses, and high-ticket coaches build full-funnel marketing systems. Our founder has 10+ years of experience and has helped clients generate $50M+ in results across 120+ businesses.

We're running paid ads and need a sharp, persistent appointment setter to turn inbound and cold leads into booked calls.

The Role

You'll be working warm and cold lists, following up aggressively, handling objections confidently, and booking qualified prospects onto the founder's calendar. This is a performance role — your income grows with your output.

What You'll Be Doing



Calling inbound leads from
 and Instagram ads within the first 5 minutes of opt-in

Cold calling targeted prospect lists in real estate, home services, and coaching niches

Following up via phone, SMS, and
 inside GoHighLevel until leads book, decline, or go cold

Qualifying prospects before booking — no tire kickers on the calendar

Handling objections around price, timing, and trust

Logging all activity and call outcomes inside the CRM

Sending confirmation and reminder messages to reduce no-shows

Reporting weekly on dials, contacts made, appointments set, and show rates



What We're Looking For



Proven experience as an appointment setter, cold caller, or SDR

Strong spoken and written English — you'll be speaking with U.S. business owners

Comfortable making 50–100 outbound dials per day when needed

Resilient and coachable — rejection doesn't shake you

Familiar with GoHighLevel or similar CRM tools

Available during U.S. business hours (Central Time preferred)

Hungry — you want to earn and understand your output determines your income



Compensation



Base + commision

Strong performers earn significantly above base



To Apply

Submit a 1–3 minute Loom video doing two things:



Walk us through your appointment setting or cold calling experience

Give a 30-second mock cold call pitch as if you're calling a home service business owner who just opted in for a free marketing consultation



Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed.

title: Virtual Assistant for US Business
description:
PART-TIME VIRTUAL ASSISTANT – High Conflict Resolutions, LLC



PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE POST before applying as we are looking for a very specific fit, and if you don't meet the criteria, we won't be able to conduct an interview.  If you haven't responded specifically to the questions below, I won't respond to your application.  





About the Role



We are a growing U.S.-based coaching and business specializing in high-conflict co-parenting. We are looking for a highly experienced, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our founder on a part-time, flexible basis — approximately 2–3 hours per day. This is not a fixed-schedule role. You should already be working with other clients throughout the day and available to complete tasks as they come in, with reasonable turnaround times. Over time, as the business continues to grow, the number of hours can grow as well.



This role is primarily administrative and operational. You will not be speaking with clients on the phone, but you WILL be writing
s on behalf of the founder to clients and professional referral partners. Exceptional written English is non-negotiable.



IMPORTANT: We will train you on how we do things in our business. We will NOT be training you on the tools themselves. You must arrive fully proficient in every skill listed below. Please do not apply if you are still learning these platforms.





What You'll Do



— Lead the migration of existing client accounts from our current CRM (17hats) to a new platform, ensuring no data loss and clean record organization throughout the transition

— Onboard new clients in our CRM (set up profiles, send coaching agreements, intake questionnaires, and welcome
s)

— Monitor the founder's calendar daily and send Zoom links and session reminders to clients

— Set up and manage automated reminders so clients receive notifications ahead of coaching sessions

— Draft and send professional
s to clients and referral partners using approved language and templates

— Post approved social media content across multiple platforms or schedule via Later (or similar scheduling tool). Posting to Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube,
, and TikTok.

— Edit and manage short-form video content inside Riverside.fm (willingness to learn this specific platform is required — all other tools must already be mastered)

— Support general business operations in Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Calendar)

— Communicate with the team via Slack and manage appointment scheduling through Calendly

— Use AI tools such as Claude or ChatGPT as efficiency aids for drafting, formatting, and organizing work

— Identify podcast hosts and outreach opportunities to position the Founder as a guest, then send approved outreach messages

— Identify guest writing and blog contribution opportunities relevant to our field

— Research applicable grants and submit approved applications on the founder's behalf





What We're Looking For



— Exceptional written English — this is the most critical requirement; your
s will represent our brand to clients and professional referral partners

— Minimum 2 years of VA experience working with U.S.-based clients

— Proven, hands-on experience with CRM platforms — please name the specific platforms you've used and for how long

— Experience with CRM migration or platform transitions strongly preferred; must be comfortable owning a data migration project from start to finish

— Proficiency in: Google Workspace, Zoom, Slack, Calendly, and social media scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, or similar)

— Comfortable using Claude (Anthropic) or ChatGPT as a daily efficiency tool — this is expected, not optional

— Strong attention to detail; we work with clients navigating high-stakes family situations and errors are not acceptable

— Self-motivated, reliable, and able to manage tasks asynchronously without hand-holding

— Available to respond and complete tasks during U.S. Pacific business hours (flexibility within those hours is fine)





What This Is NOT



This is not a content creation role. You will not be writing social media captions from scratch or developing strategy. Content is provided to you — your job is to execute it accurately and on time. This is also not an entry-level role. If you are still building your VA skills, this is not the right fit.





Hours & Pay



2–3 hours per day, flexible scheduling

Please include your hourly rate when you apply.





How to Apply



Please send a brief introduction that includes all five of the following — applications missing any item will not be reviewed:



1. The CRM platforms you have used, how long you used each, and whether you have managed a CRM migration

2. A short writing sample — an example of a professional
 you wrote for a U.S.-based client (do not use AI to write this sample — we will know)

3. Which AI tools you currently use in your work and specifically how you use them

4. Your current client load and general daily availability

5. Have you ever migrated client records from one CRM to another? If so, which platforms were involved and how did you manage the transition?

title: GoHighLevel Funnel Builder & Automation Specialist
description:
About Us

SelfDeveloped LLC is a U.S.-based growth marketing and systems agency. We build full-funnel marketing systems for real estate educators, home service companies, and high-ticket coaching businesses. Our founder has 10+ years of experience and has generated $50M+ in results across 120+ clients.

We need a skilled GHL builder who can take copy and creative assets and build them out cleanly and accurately — without hand-holding.

The Role

We do the strategy. You build it. You'll receive copy, brand assets, and build briefs and bring them to life inside GHL — funnels, automations,
/SMS sequences, pipelines, and more. Fast, accurate, and detail-oriented is the standard.

What You'll Be Building



Multi-step funnel pages (opt-in, bridge, upsell, downsell, thank-you)

 and SMS nurture sequences and automation workflows

GHL pipelines and CRM setup for client accounts

Calendar integrations and booking confirmation flows

Sub-account setup and configuration

Form and survey builds

Webhook and third-party integrations (Zapier, Meta CAPI, etc.)

Mobile optimization and brand alignment across all pages



What We're Looking For

Strong understanding of GHL automation logic — triggers, conditions, wait steps, goals, branching

Ability to work from a written brief without needing a call to get started

Clean build habits — labeled workflows, logical naming, no spaghetti automations

Eye for layout and brand consistency

Responsive and able to flag issues before they become problems



Bonus Points:



Experience building inside agency sub-accounts

Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager and CAPI integration

Webinar funnel and registration flow experience

Basic Canva or design skills for asset formatting



To Apply

A portfolio of GHL builds — funnels, automations, sub-account setups. Screenshots, Loom walkthroughs, or a short doc all work.

A 1–2 minute Loom answering: "Walk me through a GHL automation you built from scratch — what was the trigger, what did it do, and what was the outcome?"



No Loom, no review.

title: Bookkeeper for HVAC, Plumbing and Electrical Companies
description:
We are a U.S.-based fractional CFO firm serving growing HVAC, plumbing, and electrical companies. We are hiring a strong bookkeeper to support our CFO work. This is not a full-charge role. You will not manage clients independently. Your job is to keep the books clean, accurate, and accrual-based so the CFO can provide high-level guidance.



This is an after-the-fact accounting role. Clean up, reconcile, document, and prepare reliable financials.



**Must Have Experience**



* 3+ years of U.S. bookkeeping or accounting experience

* Daily QuickBooks Online usage

* Strong accrual accounting knowledge

* Confident balance sheet reconciliations

* Payroll journal entries and allocations

* Clear understanding of COGS vs operating expenses

* Experience with HVAC, plumbing, or electrical companies required

* ServiceTitan experience is a strong bonus

* Experience supporting multiple clients inside a firm environment preferred

* Reliable high-speed internet



**What You’ll Do**



* Maintain clean accrual-based books in QuickBooks Online

* Reconcile bank and credit card accounts monthly

* Review and post payroll entries properly

* Keep the chart of accounts structured and consistent

* Identify errors, inconsistencies, and unusual activity

* Prepare financials for monthly CFO review



**Schedule**

Monday through Friday, East Coast USA business hours, non-negotiable.



**To Apply**



Submit:



* A resume link (Google Drive or Dropbox)

* Confirmation you can work East Coast hours

* Confirmation of 3+ years U.S. accounting experience

* Brief note describing your experience with HVAC, plumbing, or electrical clients



Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: CX Care Coordinator – Growth & Systems | Health / Weight Loss Program
description:
We are a growing health company focused on helping people lose weight and improve their health through modern telehealth programs.



We are looking for a highly capable CX Care Coordinator who will work closely with the founder to support patient experience, community growth, and internal systems.



This role requires someone who is smart, technical, detail-oriented, and proactive. You will become the founder’s right hand in helping manage patient experience, growth initiatives, and operational systems.



Key Requirements (Important)

We are specifically looking for someone who has:

• Experience with GLP-1 weight loss programs (Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, etc.)

• Strong design sense (Canva or similar tools)

• A sharp eye for detail

• Excellent written English and communication

• Comfort working with modern tools and systems



This is not just a support role. We want someone who can think, suggest improvements, and help build systems.



What You’ll Do

Patient Experience (CX)

• Respond to patient questions via chat,
, and messaging

• Help guide patients through onboarding and program questions

• Follow up with leads who expressed interest but didn’t sign up

• Ensure patients feel supported throughout their journey



Growth & Community

• Help improve patient engagement and retention

• Assist with community engagement initiatives

• Identify testimonials and patient success stories

• Suggest improvements to the patient journey



Design & Content

• Create social media graphics and visual content

• Prepare content for community posts and marketing

• Maintain strong visual consistency and quality

• Ensure marketing materials look professional and polished

title: Marketing Assistant (CST Time Needed)
description:
To apply, begin your application message with: "I read the full JD and I am detail-oriented."



About Core Group Resources

Core Group Resources (CGR) is a staffing and workforce solutions firm specializing in maritime, energy, oil and gas, and IT sectors. We operate across the United States, Trinidad, Guyana, and Suriname, connecting top talent with industry-leading clients around the world.

We move fast, communicate clearly, and take our brand seriously. We are looking for a Marketing Assistant who brings the same standard to everything they touch.



Role Overview

This is a remote, full-time position supporting CGR's marketing and communications function. You will work closely with the marketing lead to execute content, manage social media, support
 campaigns, and help keep our digital presence sharp across all business entities under the CGR umbrella.

The right person for this role is organized, proactive, and comfortable working independently. You follow instructions carefully, deliver clean work, and communicate well when you have questions.



What You Will Be Doing

Video Editing and Publishing

• Edit and format short-form and long-form video content for social media distribution

• Publish videos using HubSpot's social media scheduling tool (familiarity with HubSpot is a plus but not required)

• Ensure all published videos meet platform specs and brand guidelines

Graphic Design

• Create daily social media graphics using Canva or similar tools

• Maintain visual consistency with CGR brand colors, fonts, and style

• Design supporting assets for campaigns, events, and announcements as needed

SEO Content Creation

• Write and optimize blog posts, website copy, and other digital content using provided keyword lists

• Implement on-page SEO including meta titles, meta descriptions, header structure, and keyword placement

• Build and manage internal linking across pages and posts

• Ensure all images have descriptive alt text

• Audit existing content for SEO gaps and flag improvements to the marketing lead

Social Media Calendar Management

• Develop and maintain a monthly social media content calendar across LinkedIn,
, and Instagram

• Schedule and publish posts using HubSpot

• Track engagement and surface performance observations to the team

 Marketing

• Assist with the development of drip campaign content and
 sequences

• Help write, format, and schedule marketing
s

• Support list management and segmentation as directed

Cold
 Outreach

• Help draft and refine cold outreach scripts targeting new business and talent pipelines

• Assist with campaign setup and list preparation

• Track campaign performance and report key metrics

General Marketing Support

• Apply all of the above across CGR's affiliated business entities as directed

• Assist with internal communications, announcements, and other marketing deliverables

• Be resourceful, communicate proactively, and flag blockers early

Web Design

• Develop, design, and publish pages using Squarespace and Squarekicker 



What We Are Looking For

• At least 1 to 2 years of marketing, content, or social media experience

• Strong written English communication skills

• Working knowledge of Canva for graphic creation

• Basic understanding of SEO principles including on-page optimization

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks without constant supervision

• Attention to detail and a habit of double-checking your work before submitting

• Comfortable with tools like HubSpot, Google Docs, and social media platforms

• Video editing experience is a plus (CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Adobe Premiere, or similar)



What We Offer

• Fully remote position with a Monday through Friday schedule

• Stable, long-term opportunity with a growing company

• Clear direction and a collaborative team environment

• Room to grow as the marketing function expands



How to Apply

Submit your application through OnlineJobs.ph. In your cover message, include examples of past marketing work if available (social posts, graphics, writing samples, etc.).

Remember: your application must begin with the phrase noted at the top of this job listing. Applications that do not include it will not be reviewed.

title: Weekly Paid Graphic Designer – Video Production & Creative Agency
description:
Schedule: Part-time / Full-time Available



About Us



We are a high-growth Videography and Production Company. We produce everything from music videos and commercials to viral YouTube series like "Spill It." We are looking for a "Go-To" Graphic Designer who can match our cinematic, urban, and high-energy aesthetic.



What You Will Be Doing



Because we are a production house, your work will be diverse and exciting. You won't just be making logos; you will be helping build the visual world of our videos.



High-Conversion YouTube Thumbnails: Creating "clickable" designs for our series (Retention-focused).



Production Pitch Decks: Designing "Director's Treatments" and PDFs to help us win big clients.



Merch Mock-ups: Creating realistic mock-ups for apparel, hats, and accessories.



Event & Social Media Flyers: Bold, "Streetwear" style flyers for our shoots and events.



Video Assets: Designing "Lower Thirds," title cards, and end screens for our editors to use in 4K videos.



Logo & Branding: Full brand kits for new series and client projects.



Requirements



Expert Level: Adobe Photoshop & Illustrator (InDesign or Canva is a plus).



Visual Style: You must be able to do "Cinematic," "Gritty," and "Modern" designs. No basic corporate templates.



Mock-up Mastery: You must know how to make digital designs look like real products (T-shirts, hoodies, etc.).



Communication: Must be responsive and able to work in a fast-paced environment.



Reliability: We pay weekly and expect consistent, high-quality output.



Why Join Our Team?



Weekly Pay: We value your work and ensure you are paid every single week.



Creative Growth: You’ll be designing for real film sets and viral content.



Long-term Role: We are looking for a partner to grow with our agency, not just a one-time freelancer.



How to Apply (MUST FOLLOW)



Send a link to your Portfolio (Be sure to include any YouTube thumbnails or flyer work).



Briefly explain your experience working with Video Production or YouTube brands.



Confirm you are comfortable with Weekly Payments.



Type the word "CREATIVE" at the very top of your application so we know you read the full post.

title: E-commerce Supply Chain Operations VA / Manager (Remote)
description:
E-commerce Supply Chain Operations VA / Manager - 20-30 hours per week or more



THIS IS A REMOTE POSITION - PLEASE SEND RESUME



MUST HAVE REQUIRED EXPERIENCE, ENGLISH FLUENCY AND STABLE HIGH SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION





Description



As a growing ecommerce brand, we are looking for an experienced, detail-obsessed Supply Chain Operations Manager who wants to own something that matters.

You will be responsible for ensuring our inventory model is accurate, purchase orders are placed and tracked with precision, and international vendor relationships are managed proactively. Your work will have direct, visible impact on the business, and you will report directly to the Head of Operations with full visibility into the decisions your data drives.

If you thrive in a lean, high-accountability environment and take genuine pride in airtight execution, this role was built for you.





Essential Functions



Own the full-year PO planning process, calculating unit needs per SKU to ensure inventory never reaches zero

Translate PO needs into the Product Calendar, incorporating lead times across multiple international manufacturing partners

Serve as the primary point of contact for international manufacturing partners, maintaining consistent daily communication to manage production timelines, flag delays, resolve discrepancies, and ensure POs move through production, shipping, and arrival without gaps

Maintain and update the PO Log in ClickUp, including placement timelines, reminders, and status tracking through production, shipping, and arrival

Manage PO reception reconciliation — comparing ordered volume against received volume and reporting discrepancies to the Head of Operations and factory partners

Update inventory projection models to reflect real received quantities and flag any downstream impact on future POs

Surface potential out-of-stock risks proactively and escalate to the Head of Operations for decision-making

Coordinate with the warehouse team to verify incoming shipments align with what was ordered

Maintain familiarity with customs documentation including Bills of Lading, Commercial Invoices, and customs fee structures

Report twice weekly to the Head of Operations with structured updates on PO status, inventory projections, and any items requiring decisions or escalation





Competencies



Deep analytical capability, mainly in excel and google sheets, and comfort managing complex, interdependent data models

Exceptional attention to detail — this role directly impacts inventory levels and business continuity

Strong communication skills. Fluency in English language is a must

Strong understanding of international supply chain operations and procurement cycles

Experienced and confident managing direct relationships with international manufacturing partners — professional, proactive, and capable of holding vendors accountable across cultures and time zones

Ability to manage multiple time-sensitive workstreams independently with minimal supervision

Clear, professional, and proactive communicator across internal teams and external vendor partners

Highly organized with a systematic approach to tracking, updating, and escalating

Comfortable operating across multiple platforms simultaneously in a fast-moving environment

Genuine ownership mentality — treats inventory health as a direct reflection of their work





Education & Experience



Bachelor's degree required; Master's degree a plus; degree in Supply Chain, Logistics, Operations is a huge plus.

Minimum 3–5 years of experience in supply chain, procurement, or operations

Experience supporting a DTC or ecommerce brand is a must

Fluent in written and spoken English; Mandarin proficiency a plus

Proficiency in Excel, Google Sheets, and ClickUp required; familiarity with Shopify and Expeditors platform a plus

Direct experience managing international vendor relationships and PO cycles required

Familiarity with customs documentation (BOL, Commercial Invoices, customs fees) required





Hourly Pay/Workload



$12/hour

20-30 hours per week

title: Ecommerce video editor
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



VERY Highly valued skill:

- AI: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Kling, Nano Banana

Candidates with this skill set will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The Big opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

 “I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have AI experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you. 

Speak soon, Karos

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO/Co-Founder
description:
About the role

We’re looking for someone to assist with reducing friction and leveraging priorities that rotate between customer and partner work, product and planning, go-to-market, fundraising and investor relations, and conference-heavy periods.

You will own be responsible for assisting with the operating cadence of the founder between calendar management, meeting preparation and follow-through, travel and logistics, and a lightweight system for decisions and action items.

This is an execution-focused role with high trust, high context, and may have opportunity for increasing scope over time.

Outcomes you will own

• Calendar management: Meetings have clear agendas, pre-reads, links, and the right people, and there is protected time for deep work and strategic thinking when the prior week has been meeting-compressed. 

• Follow-ups. Action items, owners, deadlines, and next steps are captured and follow-up for completion across customer work, internal team cadence, and external stakeholders.

• Information is easy to find. Decisions, notes, and key documents are organized and linked (especially around high-stakes threads like fundraising, contracts, and customer pilots).

• Admin load stays low even during travel and conference surges. Logistics, scheduling, and communications remain clean and predictable during ramp periods. 



Key responsibilities

1) Calendar & time management

• Own calendar end-to-end: scheduling, rescheduling, prioritization, and conflict resolution.

• Build a weekly cadence to match working rhythm: 

o Meeting-dense days supported with frictionless prep.

o At least one protected strategic-thinking block per week when needed. 

• Ensure meeting hygiene: 

o Agenda and “decisions needed” are explicit.

o Pre-reads and relevant links are attached directly to invites. 

• Coordinate across internal tea
mbers and external stakeholders (customers, partners, investors).

2) Meeting preparation, notes, and follow-through

• Before meetings: 

o Assemble a one-page briefing: context, goals, stakeholders, links, and open questions.

• During/after meetings: 

o Capture decisions, action items, and owners.

o Publish a short recap and drive follow-ups.

• Maintain a lightweight decision trail using Shelby’s Decision Log approach, so key decisions and delegations are easy to track and execute.

3) Admin and operations support (founder support)

Based on recurring work patterns in task lists and meeting cadences, you will support admin across:

• Fundraising / investor relations admin (scheduling, document coordination, follow-ups, tracking next steps). 

• Contracts and document workflows (organizing drafts, routing for review, tracking signatures and next actions).

• Finance admin support (invoice organization, payment reminders, coordinating with vendors and advisors).

• Conference and event logistics (travel booking, itineraries, meeting scheduling around events, follow-ups after events).

4) Travel and logistics

• Plan end-to-end travel: flight options, buffers, hotels, ground transport, meeting clustering, and itineraries.

• Build travel packs that make it easy to execute on the road (contacts, confirmations, local logistics, key docs).

5) Systems & continuous improvement

• Improve the “EA dashboard” workflow over time: templates, checklists, and SOPs that make recurring tasks repeatable.

• Proactively spot gaps, reduce back-and-forth, and propose better ways to run the operating cadence.



What success looks like (30/60/90)

First 30 days

• Establish a clean calendar system and meeting-prep workflow.

• Implement a consistent post-meeting recap + action-item tracking habit.

• Build a baseline weekly rhythm that protects deep work time. 

60 days

• Travel and conference logistics run smoothly with minimal Shelby input.

• Decision and follow-up tracking is reliable and visible (no dropped balls).

90 days

• You independently manage the operating cadence: calendar strategy, meeting pipelines, follow-ups, and recurring admin.

• Founder's time is noticeably “higher quality”: fewer context switches, fewer logistics tasks, clearer priorities.



Ideal candidate profile

• Extremely organized and detail-strong, but not rigid. You can handle rapid changes and shifting priorities.

• High agency and proactive follow-through. You do not wait to be asked twice.

• Excellent written communication. You can write crisp recaps,
s, and briefs.

• Strong judgment and discretion. You are comfortable handling sensitive information.

• Systems thinker. You enjoy building simple processes that keep things moving.

• Comfortable working in Notion (or excited to learn quickly), Microsoft suite, and Hubspot are added benefits.

at least three years of experience in customer service, specifically within the e-commerce or dropshipping sectors. Excellent language skills in High German and the ability to understand Swiss German are essential, alongside proficiency in common support tools such as Zendesk, Gorgias, or Shopify Admin. ich habe heute meinen Pullover erhalten,

title: Social Media Content & Marketing Specialist
description:
NewDay Child Coaching is an online coaching practice — not a clinic — built on something we believe no one else is doing quite like this. We are a Physical Therapist, an Occupational Therapist, and a Speech-Language Pathologist. Three disciplines. Three professional lenses. Three distinct voices — unified into one warm, expert, parent-first brand.

We serve families during the critical 0–36 month developmental window, empowering parents to become the expert for their own child. We are actively launching a new developmental coaching framework and a corresponding app — and we need our social media presence to grow alongside that mission so more families can find us.

Our community of NewDawns™ — that's what we call our families — spans
 (16,000+ followers), Instagram, TikTok, Threads, and YouTube. If you believe the right message, on the right platform, at the right time can genuinely change a family's life — we want to talk to you.



The Role

Position: Social Media Content & Marketing Specialist

Hours: 15–20 hours/week to start

Rate: $4.00 USD/hour starting rate, with increases tied to performance and results

Schedule: Flexible within your timezone; some overlap with US Pacific hours preferred

Type: Part-Time Independent Contractor | Long-term potential



This is not a posting role. This is a relationship-building, brand-nurturing, community-growing role. You'll work directly from a detailed Social Media Strategy Toolkit we've already built — executing content plans, engaging with our community, and keeping our brand voice consistent and warm across every channel.

A key priority of this role is growing our
 subscriber base — converting our 16,000+ followers into an active, subscribed audience that hears from us first and stays connected to our mission long-term.



What You'll Do



Execute weekly and monthly content calendars across
, Instagram, TikTok, Threads, and YouTube

Create and schedule posts — graphics, captions, short-form and long-form video concepts — using our provided tools and brand guidelines



Engage meaningfully with comments, DMs, and community posts, especially on our
 page and
 Channel

Actively implement strategies that convert followers into subscribers

Adapt content per platform: 
munity building, TikTok trends and short-form video, Instagram Reels and Stories, Threads conversational content, YouTube Shorts and long-form

Repurpose long-form content (blog posts, course material) into snackable social posts

Draft captions in our established brand voice — warm, expert, parent-first

Monitor trends and flag relevant opportunities for timely content

Compile a simple weekly performance snapshot (engagement, reach, follower growth)

Collaborate with our founder in weekly check-in meetings via video call

Support giveaway campaigns, product launches, and community events



Tools You'll Use

Canva: Graphics and visual content (required)

CapCutShort-form video editing (minimum bar)

DaVinci Resolve / Adobe Premiere ProVideo editing (moves you to the top of our list)

Meta Business Suite / Buffer / Later

Trello Task tracking

JibbleTime tracking (required — non-negotiable)

WisePayment processing



What We're Looking For

Required:

Proven experience managing social media for a business or brand (links and portfolio required)

Deep understanding of platform-specific strategies — you know
 is NOT 
, and you create accordingly

Proficiency in Canva and CapCut for graphics and design

Strong written English — warm, clear, and conversational (Grammarly use is welcome and encouraged)

Reliable internet and a consistent work schedule

Comfortable working independently using provided systems and strategy guides

Strong attention to detail — brand consistency matters deeply to us



Nice to Have (will move you to the top of our list):

Experience in health, wellness, parenting, or early childhood content

Video editing skills beyond CapCut — DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere Pro

Demonstrated knowledge of
 subscriber/follower growth strategies

Experience managing
 Groups, Community pages, or
 Channels

YouTube channel growth experience — Shorts, SEO for video, community tab

Experience using AI tools to accelerate content creation



Pay, Hours & Time Tracking

Starting rate: $4.00 USD/hour

This is an honest starting point for a new contractor relationship. Your rate grows with demonstrated results — platform knowledge, consistent delivery, real engagement growth, and strong communication will be rewarded.

Hours: 15–20 hours/week



Content planning and calendar management: ~3–4 hrs/week

Content creation (graphics, captions, repurposing): ~4–6 hrs/week

Scheduling and posting: ~2–3 hrs/week

Community engagement (comments, DMs, group interaction): ~3–4 hrs/week

Performance tracking and weekly reporting: ~1–2 hrs/week

Weekly team check-in: ~1 hr/week



Time tracking: Jibble is required. You are paid for the hours you work — no more, no less.

Payment: Twice monthly via Wise — on the 15th and the 30th.

Before you can begin work, you must:



Provide a valid BIR-TIN (Bureau of Internal Revenue Tax Identification Number)

Complete and submit a W-8BEN form (Certificate of Foreign Status for U.S. tax purposes)

These are non-negotiable requirements and must be completed prior to your start date.



Trial Period

Because this role is vital to the success of our business, we begin all new contractors with a 2-week to 1-month paid trial period. During this time, we'll evaluate communication, consistency, content quality, and early engagement results together. If things go well on both sides — and we expect they will — we'll move forward with a long-term offer. We want someone who is also evaluating us, not just the other way around.



Our Culture & What We Expect

We are a small but mighty team. Everyone on the NewDay team shows up with heart, communicates proactively, and cares deeply about our families — our NewDawns™.



We are looking for someone in it for the long haul. If you want a quick gig, this is not the right fit.

Reliability is non-negotiable. We do not work with people who ghost or stop communicating. If something comes up, you talk to us — that's how a team works.

Social media marketing must be your genuine passion — not just a job you fell into.

We provide detailed systems, strategy guides, and brand toolkits. You will never be left guessing.

We value creativity within structure. We have a brand voice and visual identity; we want you to bring it to life, not reinvent it.

We expect timely responses within 24 hours on business days.



How to Apply

Please submit all five of the following. Applications missing any item will not be reviewed — this is our first test of your attention to detail.

1. A brief introduction (3–5 sentences)

Who are you, and why is this role a genuine fit for you?

2. Links to 2–3 social media accounts you've managed

Business or brand pages only — not personal accounts. Include any growth metrics you're proud of.

3. A platform strategy answer

In 2–4 sentences: What makes
 content strategy different from 
 content strategy?

4. A social media audit of NewDay Child Coaching

Before applying, review our presence on
, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, and 
 200–400 words, tell us:



What is working well and what needs improvement across our platforms?

What specific changes would you make to grow our followers and engagement?

What is your strategy for converting our 16,000+
 followers into paying subscribers?



You may use AI tools to help formulate and polish your response — we use AI ourselves and we're not testing your typing. We are testing your strategy and creative vision.

5. Your availability and timezone



Subject line for your application: Social Media Specialist Application — [Your Name]

Send to: 

This position is open until filled. We review applications on a rolling basis. Serious inquiries only.



NewDay Child Coaching | Nurturing NewDawns. Illuminating NewWays.™

title: UI/UX Developer
description:
About Us

We’re an early-stage startup founded by AI researchers and healthcare innovators. Our mission is to transform dermatology and visual health with cutting-edge AI. By standardizing how clinicians, researchers, and telehealth teams capture and analyze medical images, we’re unlocking new ways to diagnose, track, and treat medical conditions at scale.

Backed by private and federal funding, top advisors, and early enterprise interest, we’re building a multi-billion-dollar vision as the platform for global AI-driven visual diagnostics.

What You'll Do

Building something meaningful in a space that directly impacts patient care
