title: Creative Researcher / Strategy Assistant (E-commerce Ads | Meta)
description:
About Us



We are an e-commerce creative agency focused on performance-driven ads for brands spending serious money on Meta.

We don’t just design ads — we build winning creatives based on psychology, angles, and data.

We are looking for a smart, detail-oriented researcher to help us find winning patterns and support our creative strategy.



Your Role



You will support our team by researching ads from competitors of our clients, identifying patterns, and organizing insights that lead to high-performing creatives.



This is not a generic VA job — you will learn how high-level advertising works.



Your Responsibilities



- Research ads using Meta Ad Library

- Find 20–50 relevant ads for our clients

- Document findings in spreadsheets



Break down ads into:



Hook

Angle

Format

Awareness level  (we can train you in this)



Find and track competitors and identify:



- What they are testing

 -Which ads keep running (important signal)

- Organize everything into our database (Notion/Airtable/spreadsheets)



Suggest basic creative ideas based on patterns



What We’re Looking For



Strong English

High attention to detail

Fast learner

Organized and structured



Interested in marketing / advertising



You don’t need years of experience — mindset matters more



Not Required (but helpful):



Experience with Meta ads

Experience with e-commerce



Work Setup



Part-time: 10–15 hours per week

Flexible schedule (but consistent output required)



Salary



$5–6/hour (depending on experience)



Growth Opportunity



If you perform well, you can grow into:



- Creative strategist

- More responsibility

- Higher pay



Application Task  (takes max. 5 minutes)



To apply, complete this short task:



- Go to Meta Ad Library

- Search for a brand in fitness, fashion, or cosmetics

 - Find 2–3 ads



For each ad, answer:



What is the first thing you notice in this ad?

What do you think the ad is trying to sell or communicate?

Why do you think this ad could work well?

(think about what angle they use, why it works etc)



you can give me the adlibrary link of the specific ad + your answer on above questions



- There are no “perfect answers” — we are looking at how you think

- This helps us see how you think



To Apply



Start your application with:

“AdLab Researcher”



And include:



- Your answer to the test task

- Your experience (if any)

- Why you want this role



Thanks for reading and we can't wait to hear from you :)

title: TikTok / Short-form Video Editor - DIY & Renovation content
description:
Hi! I’m looking for a skilled video editor to help me create engaging TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts focused on UK house renovation content.



You’ll receive raw footage each evening (9-10pm UK time) via WeTransfer, and your job is to edit it into 2-3 minute videos that match my current editing style and personality - fast-paced, dynamic, and engaging. Most clips should appear on screen for less than 0.8 seconds unless I’m speaking or there’s a key action like singing or dancing.



Videos are posted daily, with up to 10 videos some weeks. You must deliver each edited video within 12 hours of receiving the footage (by 9-10am UK time the next day).



What you’ll do:

- Cut longer raw house renovation footage into punchy, engaging short-form videos.

- Follow my existing editing style but always look for ways to make the content better.

- Deliver final videos via WeTransfer within the strict turnaround time.

- Communicate clearly about progress and revisions.



What I’m looking for:

- Experience editing viral short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube Shorts.

- Ability to work under tight deadlines, 7 days a week.

- Proficient with any adobe premiere pro

- MUST be able to edit 360 footage from an Insta360 camera

- Great attention to detail and reliability.

- Strong English comprehension for following instructions and communication.



Hours & Pay:

- Up to 7-10 videos per week, about 1-2 hours editing per video.

- Max 15 hours per week.

- Pay rate: $5 USD/hour.



How to apply:

- Please send a brief summary of your experience editing short-form content, links to your previous work or portfolio. Include "Benje I want to edit your content" in your application. Do not apply if you can't edit 360 footage.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) – Amazon Marketing Agency (Remote) Full-Time | Remote
description:
About Us: 

The Amazon Whisperer is a fast-growing, full-service Amazon marketing agency focused on delivering profitable sales growth for consumer brands on the world's largest marketplace. We specialize in Amazon SEO, PPC, listing optimization, and catalog management — and we're building out the sales engine to match our 
ntum.



We're looking for a sharp, hungry SDR who knows Amazon inside and out and can turn cold prospects into qualified, booked meetings with confidence.



The Role As an SDR at The Amazon Whisperer, you'll be on the front lines of our outbound sales operation. You'll work a mix of cold outreach and warm lead follow-up — researching prospects, identifying pain points, and booking qualified discovery calls for our closing team. This isn't a script-reading role. You'll need to actually understand Amazon, speak a seller's language, and earn the meeting.



Core Responsibilities:

Outbound Dialing & Prospecting: Work structured lead lists through cold calling and warm follow-up sequences

Reach out to inbound leads from lead magnets,
 campaigns, and other marketing channels

Execute pre-call warm-up sequences via
 and LinkedIn before dialing

Lead Research & Qualification: Research prospects directly in Amazon Seller Central to identify performance gaps, listing issues, and growth opportunities

Qualify leads on the call against defined criteria before booking meetings

Ensure only high-quality, sales-ready leads reach the closing team

Appointment Setting: Book qualified discovery calls with brand owners, founders, and marketing decision-makers

title: SEO Specialist
description:
The Role

We're looking for a self-sufficient Remote SEO Specialist who lives and breathes search — not just traditional SEO, but the emerging world of AI-driven search and Generative Engine Optimization. You'll work directly on dealership accounts, developing strategies, creating SOPs, executing technical work, and helping shape how our agency approaches SEO and GEO for a competitive industry.



This isn't a "set it and forget it" role. You'll be expected to think, build, and improve — and you'll have the tools and autonomy to do it.



What You'll Do

SEO Strategy & Execution

• Manage on-page, technical, and local SEO for automotive dealership clients

• Conduct keyword research with a focus on intent, AI Overview triggers, and dealer-relevant queries

• Audit and improve site structure, internal linking, HTML markup, and schema

• Optimize Google Business Profile listings for local visibility and engagement

• Monitor and report on keyword rankings, GBP actions, VDP views, and branded search volume growth



Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)

• Execute content and citation strategies designed to increase AI Overview appearances

• Build brand authority through content distribution across LinkedIn, Medium, Reddit, YouTube, and industry forums

• Research and monitor how AI search engines (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity) surface dealership content

• Stay current with AI search ranking signals and adapt strategies accordingly



Content & Technical

• Write and publish SEO-optimized content for dealership websites (models, geo pages, FAQs, buying guides)

• Apply basic HTML and on-page markup — you know what a title tag, H-tag hierarchy, and schema look like in the wild

• Identify and resolve crawl issues, redirect chains, duplicate content, and Core Web Vital problems

• Bonus: Assist with light web development tasks or CMS-level page builds when needed



Process, Systems & Innovation

• Create and maintain SOPs for repeatable SEO and GEO tasks

• Use AI tools (especially Claude / Claude Code) to automate reporting, content drafts, research, and workflow steps

• Proactively identify inefficiencies and propose — then build — better ways of doing things

• Bring ideas to tea
etings; we want to hear what you're reading, testing, and thinking



What We're Looking For

Required

• 2+ years of hands-on SEO experience (agency or in-house)

• Proficiency with Ahrefs — keyword research, backlink analysis, site audits, rank tracking

• Working knowledge of HTML — enough to edit source, identify issues, and implement fixes

• Familiarity with AI tools — specifically Claude or Claude Code for research, content, and automation

• Strong understanding of Google Search Console and GA4 for performance analysis

• Self-starter mentality — you figure things out, you don't wait to be told

• Ability to write clear SOPs and document your processes

• Strong written communication skills



Preferred / Bonus

• Experience in automotive SEO or dealer digital marketing

• Understanding of GEO concepts — AI Overview optimization, entity-based SEO, citation building

• Web development skills (HTML/CSS, basic JS, CMS platforms like WordPress or 
)

• Experience building or using prompt-based AI workflows for agency tasks

• Familiarity with Looker Studio, Data Studio, or similar reporting tools



You'll Thrive Here If You...

• Love being at the intersection of SEO and AI — and you're curious about what comes next

• Get excited about building systems, not just completing tasks

• Read SEO blogs, Reddit threads, and AI newsletters because you genuinely want to

• Can manage multiple client accounts without needing hand-holding on every step

• Bring solutions to the table, not just problems

• Understand that in automotive SEO, branded keyword growth and GBP actions often matter more than raw traffic



Tools You'll Use

Ahrefs  •  Claude / Claude Code  •  Google Search Console  •  Google Analytics 4  •  Google Business Profile  •  Looker Studio  •  WordPress / Dealer CMS platforms  •  Slack  •  Google Workspace

title: Phone-Based Appointment Setter / SDR – US Home Care Clients (GoHighLevel)
description:
ABOUT US


 is a US-based growth agency that helps home care agencies get more clients through
 advertising. Our clients provide in-home care to elderly and disabled individuals across the United States. We're a small, fast-moving team hiring our first dedicated Appointment Setter / SDR.



THE ROLE

You will call
 leads within 5 minutes of them filling out a form asking about home care services. On that call, you will build trust, pre-qualify their needs, and book them directly for a free in-home consultation with our client's care team.

This is not a handoff role. You qualify AND book the appointment in one call. The funnel you own:

New Lead ? You Call & Qualify ? You Book the In-Home Assessment ? Assessment Happens



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY DAY



Call every new lead within 5 minutes of form submission (triple-dial on first attempt)

Pre-qualify prospects using our BANT framework (care needs, timeline, decision-maker, service area)

Book in-home consultations directly into the agency's calendar in GoHighLevel while on the phone

Handle objections: "I don't want someone in my house," "Just send me info," "How much does it cost?"

Follow up relentlessly: up to 7 dials on Day 1, morning and evening calls for 14 days, strategic texts and voice notes

Log every call in GoHighLevel with notes, tags, and correct pipeline stage

Send personalized voice notes and texts between call blocks

Ask if the family decision-maker can be present at the home visit (increases close rate)



WHAT YOU ARE NOT DOING



No cold calling — every lead already filled out a form asking for help

No closing or discussing pricing — the care specialist handles that at the home visit

No Medicaid paperwork — for Medicaid leads, you pre-qualify and schedule into the intake coordinator's calendar

No admin, data entry, social media, or tasks outside of calling and scheduling



DAILY TARGETS



50-80 outbound call attempts

15-20 live conversations

7-10 in-home assessments booked

100% of new leads called within 5 minutes

Every call logged in GHL with notes



COMPENSATION



Base: $10/hour + bonuses + incentives 



MUST-HAVE REQUIREMENTS (Non-Negotiable)



Near-native English fluency with a neutral or American accent. You will be calling elderly Americans and their worried adult children. Any noticeable accent will break trust immediately.



1+ year of phone-based SDR, appointment setting, or outbound sales experience. You must be comfortable calling strangers, handling rejection, and following a script while sounding natural.



Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (GHL). You must already know how to navigate contacts, update pipeline stages, use the calendar/booking system, send texts, and manage tags. We will not train you on GHL basics.



Reliable internet (minimum 25 Mbps) and a completely quiet workspace. No background noise during calls. Your environment must sound professional.



Available for US Central Time business hours: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM CST, Mon

day through Friday.



Genuine empathy and patience. You are calling someone's grandmother or someone's stressed-out daughter. If you can't slow down, listen, and make people feel safe, this role is not for you.



Comfortable booking in-home visits, not just phone calls. You're scheduling a real person to enter someone's home. You must be able to position this as safe, free, and no-obligation.



NICE-TO-HAVE (Strong Preference)



Background in healthcare, home care, or senior services

Experience responding to
 lead ads or warm inbound leads

Background as a licensed English teacher or call center trainer

Experience sending personalized voice notes as part of a follow-up cadence

Familiarity with US geography and culture



TOOLS YOU'LL USE



GoHighLevel (GHL) — CRM, dialer, texting, pipeline, calendar booking

Google Workspace — Calendar, Sheets, Docs

Loom — Call recording and coaching reviews

Slack or WhatsApp — Team communication



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



Every lead is warm (they asked for help, you're not cold calling)

You own the full outcome from first call to booked appointment

Full training provided: call scripts, objection guides, follow-up cadences

Your earnings grow as we add clients



Path to team lead as we scale and hire additional SDRs



1-WEEK PAID TRIAL



All new hires start with a 1-week paid trial at full base rate ($5/hr x 40 hrs = $200). You'll complete training, practice calls, and start making live calls under coaching. At the end of the week, we both d
 if it's a fit.



HOW TO APPLY

Your application MUST include all four of the following or it will not be reviewed:



1. A 60-second voice recording introducing yourself in English. Tell us your name, where you're from, your SDR experience, and why you want this role. Use Loom, Vocaroo, or a voice memo and include the link. APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A VOICE RECORDING WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.



2. Your GHL experience in detail. What did you use it for? Which features (pipelines, calendars, workflows, dialer, texting)? How many months? Rate yourself 1-10.



3. Your previous SDR or appointment setting results. How many calls per day? Appointment set rate? What industry? How long in the role?



4. Your availability and workspace. What US hours can you work? Describe your workspace. What is your internet speed?



We review applications within 48 hours. Qualified candidates receive a 15-minute phone screen including a live mock objection scenario.

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
DESCRIPTION:

The primary objective of the patient care coordinator is to ensure that patients are properly attended to and assisted throughout their journey through the system by calling leads and scheduling appointments with providers.

The patient care coordinator must assist the patient in any informational or administrative issues that they may come in contact with.



The patient care coordinator owns all aspects of the patient journey. They are responsible for answering questions, interpreting responses, and evaluating improvements based on their experience with their patient’s needs.

The patient care coordinator must primarily support the patient’s journey while at the same time taking part in process improvement initiatives. They must be able to act autonomously, with minimal supervision, executing tasks based on company directives and goals under fast-paced timelines.



QUALIFICATIONS:

Excellent verbal and written English communication skills [C2(Advanced/Mastery) preferred]

Be extremely organized, positive, and uplifting. The patient care coordinator is the second face of the company (after the website / sign-up app)!

Proper patient intake / after appointment coordination

Proper execution of emerging patient roadblocks and challenges

Proactive management of the patient journey

Knowledge of EMR and privacy requirements in the Canada/USA (HIPAA, PHIPA, PIPEDA)

Business and tech-savvy acumen

Engagement with the product development team for process improvement initiatives

Maintain a professional and respectful relationship with all patients & MD correspondence

Support cross-functional projects relating to but not directly supported by the patient intake team

Ability to work with confidential company information.

Be flexible with your available workday/times. Overnight work might be required due to the time difference.



EDUCATION / EXPERIENCE:

Bachelor’s Degree, Healthcare Management, Nursing, Patient Care, Public Health

Minimum of 2 years related experience

Customer care industry experience

Experience within the healthcare and/or cloud computing industries is desired

Basic mathematical and computer skills

Google & Microsoft Office Suite

Experience working with and improving standard procedures & processes

Demonstrated ability to learn new skills and interact with new systems/ procedures

Presentation experience

Strong interpersonal skills



ADDITIONAL REQUIREMENTS:

Assist patients in the USA / Canada.

Must be able to adequately perform the above duties with reasonable accommodation.

Must have a stable internet connection and a quiet place to work.



If interested, please include a link to your updated resume as well as link to a 3-5 minute video introduction to your message/application and send it to jobs [at] rocketdoctor [d0t] io.

 provided in this manner to avoid masking and save interested candidate effort of having to register or log in to OnlineJobs.

If you love working with data, writing with purpose, optimizing systems, and using AI tools to create smarter workflows… keep reading. You’ll help us build and optimize AI-driven systems that support content creation, data analysis, research, and digital growth.

This is not just about using ChatGPT. We want someone who understands: Data, Logic, SEO, Automation, Risk analysis, Algorithm-driven thinking. Someone who can think critically, write clearly, and build smarter workflows using AI tools.

title: DTC Ads Specialist
description:
Job Overview:



Sequence Commerce is hiring a DTC Ads Manager to lead paid media strategy and execution for direct-to-consumer brands. This role is responsible for planning, launching, optimizing, and reporting on performance campaigns that drive traffic, revenue, and profitable growth across major paid channels.



The ideal candidate has strong hands-on experience managing DTC ad accounts, understands full-funnel acquisition, and knows how to balance creative testing, audience strategy, and performance efficiency.





Key Responsibilities:



- Manage paid media campaigns across channels such as Google, Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, and other relevant traffic sources

- Build campaign structures for prospecting, retargeting, and conversion-focused growth

- Launch, monitor, and optimize campaigns based on revenue, ROAS, CPA, MER, and customer acquisition goals

- Analyze account performance and identify opportunities to scale winning campaigns or improve underperforming areas

- Work closely with creative, strategy, and account teams to develop testing roadmaps and performance insights

- Audit client accounts and create strategic recommendations for growth

- Manage budgets, pacing, bid strategies, audience segmentation, and feed-based campaign performance

- Prepare clear client-facing reports, performance summaries, and action plans

- Support onboarding of new clients through account audits, setup reviews, and launch planning

- Stay current on platform changes, attribution trends, creative best practices, and DTC growth strategies



Requirements:

- 3+ years of hands-on paid media experience in DTC or ecommerce advertising

- Strong experience with Meta Ads and Google Ads

- Working knowledge of TikTok Ads, YouTube Ads, and Pinterest Ads is preferred

- Proven ability to manage campaigns focused on ecommerce revenue growth, not just lead generation

- Strong understanding of attribution, pixel tracking, conversion events, product feeds, and analytics

- Comfortable interpreting performance data and translating it into action

- Experience managing multiple client accounts at once

- Strong communication and presentation skills

- Highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented



Preferred Qualifications

- Agency experience managing multiple ecommerce brands

- Experience with Amazon or Walmart advertising is a plus

- Familiarity with creative testing frameworks and landing page performance analysis

- Experience with reporting tools, GA4, Shopify analytics, and feed management tools

- Ability to think strategically while also executing day-to-day account work



Success in This Role

- A strong DTC Ads Manager in this role will:

- Improve account efficiency and revenue performance across client portfolios

- Build clear testing plans and optimization roadmaps

- Communicate confidently with internal teams and clients

- Identify growth opportunities quickly and act on them

- Maintain strong attention to detail while managing multiple moving parts



Compensation and Structure

- Full-time role

- Remote or hybrid depending on company preference

- Compensation based on experience

- Performance incentives can be added based on client growth and retention



Why Join Sequence Commerce

- Work with a team deeply specialized in ecommerce growth

- Help scale brands across major digital channels

- Collaborate with experienced operators, strategists, and marketplace experts

- Be part of a fast-growing agency with strong performance standards and meaningful client impact



Please send your resume and Ads Portfolio to: 
 and

title: E-commerce PPC & Keyword Strategist (Amazon Seller Central)
description:
We’re looking for a results-driven, proactive and dedicated Amazon PPC & Account Manager to take ownership of our Amazon Seller Central account, with a primary focus on pay-per-click (PPC) campaign management, keyword research, and data-driven decision-making.



If you’re passionate about leveraging analytics, optimizing campaigns, and growing product visibility and sales on Amazon, we’d love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities:

-Manage and optimize Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, etc.)

-Conduct in-depth keyword research to improve organic and paid rankings

-Analyze performance metrics (ACoS, TACoS, ROAS, CTR, CVR, etc.) and provide actionable insights

-Execute product listings optimizations (titles, bullets, backend keywords, etc.)

-Monitor and respond to account health issues, policy violations, and customer feedback

-Stay up-to-date on Amazon’s latest advertising features and platform changes

-Collaborate with internal team or clients on strategy, budgets, and reporting

-Perform competitor analysis to understand market trends and adapt PPC strategies accordingly.

-Generate detailed reports on campaign performance, interpreting key metrics to drive decisions and refine future strategies.



Requirements:

-Proven experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts

-Expertise in Parent-Child relationships within Amazon Seller Central to optimize product listings and variations.

-Hands-on experience with Amazon Ads and campaign optimization

-Strong proficiency in keyword tools (e.g., Helium 10, Jungle Scout, DataDive, etc.)

-Analytical mindset with strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

-Ability to interpret data and translate it into performance improvements

-Excellent communication and time management skills

-Detail-oriented, proactive, and results-driven with the ability to work independently.



Preferred Qualifications:

3+ years of experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts, with a focus on PPC, keyword research, and listing optimization.

In-depth knowledge of Amazon advertising tools, including Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display.

Experience with international Amazon marketplaces (UK, Canada, etc.) is a MUST.



Schedule is 9AM-6PM PST

title: HIRING: VIDEO EDITOR (FULL-TIME) Base Salary + Performance Bonuses | Long-Term Growth
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video / per concept

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



Huge bonus: If you can also create banging static ads, that’s a massive plus. Bonus points if you have:

Graphic design experience

A strong eye for statics, headlines, and layouts

Experience making static ads that convert



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. No guarantees, no rushing. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The real opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

 “I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have static ad / graphic design experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you. 

Speak soon, Karos

mber.

title: Virtual Insurance Quoter (Sales-Focused)
description:
We are building a high-performance quoting team inside a fast-growing insurance operation. This is not a passive data-entry role. This is a structured, conversion-focused position for professionals who understand insurance, love sales, and know how to move a homeowner from inquiry to serious buying intent.



You will speak with inbound homeowner leads, gather accurate underwriting information, prepare competitive quotes, and warm-transfer qualified prospects to licensed sales agents for closing.

This role does not involve providing licensed advice, coverage recommendations, or binding coverage. You will operate strictly within quoting and information-gathering guidelines.



Your job is simple in principle:

Move leads from interest to qualified buying intent — compliantly and efficiently.



--Who This Role Is For--

This position is for professionals who:

* Have prior experience as an insurance quoter

* Have a background in sales, telemarketing, or high-volume phone environments

* Understand homeowners insurance terminology and underwriting basics

* Know the difference between quoting and licensed advisory conversations

* Are disciplined enough to stay within compliance boundaries

* Thrive in phone-based environments

* Care about accuracy, speed, and performance

* Want to be part of a structured, process-driven growth team

If you are uncomfortable on the phone, unclear on insurance jargon, or dislike performance metrics, this is not the role.



--Compliance Boundaries--

This is a non-licensed quoting support role. You will:

* Gather property and underwriting information

* Generate and review quote figures

* Present quote pricing and factual coverage data

* Transfer prospects to licensed agents for advice, coverage interpretation, endorsements, binding, or complex discussions



You will not:

* Recommend specific coverages

* Provide legal or insurance advice

* Bind policies

* Modify coverage beyond quoting parameters

* Understanding and respecting these boundaries is mandatory.



--Core Responsibilities--

1. Lead Engagement & Qualification

* Contact inbound homeowner leads quickly (speed is critical)

* Build rapport and credibility within the first few minutes

* Ask structured underwriting questions confidently

* Collect accurate dwelling, loss history, and risk information

* Identify high-intent prospects



2. Quote Preparation

* Enter precise data into quoting systems

* Generate homeowners insurance quotes

* Review coverage amounts and pricing for accuracy

* Ensure underwriting details are complete and compliant



3. Quote Presentation & Warm Transfer

* Present pricing clearly and professionally

* Create urgency without overstepping into advisory territory

* Pre-frame the licensed agent for a smooth handoff

* Transfer qualified prospects live to closing agents

* Provide clean internal notes for efficient closing



4. Follow-Up & Pipeline Movement

* Follow up with und
 prospects

* Reactivate previous quote inquiries

* Use structured scripts for consistency

* Maintain consistent activity and pipeline organization



--Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)--

* Speed to contact

* Quote completion rate

* Transfer rate to licensed agents

* Data accuracy

* Follow-up consistency

* Compliance adherence

This is a performance-driven environment. High performers are rewarded.



--Required Experience--

* Prior experience as an insurance quoter (homeowners preferred)

* 1+ year in sales, telemarketing, or high-volume call environments

* Strong understanding of homeowners insurance terminology

* Familiarity with underwriting questions and quoting workflows

* Clear understanding of compliance limitations in non-licensed roles

* Comfortable handling high call volume

* Strong objection-handling skills

* Clear, confident English communication

* Experience working remotely

* Familiarity with CRM systems



--Preferred Experience--

* Direct homeowners insurance quoting experience in U.S. markets

* Experience working alongside licensed agents

* Property & Casualty insurance familiarity

* Inbound lead conversion experience



--Skills & Traits We Value--

* Confident communicator

* Naturally persuasive yet compliant

* Detail-oriented

* Organized

* Fast and accurate data entry

* Resilient under pressure

* Coachable

* Competitive mindset

* Structured and disciplined



--Work Setup Requirements--

* Reliable high-speed internet

* Quiet, professional home office

* High-quality headset and microphone

* Ability to work U.S. business hours



--What You’ll Gain--

* Work inside a structured, scalable insurance funnel

* Develop elite phone communication skills

* Exposure to high-volume homeowners insurance quoting

* Performance-based growth opportunities

* Long-term remote opportunity inside a growing operation



--Compensation--

* Competitive base compensation

* Performance incentives based on quoting and qualified transfer metrics

* Growth opportunities as the team scales





To fast track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."



IMPORTANT REMINDER: To advance in the screening process, you must submit the Podio Form. Timely completion is essential to guarantee your application receives prompt attention.



Podio Form Link: 
/webforms/

title: Virtual Probate Paralegal
description:
We are seeking an experienced Probate Paralegal to support the firm in administering and managing probate matters from case opening through final closing. This role requires someone highly organized, detail-oriented, and experienced in probate procedures who can work independently while maintaining clear communication with attorneys, staff, and clients.

The ideal candidate has significant hands-on probate experience, understands court procedures and deadlines, and can confidently manage multiple cases while ensuring compliance and accuracy throughout the probate process.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Probate Case Management

* Manage probate matters from initial filing through final closing

* Track case progress and ensure all steps in the probate process are completed

* Maintain organized digital case files and documentation

* Coordinate with attorneys regarding case status and next steps



2. Drafting & Filing Probate Documents

* Draft probate pleadings and supporting documentation

* Prepare filings for submission to the appropriate courts

* Assist with petitions, inventories, accountings, and other probate-related filings

* Ensure documents are accurate, complete, and filed in a timely manner



3. Calendar & Deadline Management

* Maintain accurate calendaring of probate deadlines and court requirements

* Track filing deadlines, hearing dates, and court timelines

* Proactively remind attorneys of upcoming deadlines and required actions



4. Communication & Coordination

* Communicate professionally with clients, courts, and internal staff

* Provide updates regarding probate case progress

* Assist with gathering information and documentation required for probate matters



5. Administrative & Legal Support

* Maintain case management systems

* Assist attorneys with probate case preparation

* Ensure documentation and filings follow proper legal procedures



Required Qualifications:

* Minimum 5 years experience as a Paralegal or Legal Assistant specializing in Probate

* Strong knowledge of the probate process from case opening to final closing

* Experience drafting probate pleadings and legal documents

* Familiarity with probate court filing procedures and requirements

* Experience tracking probate deadlines and managing legal calendars

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

* High level of attention to detail and organization

* Ability to manage multiple cases simultaneously



Preferred Qualifications:

* Experience working with U.S. probate law firms

* Experience using legal case management or document management systems

* Familiarity with court e-filing systems



Ideal Candidate:

* The ideal candidate is:

* Highly organized and detail oriented

* Experienced in managing probate cases independently

* Proactive in tracking deadlines and next steps

* Professional and clear in communication with attorneys and clients





To fast track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."



IMPORTANT REMINDER: To advance in the screening process, you must submit the Podio Form. Timely completion is essential to guarantee your application receives prompt attention.



Podio Form Link: 
/webforms/

title: Project Manager (Digital Marketing)
description:
Job Description: Marketing Project Manager (Agency / Traffic Coordinator)

Employment Type: Full-Time (M-F; 9AM - 5PM EST)

Location: Remote



Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced Marketing Project Manager for one of our clients in the digital

marketing space.



This role is responsible for overseeing the planning, execution, and delivery of marketing and

advertising projects across multiple clients. The ideal candidate combines strong project

management expertise with a deep understanding of marketing workflows, and thrives in a fastpaced agency environment.



This position also functions as a Traffic Coordinator, ensuring efficient workflow management across

internal teams, freelancers, and client stakeholders.



Key Responsibilities

Project & Workflow Management

• Manage multiple client projects from brief through to delivery

• Develop and maintain project timelines, task allocations, and deliverables

• Coordinate resources across creative, content, paid media, and development teams

• Ensure deadlines are met and proactively manage risks or delays

• Maintain and optimise project management systems (ClickUp, Asana, Monday, etc.)



Traffic Coordination

• Oversee daily workflow and prioritisation across internal teams

• Ensure all briefs are clear, complete, and aligned before execution

• Track progress of active projects and manage inter-team handovers

• Identify capacity constraints and flag resourcing requirements



Client Management

• Serve as a key point of contact for assigned clients

• Lead regular status updates, check-ins, and project communications

• Translate client requirements into clear internal briefs

• Manage expectations around timelines, deliverables, and revisions



Campaign & Marketing Oversight

• Oversee execution of marketing campaigns across digital channels (social, paid media,
,

web)

• Ensure all deliverables align with campaign objectives and brand strategy

• Collaborate with internal teams to maintain quality and consistency

• Support reporting processes and timeline tracking for campaigns



Quality Control & Delivery

• Review deliverables before client submission to ensure accuracy and quality

• Ensure adherence to brand guidelines and campaign objectives

• Manage revisions, approvals, and final delivery processes



Key Requirements

Experience

• 3–6+ years experience in a marketing or advertising agency environment

• Proven experience in project management and/or traffic coordination

• Strong understanding of digital marketing workflows



Skills

• Strong organisational and time management skills

• Excellent communication and client-facing ability

• Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

• High attention to detail and quality control

• Experience with project management tools (ClickUp)



Technical / Marketing Knowledge

• Understanding of marketing deliverables (campaigns, content calendars, ad creatives,

landing pages)

• Familiarity with digital platforms (Meta Ads, Google Ads, LinkedIn,
 marketing tools)

• Basic understanding of performance tracking and reporting



Preferred Attributes

• Experience working with remote or distributed teams

• Ability to operate in a fast-paced, high-growth environment

• Proactive, solutions-driven mindset

• Strong coordination and leadership ability



Success Metrics (KPIs)

• Projects delivered on time and within scope

• Client satisfaction and retention

• Improved internal workflow efficiency

• Reduction in delays and operational bottlenecks



Role Impact

This role plays a critical part in ensuring seamless project delivery, strong client relationships, and

efficient internal operations — ultimately driving the overall success and scalability of the agency.



For serious applicants, please submit the following:

- Updated CV

- Intro Video

- Whatsapp Number (for screening)

title: QA Engineer (Typescript / Next.js)
description:
We're looking for a skilled full stack QA engineer to help us maintain and improve our startup's core platform. This role is heavily focused on detecting bugs and system issues, managing a support engineer, as well as larger ongoing feature development.



Must haves:

- Great communication skills to describe bugs or new features and how to work on larger projects

- Excellent experience with Typescript, Next.js, React.js, and PostgreSQL

- Experience using AI coding tools (like Cursor, ChatGPT, Claude Code, Copilot, etc.) to speed up debugging and development workflows

- Excellent debugging skills and the ability to quickly understand and navigate large codebases

- Confident building, testing, and deploying software locally

- Comfortable creating and iterating on pull requests on GitHub



Nice to haves:

- Good eye for design and good UI/UX design for businesses

- Habit of writing tests for your fixes and changes

- Previous startup experience



To apply:

- Message me on WhatsApp at +1 (908)
with your resume, GitHub, and any relevant projects or websites.

- In order to get selected, you MUST write "Social media agency" in your message along with the process below:



The process:



Step 1 — Async QA & Bug Review:

We want to see how you identify issues in real code. Please complete the following:

1. Review the git diff for a recent onboarding branch:



2. Test the live onboarding flow here:





Send us a write-up that includes:

- Any code-level issues you find in the diff (bugs, logic errors, missing edge cases, etc.)

- Any UX issues you find while testing the onboarding flow (broken interactions, confusing copy, layout problems, accessibility concerns, etc.)

Please send this along with your resume. If you do not send this, your application will NOT be considered.



Step 2 — Live Coding:

- A quick 30 min live coding test with me — a simple JavaScript question where you'll walk me through your approach.



Step 3 — Final Round:

- Async code review plus a short call with my colleague, where we'll discuss your experience and show you some sample code from our codebase.



If accepted, there is a paid trial where you work on features immediately.

title: Customer Service Manager (eBay & E-commerce Sales) Long Term
description:
**Customer Service Manager (eBay & E-commerce Sales) – Long Term Career Role Remote**

**Pay:** $5/hour + **$2 per order closed** + performance bonuses



About the Role



We are an e-commerce company selling automotive wheels (rims) online.



We are hiring a **Customer Service Manager (eBay & E-commerce Sales)** to manage customer conversations, resolve issues, and help convert inquiries into orders. Our tea
mbers join our company and we help them build careers. 



This role covers both eBay and our website, with the primary focus on **eBay as you learn and train.**



This is not passive customer service. This is a **sales and problem-solving role.**



You will be handling conversations all day — answering questions, solving problems, and guiding customers toward decisions.



Important (Read Carefully)



This role requires:



• Responding to customer messages within **5 minutes**

• Strong written English (we will also provide you with templates)

• Attention to detail

• Ability to follow systems and templates

• A sales mindset (not passive support)



You are expected to actively monitor messages during your shift.

Delayed responses or missed messages are not acceptable.



Schedule



This role is **5 days per week** during your assigned shift.

(Weekend coverage will be handled separately as the team expands.)



Shifts are based on Eastern Standard Time (EST):



• Shift 1: **7:00 AM – 3:00 PM EST**

• Shift 2: **3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST**



You will be assigned one consistent shift.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



• Responding to customer messages quickly and professionally

• Guiding customers toward purchasing decisions

• Answering fitment questions using our systems

• Handling customer issues and resolving them using our solution templates

• Taking full ownership of conversations from start to finish

• Solving problems efficiently without unnecessary escalation



How You’ll Work



We will train you on **exactly what to say and how to respond.**



We already have **100–200 proven templates** for common questions.



Your role is to:



• Identify the type of question

• Select the correct response

• Adjust it slightly if needed

• Send quickly and clearly



You are not expected to guess. You are expected to follow the system and execute at a high level.



Training



You will receive **paid training over the course of 2 weeks to 1 month**, where you will learn:



• How to answer fitment questions

• How to use our systems and templates

• How to communicate clearly, confidently, and naturally



Work Expectations



Some days will be busy with a high volume of messages, while other days will be slower.



Regardless of volume, you are expected to:



• Remain available during your shift

• Respond to all customer messages within 2–5 minutes

• Stay organized and consistent



This role includes both active work and standby time. During slower periods, you are still expected to remain available and ready to respond quickly whenever a message comes in.



How This Role Works



• You can use your phone or computer — all communication is via messaging

• **Your phone is your main tool — you do not need to be on a computer at all times**

• You must be able to respond quickly while maintaining accuracy and professionalism



This role is ideal for someone who is comfortable working evening hours or is naturally a night owl.



Ideal Candidate



• Strong English communication (Intermediate required)

• Experience in customer service or sales

• Fast and reliable internet

• Detail-oriented and organized

• Calm, clear, and confident communicator

• Strong problem-solving ability

• **Experience leading a team (preferred)**



We are looking for someone who can communicate **smoothly and naturally — not robotic or overly scripted.**



This role has growth potential. We are looking for someone who can eventually **lead and manage a team of customer service representatives** as the company scales.



Bonus (Not Required)



• Experience with eBay

• Experience with automotive parts or wheels (**strong asset**)

• Sales or closing experience

• Experience handling high message volume



Compensation



• $5/hour base

• **$2 per order closed from conversations you handle**

• Performance bonuses based on responsiveness and results



This is a long-term role. Strong performers will earn more as volume increases.



---



To Apply



Please submit the following:



**1. Your relevant experience**



* Customer service, sales, or managing a team



**2. Your resume (Google Doc preferred)**



**3. A short explanation of why you would be a great fit for this role**



---

?

title: Trainerize Assistant Coach (Online Fitness Coaching)
description:
THE ROLE

We are hiring a remote Trainerize Assistant Coach to work directly under the head coach. This is a full-time support role with daily responsibilities across client communication, meal plan management, and workout program updates inside Trainerize.

This is NOT a passive role. This is a high-output, daily-execution position. If you are looking for something to do a few hours a week, please do not apply.



DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES

Client Messaging (Every Day)



Reply to all client messages in Trainerize within the same business day, no exceptions

Send proactive check-in messages to clients who have not logged their workouts or meals

Provide accountability, encouragement, and coaching feedback on client logs

Escalate complex questions to the head coach with a clear summary of the situation

Flag any client who has gone silent for 48 or more hours

Maintain a professional, warm, and motivating tone in all messages



Meal Plan Updates (Every Day)



Review client food logs daily and make calorie or macro adjustments as directed

Update meal plan templates based on client preferences, allergies, and schedule changes

Ensure every active client has a current, up-to-date meal plan at all times

Flag clients who are consistently under- or over-eating and summarize for the head coach

Document all plan changes with a brief note for full head coach visibility



Workout Program Updates (Every Day)



Update client workout programs daily based on progress, injuries, equipment, or head coach direction

Swap exercises, adjust sets, reps, and load based on client feedback and logged performance

Keep programming at least one full week ahead for every active client at all times

Follow the specific exercise formatting and naming conventions used in PEAK Physique programs

Flag clients who are consistently skipping sessions or showing signs of overtraining



Progress Tracking



Log and organize weekly check-in data including weight, measurements, and progress photos

Prepare weekly progress summaries for the head coach

Monitor adherence metrics and alert the head coach to any at-risk clients

Maintain accurate, organized client notes inside Trainerize



Admin and Onboarding Support



Onboard new clients into Trainerize following the PEAK Physique checklist

Ensure client profiles, goals, and program assignments are correct from day one

Attend a weekly video call with the head coach for updates and priorities

Complete additional tasks assigned by the head coach within the agreed scope





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Prior experience with Trainerize or a similar coaching platform (required)

Background in fitness, nutrition, or personal training (strong preference)

Excellent written English communication skills

Ability to work independently and meet daily deadlines without being followed up on

High attention to detail. One missed message or incorrect macro update can cost us a client

Reliable internet connection with consistent availability during your working hours

Coachable. You will receive direct, honest feedback and you are expected to implement it quickly

Experience with online coaching or remote client support is a strong plus





SCHEDULE

This is a full-time remote position. Your working hours must overlap at least 2 hours with US Pacific Time between approximately 8 AM and 6 PM PST. You must check in and respond to clients at least twice per day. Daily availability is non-negotiable.



COMPENSATION

Competitive for a Philippines-based remote role. Details discussed during the interview. Performance bonuses available based on client retention and satisfaction.



HOW TO APPLY

Your message must begin with the exact phrase from the top of this post. Then include:



A 2 to 3 sentence summary of your fitness coaching or nutrition background

Your experience with Trainerize or similar platforms

A written response to this scenario: A client messages you saying they skipped 3 workouts this week because they were stressed at work. What do you say to them?

Your availability and time zone

Any relevant certifications (CPT, nutrition, etc.)



We are looking for someone who takes pride in their work, loves fitness, and wants to grow inside a fast-moving coaching brand long term. If that is you, we want to hear from you.

title: Revenue Manager / Executive Assistant
description:
EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT

Halo Hospitality · Knoxville, Tennessee · Full-Time Remote (Eastern Time Zone)

Short-Term Rental Property Management · 70+ Properties

Type: Full-Time, Long-Term | Pay: $800–$1,200/month USD | Hours: 40 hrs/week, Mon–Fri | Reports To: Founder/Owner



ABOUT HALO HOSPITALITY

Halo Hospitality is a full-service vacation rental management company based in Knoxville, Tennessee. We manage 70+ short-term rental properties, handling listing optimization, dynamic pricing, guest communication, housekeeping, and maintenance for property owners across the Knoxville market. We are a founder-led company growing quickly and investing in the systems, tools, and people that will take us to the next level.



THE ROLE

We are hiring an Executive Assistant to work directly with the founder. This role exists to make him more effective — by owning revenue management, taking responsibilities off his plate as they come up, and driving new initiatives from start to finish.

Our Director of Operations runs the day-to-day business. This role is different. You work with the founder on the things he is personally responsible for — strategy, growth, pricing performance, and building new parts of the business. When the leadership team needs support on a project, you step in. When something new needs to be built, you own it.

About half your time will be structured (revenue management is a daily responsibility). The other half is dynamic — reactive to what the business needs that week. You need to be comfortable with both.



RESPONSIBILITIES

REVENUE MANAGEMENT (~15-20 hrs/week — Your Anchor Responsibility)

This is your most consistent daily function. You own pricing performance across the portfolio.



- Monitor the portfolio daily in Wheelhouse — flag pricing gaps, underperforming listings, and rate anomalies (Then fix whatever issues you uncover)

- Maintain the key date calendar — Peak weekends, local events, holidays, and high-demand periods — and ensure rates reflect them

 - Build and maintain a revenue budget for each listing, and ensure targets are hit. 

 - Help grow distribution channels, and optimize each listing per channel

 - Audit and improve listing copy, photo placement, ensure consistency and accuracy of listings accross each distribution channel

 - Build listing proforma's for new prospective owners

- Own Direct Booking growth initiatives (Guest marketing)

- Optimize website, and booking engine for direct bookings. 



EXECUTIVE SUPPORT (Daily)

You keep the founder organized, informed, and moving.



- Handle personal assignments as needed — research projects, ad hoc requests

- Assist with implementation of new tools (we're working on a lot of AI projects, and you need to be eager to assist and build)

- Regularly review of business functions, and proactively work on ways to improve what you see. 

- Review business reporting and flag irregularities and inconsistencies (then dig and and find out what's going on)

- Check-in with tea
mbers to see what you can help them with. 



GENERAL BUSINESS SUPPORT (As It Comes Up)

Employees and leadership will bring questions and problems. You handle what you can, escalate what you should.



Troubleshoot tool and automation issues — coordinate with software vendors on bugs, outages, or configuration problems



Handle miscellaneous operational tasks as they surface — parking research for new listings, Google Drive cleanup, software setup, accounting reconciliation questions



Serve as a communication bridge between the founder and the team when he is unavailable



PROJECT OWNERSHIP (Ongoing)

When new initiatives launch, you quarterback them. You take it from "we should do this" to "done."



Own the implementation of new software tools end-to-end — research, setup, onboarding, documentation

Build and maintain SOPs and internal process documentation as the company grows



Support owner acquisition efforts — proposals, outreach materials, and follow-up coordination

Assist with marketing initiatives — content creation, social media scheduling, and campaign support



Support financial modeling and analysis as needed — compiling data, formatting pro formas, researching comps





WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT



This is NOT a daily operations role — that's our Director of Operations

This is NOT a customer service role — though you'll fill in when needed 

This is NOT a task-runner position where you wait to be told what to do





WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Beyond skills, we are hiring for character. The right person is:



Hardworking and sees things through — you take ownership, close the loop, and don't let things stall on your end

Positive and solutions-oriented — you bring energy to the team and focus on fixing problems, not dwelling on them

Proactive — you anticipate what's needed and flag issues before they become problems

Trustworthy — you will handle owner financials, guest data, and sensitive business information; discretion is non-negotiable

Eager to learn — this role will evolve and you embrace new tools and responsibilities without resistance

A strong communicator — your written English is professional and clear; you represent the company in everything you send

Comfortable with ambiguity — some weeks are structured, some weeks a new priority lands Monday morning; you handle both





REQUIREMENTS

Required:



Excellent verbal and written english proficiency



Comfortable with regular phone and video conference conversations. 



2+ years supporting a founder, executive, or business owner in a virtual EA or operations role

Experience in short-term rental management, property management, or hospitality — you must know the industry

Experience communicating with guests, property owners, and employees professionally

Understanding of revenue management fundamentals — occupancy, ADR, RevPAR, dynamic pricing

Excellent written English

Proficiency with Google Workspace — Gmail, Calendar, Docs, Sheets

Reliable high-speed internet, dedicated workspace, and availability overlapping US Central Time (9am–3pm CT minimum)



Preferred:



Hands-on experience with Hostaway or a comparable PMS (Guesty, Lodgify, OwnerRez)

Experience with Wheelhouse, PriceLabs, or Beyond Pricing

Comfortable using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) for drafting, research, and analysis

Experience with Canva and Meta Business Suite

Familiarity with automation tools — Zapier, Make, or similar

Experience managing or contributing to software implementation projects





COMPENSATION



Pay: $800–$1,000/month USD based on experience

Bonus incentives for hitting Revenue Management Targets

Full-time, 40 hours/week, Monday–Friday

Must overlap with US Central Time (9am–3pm CT minimum)

90-day performance review with raise potential for strong performers

Long-term role — we want to build with the right person

Candidate provides own computer and high speed internet

title: Regulatory Affairs Document Specialist
description:
Offshore Contractor 

Working hours for this role are 8:00 am to 5:00 pm PST



Regulatory Affairs Document Specialist



About Us



We are a Los Angeles-based international beauty manufacturer/distributor. We create on-trend, innovative, and value-driven beauty products for the top retailers in the world. We are an entrepreneurial company where ideas and creativity come to life!



Role Overview

The Offshore Regulatory Affairs Document Specialist ensures that cosmetic products comply with global regulatory requirements by managing product registrations for the EU, UK, US, and other international markets. This includes preparing and submitting necessary documentation, verifying labels and formulations, and supporting internal teams to meet compliance and launch deadlines.



This position reports to the International Product Registration Supervisor.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Product Registration Management:

o Prepare Documents for submission to the Cosmetic Product Notification Portal (CPNP) for the EU.



2. Regulatory Compliance Documentation:

o Compile, and prepare the required documents for submission to complete:

? Product Information Files (PIFs).

? Cosmetic Product Safety Reports (CPSRs).

? Safety Data Sheets (SDS).

? Certificates of Analysis (COAs).



3. Packaging Label and Artwork Review

o Verify product labels and artwork for compliance with local regulatory requirements.

o Check ingredient lists, product claims, and Responsible Person (RP) details for accuracy.

o Coordinate with Marketing and Design teams to resolve any discrepancies.



4. Customer and Internal Support

o Respond to requests for regulatory documents requests, such as SDS and Certificates of Free Sale (CFS), from customers and distributors.



Qualifications

• Minimum 3 years of experience in regulatory compliance and product registration, preferably in the cosmetics industry.

• Knowledgeable with international regulatory affairs and be able to prepare documentation & communicate with international agencies

• QA / QC External/ Internal Audit Product Review/Release

• Technical Writer. Good oral and written communication skills

• Document Control/Batch Records/Ingredients

• Cosmetic ingredient knowledge, INCI

• Must have Microsoft Professional edition software skills

• Must have project management skills

• Proficient in MS Access and Excel

• Document editing skills a plus

title: Ecommerce Email Designer - Contractor
description:
Ecommerce
 Designer

Contractor

Remote



Job Overview:

We’re looking for a strong
 Designer with ecommerce experience to help refresh and elevate our
 marketing creative. Our team supports 25 direct-to-consumer websites across multiple beauty brands and
 is one of our most important revenue channels. We’re looking for someone who can bring fresh ideas, modern design, and a strong understanding of what drives clicks and conversions in
. This is a very hands-on role. You’ll design campaigns, experiment with new layouts and visual approaches, and help improve the overall quality of our
 creative. You’ll also collaborate with our offshore design team and help bring new ideas that elevate the work across the group. 



Key Responsibilities:

• Design promotional, campaign, and lifecycle
s for our ecommerce brands.

• Create modern, engaging
 layouts and graphics that highlight products and drive clicks and conversions. 

• Work closely with marketing and ecommerce teams to translate campaign concepts into strong visual design.

• Prioritize work across multiple brands and focus creative attention on the campaigns with the biggest revenue Opportunity.

• Collaborate with our offshore design team and help elevate the overall quality of
 creative.

• Help evolve
 templates and reusable modules so campaigns can be produced faster and more consistently.

• Occasionally design supporting assets for site promotions or landing pages.



Required Skills:

• 4 to 5 years of design experience, ideally with ecommerce or retail brands, ideally beauty, fashion, or lifestyle.

• Good understanding of
 design best practices (mobile layouts, hierarchy, readability).

• Ability to work quickly and manage multiple campaigns at once.

• Excellent communication skills with strong cross-functional collaboration abilities with a global team.

• Proficiency in Figma, Photoshop, or similar design tools.

• Familiarity with Klaviyo or other ESPs. 

• Experience creating GIFs or lightweight motion graphics and a basic understanding of HTML
 structure.

• English C1 highly desired. 



How to Apply:

Please include a link to your portfolio or work samples. We’d also love to see 3 to 5 examples of marketing
s you designed that you feel performed well. We receive a high volume of applications, so submissions without work samples may not be reviewed.

s of the Shopify stores.

title: Assistant for US Law Firm
description:
Case Assistant Wanted – Discovery Preparation, Client Communication, Call Routing, Administrative Support

You will be doing a variety of tasks, all of which will have clear instructions and processes for you to follow.

1. Send day-of-court reminders to clients

2. Monitor call logs and route calls to the correct tea
mber using MyCase

3. Request and prepare discovery documents for attorney review



Pay Rate:

To Be Determined — based on experience and skill level



I am looking for a full-time employee.



Perks:

>Work remotely

>Flexible vacation, all of our employees have paid time off

>Opportunity for growth, bonuses, and increased responsibility based on performance

13th month bonus - you will get an extra month’s pay at the end of the year, which will be prorated depending on how long you have been with the firm

>If you love American legal or police TV shows, you will really like this job.



About Us:

We are a criminal defense firm with 2 offices and are quickly growing. We focus heavily on communication and helping our clients navigate the complicated legal system. Your duties will involve a key milestone in our client experience process.



To Apply for the Job:


 me at 

>Make the subject line:

 "I Want to Work for You [Insert your name here] – Legal Assistant"

>Go to https://www.speedtest.net and take a screenshot of your results and attach it to the
.

>At the top of your message, write responses to the following questions:

  1. Why are you interested in this role?

  2. Describe a time you had to manage multiple tasks that required strong attention to detail.

  3. How do you ensure you stay responsive and do not miss messages or tasks during work hours?

  4. What experience do you have with handling calls, messages, or client communication?

  5. Have you used any CRM or case management systems (like MyCase)? If yes, explain.

  6. Do you enjoy legal, crime, or police-related shows? If so, which ones? (Not required—but we’ve found people who do tend to enjoy reviewing discovery ????)

7. How many hours are you available to work each week?

8. Complete the tasks on this sheet, download it, and attach the sheet to your




 



Make sure to follow all the steps above. This is a great opportunity with room for growth, so I will only review applications from candidates who follow directions carefully.



Do not write more than what is requested above. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.



Thanks,



Heather

title: E-commerce Funnel builder dropshipping shopify
description:
We are looking for an experienced Funnel Dropshipping Specialist who understands the full A-to-Z process of setting up and running high-converting funnels. You will be responsible for building and integrating every step of the funnel, including product creation in Shopify and seamless integration with Funnelish. Also must be good with copywriting.



Responsibilities:



Build complete dropshipping funnels from scratch (A-Z)



Create and manage Shopify products with optimized descriptions and images



Connect Shopify with Funnelish and ensure smooth integration



Set up upsells, downsells, and automation within Funnelish



Troubleshoot technical issues and optimize funnel performance



Work closely with our team to implement effective funnel strategies



Proven experience with funnel-based dropshipping



Strong understanding of Shopify and Funnelish platforms



Ability to work independently and deliver results quickly



Attention to detail and problem-solving skills



Basic knowledge of conversion optimization and CRO best practices is a plus



Build 1 funnels per day



What You Get:



Performance-based bonuses – earn more based on the sales and results your funnels generate



Growth opportunities – long-term potential to grow with the brand and team



Be part of a fast-moving and supportive environment where results are rewarded

title: COLD CALLER — B2B HEALTHCARE AI
description:
COLD CALLER — B2B HEALTHCARE AI (Remote, Philippines)



$5/hr + commission on qualified meetings!



This is NOT a customer service job. This is NOT a virtual assistant role. This is SALES.



We need someone who gets on the phone, handles objections, pushes past "not interested," and books meetings with C-suite executives at US healthcare companies. You'll be calling VPs, Directors, and CFOs on their direct cell phones — not hiding behind
s.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

• Make
+ outbound calls per day using our auto-dialer

• Pitch our AI automation platform to healthcare executives

• Handle objections confidently — "not interested" is where the real conversation starts

• Book qualified meetings on our founder's calendar

• Drop pre-recorded voi
s and move to the next call

• Track every call outcome in the system



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

• Auto-dialer with power dialing — no manual dialing

• Pre-built call lists with direct phone numbers (no switchboards)

• Call scripts and objection handling playbooks

• Voi
 drop system — one click, move on

• Full training on our product and pitch

• Weekly PayPal payments ( no exceptions)



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU:

• Confident, natural English — no heavy accent

• Sales experience — cold calling, telemarketing, or appointment setting

• Thick skin — you'll get hung up on 50 times a day and keep smiling

• Competitive — you want to book more meetings than anyone

• Reliable internet and quiet workspace

• Available 4-6 hours/day during US business hours (9am-5pm EST)



DO NOT APPLY IF:

• You've never made a cold call before

• You take rejection personally

• You need to be told what to say when someone pushes back

• You're looking for easy money



HOW TO APPLY:

Send a 60-second voice recording of yourself pitching this:



"Hi [Name], I'm calling from [Company]. We help healthcare organizations automate their revenue cycle using AI — prior authorizations, claims denials, insurance verification. One of our clients went from a 10% to 90% approval rate. Worth 15 minutes to see if that could work for your team?"



If your recording doesn't sound confident and natural, don't bother sending it. We'll know in 10 seconds if you're the right fit.



PAY:

• $5/hour base

• Commission on every meeting booked

• Top performers earn $8-12/hour with commissions

• Weekly PayPal payments

• Start immediately

title: Ecommerce video editor
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video / per concept

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



Highly valued skills:

- Graphic design experience. A strong eye for statics, headlines, and layouts. Experience making static ads that convert

- AI UGC: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Nano Banana

Candidates with either of these skill sets will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. No guarantees, no rushing. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The real opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

“I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have static ad / graphic design experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you.

Speak soon, Karos
