title: Real Estate Admin - AppFolio Experienced
description:
**Please ONLY apply if you are an expert in AppFolio.**



About Us / Our Culture



Blackacre Manaement, our company, we value a culture that is fast, smart, and solution-oriented. We move quickly, think critically, and always look for ways to make processes smoother and more efficient. We believe in accountability, clear communication, and delivering excellent service to our tenants. If you thrive in a high-energy, detail-focused environment and take pride in getting things done right the first time, this role is for you.



Core Responsibilities:



Handle tenant communication via phone,
, and tenant portal, addressing inquiries, complaints, and updates.



Answer all phone calls during work hours and cover the emergency line after hours.



Manage work orders: review requests, assign to maintenance, follow up, and record proof of completion.



Maintain the rent roll by tracking all payments, due dates, and delinquencies.



Issue nonpayment notices and violation notices to tenants as necessary.



Post weekly rent for salon tenants in the system accurately and on time.



Maintain tenant files by ensuring all documents (leases, IDs, forms) are updated, complete, and organized.



Track maintenance schedules and coordinate vendor visits.



Assist with move-ins and move-outs, including inspections, paperwork, and coordination with tenants.



Support creation of tenant communications for events, policy updates, or announcements.



Maintain a daily and weekly log of all communications and actions for accountability and tracking.



Escalate urgent issues to the Property Manager immediately!!! 



Prepare basic reports for property owners as requested, including occupancy and delinquency summaries.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):



Response time to tenant inquiries



Accuracy and completeness of work order management



Timeliness of rent postings and tenant notices



Organization and maintenance of tenant files and records

title: Experienced Medical Coder/Biller
description:
Overview:

Please note this is not a job that can be done with another job as it is not an easy, "cruising" job. If you are looking to have this as a 2nd or 3rd job, this is not the right fit for you so please do not apply. And if you are looking for an easy, data entry job, this is not the right fit for you. This is a job that will help you learn and grow for those looking to further advance themselves as a biller for a long term career that will eventually become a lucrative and rewarding one. If you are interested in investing your career as a professional biller, please send a message with your resume, intro video, and phone interview availability. When sending a message expressing your interest, please add to the subject line at the end, what is your favorite hobby that you enjoy during your free time.

We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Medical Coder/Biller/Account Administrator to join our team. While prior billing is not a requirement, we will prioritize and prefer candidates who have had prior medical billing experience. Pay rate will also be reflective of this. 



In this role, you will be responsible for managing client accounts, ensuring accurate record-keeping of billing claims, and serving as the primary point of contact for patients with billing and account questions/concerns. Compensation is DOE or raises will be given according to how quickly one learns and starts contributing to the role with autonomy. 



Responsibilities:



Manage and maintain patient accounts, including billing, collections, and payment posting

Prepare and submit insurance claims accurately and on time.

Monitor accounts receivable and follow up on unpaid claims or balances.

Communicate with patients regarding billing inquiries, payment plans, and insurance coverage. Educate them on how insurance billing works and resolve all accounting issues.

Maintain accurate and confidential patient financial records in compliance with HIPAA.

Collaborate with front office staff, providers, and insurance companies to resolve account or billing issues.

Generate reports related to billing and collections as needed.

Collaborate with internal teams to ensure patients' accounts are in good standing, follow up for payment as necessary.



Requirements:



Experience in account management or administrative support roles not necessary, willing to train the right candidate if there is eagerness to learn.

Proven strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word) & Google Sheets, Gmail

Ability to work independently as well as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.

Attention to detail and a commitment to delivering high-quality work.

Job Type: Full-time

title: Manager of Content and Marketing
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented, tech-savvy Operations & Marketing Content Manager to support day-to-day business operations while driving digital marketing efforts and content execution.



This position is perfect for someone who can effectively manage systems, run marketing campaigns, produce high-quality content, and ensure operations stay organized and efficient. The ideal candidate is both strategic and execution-focused — able to plan initiatives while also bringing them to life.



You should have a strong understanding of what makes content successful, why it resonates, and how to scale it across multiple platforms while maintaining smooth backend operations.



This is a fast-paced role best suited for someone who thrives in a dynamic environment, is highly organized, and is comfortable navigating multiple tools and platforms.



Key Responsibilities



Marketing Campaign Management



Oversee and execute marketing campaigns across platforms such as Meta 
 & Instagram), Google, YouTube, and others



Develop, launch, and optimize paid advertising campaigns



Support lead generation strategies and broader digital marketing initiatives



Track campaign performance and provide insights for optimization

mbers on marketing initiatives

Platforms

 / Meta Ads

title: Video Editor For Ecommerce Agency
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce agency in year 7 that helps brands scale through high-converting UGC and paid social content. We need another Video Editor who can keep up with the pace and bring fresh ideas every single day.



Why You'll Love This Job:



- Work on content for multiple exciting e-commerce brands across different niches

- Creative freedom to execute your own ad concepts, not just follow briefs

- Clear systems and briefs to keep your workflow organized and efficient

- Long-term role with real room to grow as the agency scales



What You'll Do:



- Complete 2-3 video edits per day across UGC and Meta ad formats

- Execute creative briefs with fast turnaround and strong attention to detail

- Develop your own ad concepts and bring creative ideas to the team

- Add captions, transitions, and hooks that stop the scroll

- QA your own work before submission (typos, pacing, formatting, all of it)

- Collaborate with the creative strategy team to continuously improve performance



Who We're Looking For:



- Experienced in video editing for Meta, TikTok, or UGC content (1+ year minimum)

- Fast, reliable, and able to hit a consistent daily output

- Strong creative instincts with an eye for what performs in e-commerce

- Detail-oriented and self-managing

- Great written English communication skills

- E-commerce or DTC background is a strong advantage



Hours & Location:



- Remote

- Full-time (~40 hours/week)

- Must be available during North American business hours for team communication



Looking forward to meeting you!

title: UGC Creator Operations Manager (Email + Campaign Coordination)
description:
We’re a fast-growing e-commerce agency going into year 7 that helps brands scale with high-quality, results-driven user-generated content (UGC). In 2026, we’re doubling down on this service. We need an operations superstar to keep everything running smoothly.



Why You’ll Love This Job:



* Be at the center of campaigns for multiple e-commerce brands

* Clear systems, templates, and processes to make your work smooth and organized

* Grow into a leadership role in operations or team management

* Take ownership of campaigns and see the direct impact your work has on client success



What You’ll Do:



* Manage automated outreach campaigns to creators

* Track creator responses, engagement, and availability

* Keep campaigns on schedule and manage deadlines

* Coordinate shipping and delivery of products and content

* QA content for completeness and formatting

* Maintain updates in systems and communicate progress to the team



Who We’re Looking For:



* Experienced in project management (mandatory), preferably with exposure to Meta advertising or e-commerce campaigns

* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Strong written English communication

* Comfortable managing multiple moving pieces and deadlines

* Able to follow SOPs and frameworks consistently

* Motivated to contribute to the growth of the team and clients



Hours & Location:



* Remote (Philippines)

* Full-time (~40 hours/week)

* Flexible to align with North American time zones for updates



Looking forward to meeting you!

title: Notion Project Manager / UGC Systems Builder (Short-Term Project)
description:
We’re an e-commerce agency building a Notion system to manage our UGC (user-generated content) production workflow for multiple brands. The workflow is defined, we just need someone to turn it into a clean, scalable, and easy-to-use Notion workspace.



This is a one-time project, not a long-term role.



Why This Project Is Great:



? Build a fully structured Notion system from scratch

? Get creative with dashboards, workflows, and video tracking

? Work directly with the founder on a clear, high-impact project

? Short, focused, and highly visible work



What You’ll Do:



- Build Notion databases for:

    - Brands

    - Campaigns / Monthly UGC batches

    - Individual videos

    - Creative Tracker / Script Tracker (including video type, format, script scenes, shot type, audio, and selling blocks)

- Connect databases with relations and rollups

- Create dashboards and views for different roles (Owner, PM, Creative Strategist)

- Ensure the system is intuitive, scalable, and easy to maintain

- Implement both structured (direct-response style) and flexible (casual/influencer style) briefing formats



Requirements:



- Strong experience building systems in Notion

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and efficient

- Able to follow written or Loom-based instructions accurately

- Experience with project management or content workflows is a plus

- Comfortable building dashboards and tracking systems for multiple users and roles



Project Details:



- Short-term project (a few days, fixed deliverable)

- Remote

- Immediate start



Looking forward to meeting you!

title: SEO Content Writer – 10 Articles/Week (Human-Written, No AI Content)
description:
SEO Content Writer – 10 Articles/Week (Human-Written, No AI Content)



I run a portfolio of niche websites and I'm looking for a skilled SEO content writer for an ongoing, long-term role. This is consistent, well-paid work for the right person — but the bar is high.



If you generate articles with ChatGPT and lightly edit them, this is not the job for you. I will know.



---



What the role involves:



• 10 fully researched, human-written articles per week

• Topics will vary by niche — you need to be comfortable researching unfamiliar subjects thoroughly

• Full SEO optimisation on every article using Semrush (keyword research, on-page structure, search intent matching)

• You may use AI tools to help with outlining, keyword clustering, or research direction — but every word published must be written by you

• Articles should read with a clear voice, genuine insight, and zero filler



---



What "quality" means here:



• Strong hook that earns the reader past the first paragraph

• Clear structure with headers that reflect real search intent, not just keyword stuffing

• Cited sources and original research where relevant

• Conclusions that actually conclude something — not "in summary, we covered..."

• Passes a human reading test: would a real expert in this niche find this useful?



---



You're the right fit if you:



• Have 2+ years writing SEO content professionally

• Know Semrush well — keyword difficulty, SERP analysis, content gap, on-page SEO checker

• Can hit 10 well-researched articles a week consistently (not occasionally)

• Take pride in writing that doesn't sound like every other article on the topic

• Can show me samples where you can explain your research and SEO decisions behind them



---



To apply, you must include:



1. Two writing samples with a brief note on the SEO strategy behind each — what keyword you were targeting, why, and how you structured the article around search intent

2. Your honest weekly output capacity for fully researched articles

3. Confirmation that you write every article yourself (AI for outlines only)

4. Answer to this question: What does blue and yellow combined make>



No samples = no response. Generic applications will be ignored.



---



This is a long-term role with growing volume as the portfolio expands. Writers who perform well will have consistent work and first access to new site projects.

title: UGC Creator Finder
description:
We’re looking for a reliable UGC Creator Finder to help us discover talented creators for our clients’ brands.



Why Join Us:



* Consistent work and reliable hours.

* Positive, supportive team environment

* Opportunities to expand your role over time



What You’ll Do:



* Find qualified UGC creators who match specific brand guidelines and audiences.

* Gather and organize their contact information and social media profiles.

* Communicate and collaborate with the team through Slack.

* Follow clear criteria and processes provided before starting (we’ll teach you exactly what to look for).



Who We’re Looking For:



* Detail-oriented with a strong eye for quality content.

* Enjoys researching and finding the right people for the job.

* Open to feedback and eager to improve.

* A strong communicator who can stay organized and consistent.





If this sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Video Editor for Meta Ads
description:
Hey future editor!



We’re looking for a skilled Video Editor to create engaging short-form videos for Meta Ads 
/Instagram). You should:



    Be comfortable working with B-roll and sourcing clips to support videos.

    Know how to choose the right clips, pacing, and structure to capture attention.

    Add captions, transitions, and motion graphics that elevate the final product.



Trial Period:

This role starts with a skills test project to evaluate your abilities. If you excel, you’ll have the opportunity to join our team long-term.



Requirements:



    Experience with Meta Ads video editing.

    Proficiency in editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro).

    Strong sense of storytelling, pacing, and video optimization.

    Ability to create videos that stand out and make people stop scrolling.



Starting Gig Based: $25-35 per video (around 60 seconds). After trial period will bring on monthly basis.



How to Apply:

Send your portfolio, a short intro about yourself, and examples of Meta Ads you’ve worked on, and share your favorite color.



We’re excited to see your work!

title: Video Editor — Meta Ads
description:
We're hiring a video editor to create short-form ad content for Meta 
/Instagram). 



Videos are roughly 60 seconds, built to convert. You'll own the full edit — sourcing B-roll, pacing, captions, motion graphics, voiceover, all of it.



We don't just need someone who can stop the scroll. We need someone who keeps people watching. Every clip has to be relevant, every cut intentional. If the pacing is off or the B-roll doesn't match the message, viewers bounce — and the ad dies.

This isn't an entry-level gig. We want someone who delivers consistent quality with minimal revisions, takes feedback well, and doesn't repeat mistakes.



You should have:

Proven experience editing Meta ads. Proficiency in Premiere, Final Cut, DaVinci, or equivalent. A clear understanding of proper English — grammar, tone, how real people actually talk. Ability to create realistic AI voiceovers that sound authentic, not robotic or scripted. Working familiarity with AI B-roll tools like Veo. A clear understanding of what makes a good ad — not just a good edit.



Pay:

$35–50 per video. Starts gig-based with a skills test. Strong performers move to a monthly retainer.



How to apply — read this carefully:

Record a selfie-style video introducing yourself, then show your editing setup with your software open to a real project from your portfolio. Also send your portfolio, examples of Meta ads you've edited, and your favorite color.

We watch every submission. Show us why you.



?? APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A VIDEO SUBMISSION WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED.

title: Customer Service & Operations Specialist
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Customer Service & Operations Specialist to join our team. This dual-purpose role is the engine of our daily workflow, ensuring that our customers receive their orders on time and our financial records remain precise. You will be responsible for the entire life cycle of an order—from the 
nt it’s placed to the 
nt the final payment is reconciled.





Core Responsibilities:



Order Fulfillment and Shipping



• Label Creation: Manually create and print shipping labels accurately using carrier platforms (UPS, FedEx, USPS, etc.).

• Order Processing: Manage daily incoming orders, ensuring precise picking, packing, and dispatch coordination.

• Logistics Tracking: Monitor outbound shipments from dispatch to final delivery; maintain organized records of tracking numbers and manifests.

• Problem Solving: Act as the primary point of contact for carriers to resolve delays, lost shipments, or claims.

• Internal Synergy: Coordinate with Sales and Inventory teams to ensure all orders are shipment-ready and complete.



Invoicing and Billing



• Revenue Management: Generate and issue invoices immediately upon shipment confirmation based on sales orders and contracts.

• A/R Management: Monitor accounts receivable aging and proactively follow up on overdue accounts via phone and
.

• Reconciliation: Apply customer payments and reconcile transactions within the accounting system to maintain up-to-date account logs.



Reporting and Process Improvement



• Performance Metrics: Submit weekly reports on A/R status, invoice volume, and shipment summaries.

• Administrative Support: Assist in month-end close activities and provide necessary documentation for audits.

• Optimization: Identify bottlenecks in the shipping or billing workflows and recommend efficiency improvements.



Qualifications



• Education: Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Accounting or a related field.

• Professional Experience: 5+ years of proven experience in logistics, order fulfillment, or a specialized role combining operations and billing

• Technical Skills: Proficiency in shipping software and basic accounting/ERP software.

• Attention to Detail: High level of accuracy in data entry; a "measure twice, cut once" mentality.

• Communication: Strong professional verbal and written communication skills.

• Organization: Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment without letting tasks fall through the cracks.

• Problem-Solving: A proactive approach to resolving shipping discrepancies and billing disputes.



Schedule & Requirements



• Working Hours: 8:00 AM CST – 5:00 PM CST (Monday – Friday)

• Availability: Must be able to maintain consistent attendance during these core business hours to ensure daily shipping deadlines are met.

title: Amazon PPC Analyst (Entry-Level, Growth Track)
description:
We are a growing eCommerce brand hiring a full-time Amazon PPC Analyst to support and grow our internal advertising efforts.



This is a long-term role (45 hours/week, U.S. Eastern Time) focused on structured, data-driven Amazon PPC execution. The position begins with hands-on daily monitoring and optimization tasks and is designed to grow into greater ownership and responsibility over time.



We are looking for someone analytical, disciplined, and comfortable working with numbers and spreadsheets on a daily basis.



What You’ll Be Doing



Daily monitoring of Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Brands, etc.)



Reviewing search term and performance reports



Updating and organizing performance data in Excel



Making structured bid and budget adjustments based on data



Using tools such as Amazon Ads, Helium 10, and Scale Insights



Following defined optimization frameworks and documenting decisions



Over time, strong performers will take on more responsibility and begin managing specific SKUs with increasing independence.



What This Role Is Like



Analytical and data-focused



Structured and process-driven



Repetitive at times, especially in the beginning



Results build over weeks and months, not overnight



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with numbers, improving systems, and seeing steady performance growth over time.



Requirements



Available 45 hours per week, U.S. Eastern Time (mandatory)



This must be your only job



Basic understanding of Amazon PPC fundamentals (courses required)



Comfortable working with spreadsheets daily



Detail-oriented and process-driven



Clear written English



Stable internet connection with backup power



Interested in a long-term role (not short-term freelancing)



Important



Training is structured and feedback-heavy during the first 30–60 days. We are building long-term tea
mbers who want to grow within one brand environment.



Application Questions (Required)



Please answer clearly and directly:



Why does a 45-hour/week, long-term Amazon PPC role appeal to you?



What part of Amazon PPC or data work do you expect to find most challenging?



Rate your experience (0–5) with:



Amazon Seller Central / Amazon Ads



Helium 10



Scale Insights



Excel



If a campaign’s ACoS increases significantly over 7 days while sales stay flat, what would you check first?



Confirm that this will be your only job and that you can commit to 45 hours per week, U.S. EST.



How to Apply



Short introduction



PPC courses taken



Answers to the questions above



Resume (required)

title: real estate
description:

Title: Property Management Bookkeeper: Reconcile 1 Year of Payments (Rent Manager to TenantCloud)



Project Overview:

I am looking for a detail-oriented bookkeeper or property management specialist to clean, migrate, and reconcile one year of rental payments. The goal is to ensure that all historical payment data from my Rent Manager bank records is accurately reflected and reconciled within TenantCloud.



Scope of Work:



Data Export: Export 12 months of payment history, tenant ledgers, and bank activity from Rent Manager.



Data Cleaning: Format the data to match TenantCloud’s import requirements (Excel/CSV).



System Import: Accurately upload tenant payments and opening balances into TenantCloud.



Bank Reconciliation: Use TenantCloud’s reconciliation tool to match the imported transactions against bank statements to ensure a $0 discrepancy.



Audit: Flag any missing payments or double entries from the past year.



Requirements:



Proven experience with Rent Manager and TenantCloud.



Strong understanding of property management accounting (Lease ledgers, security deposits, and ACH/check posting).



Expertise in Excel (VLOOKUPs/Data cleaning).



High level of confidentiality and attention to detail.



Timeline: 1-2 weeks.

Budget: Please provide your fixed project fee or hourly rate.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview: 



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office. 



 

Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 

About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.

mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Experienced Business Funding VA (0% Credit Card Stacking & High-Limit Approvals)
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S.-based business funding company helping entrepreneurs access $50K–$250K+ in 0% business credit and strategic financing.



We are looking for a highly experienced Virtual Assistant who understands business funding at a deep level — not just processing applications, but structuring profiles for maximum approvals.



This is NOT an entry-level position.



You must have real experience funding clients through major U.S. banks and lenders.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



• Structuring and processing 0% business credit card applications

• Managing client funding strategy (stacking 3–5 cards strategically)

• Working with major banks including:

• Chase (Ink, Unlimited, etc.)

• American Express (Business Gold, Platinum, etc.)

• Bank of America

• Wells Fargo

• U.S. Bank

• Truist

• Understanding underwriting guidelines and approval data points

• Advising on credit profile positioning (utilization, inquiries, age, etc.)

• Managing reconsideration calls if needed

• Processing personal funding applications (personal loans, credit cards, etc.)

• Tracking approvals, limits, and optimizing stacking sequence

• Communicating professionally with clients







Required Experience



You MUST have:



Proven experience funding U.S. business owners

 Experience with 0% interest credit card stacking

Knowledge of high-limit approval strategies

Understanding of credit profile optimization

Experience handling reconsideration calls

Familiarity with lender underwriting data points

Experience processing personal loans & personal credit cards

Strong understanding of credit utilization, inquiries, tradelines, and FICO impact



If you have never funded clients before — do NOT apply.



What We’re Looking For



We want someone who:



• Thinks strategically

• Knows how to maximize approvals

• Understands lender psychology

• Can identify weak profiles before submission

• Knows which banks pull which bureaus

• Understands timing between applications

• Knows how to avoid triggering fraud flags



This role requires deep knowledge — not just admin support.

Brand Managers own the relationships at our agency. It’s your job to make customers like us while delivering our team’s accurate non-stop activities.

- Manage clients' accounts assigned. The Brand Manager will act as the direct point of contact for the client, responsible for coordinating MAGs services, implementing strategy, communicating with clients, direct reports, and leadership.

- 2+ Direct Reports. In addition to client services, this position is also a managerial position, and following the completion of training, brand managers will be expected to lead a small team of Amazon specialists, who will assist the manager with delivering MAG services to the client.

- Brand managers are the company's backbone, directly responsible for our client accounts.

- Proactively provide a strategy for the account, communicate with the client, and ensure MAG process and deliverables are met.

- Delegate tasks properly to your direct reports and the MAG teams, follow up on delegations, hold staff accountable, and report back to the client.



Qualifications:

- Amazon Expertise: 1+ year with Seller Central (flat files, FBA, PPC, SEO, reinstatements, brand registry, Helium10, keyword research).

- Agency & Management: Experience handling multiple demands, leading teams, hiring, and performance management.

- Project & Client Management: Skilled in multitasking, project management, client communication, and account ownership.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable with tools like Zoom, Slack, Asana, and adapting in fast-changing environments.

- Passion for eCommerce: Independent, people-focused, and driven to grow client sales on Amazon.



Expectations:

- Competitive salary!

- Fun Fully Remote Culture – Community Culture, Team Oriented Environment

- You can have your OWN Amazon selling business and utilize company resources to build your own account! We love and ? encourage entrepreneurs, in fact, the majority of employees have their own selling accounts!

- Unlimited Learning and Growth – If you meet and exceed our core values and grow sales, you will have unlimited opportunities to grow, advance, promote, and earn more.

- 40 hours a week, 8 hours a day

- Permanent WFH setup

- The work schedule is in Eastern Standard Time (Monday to Friday only)

- A dual-monitor setup is required (at least 8GB of RAM)

- Good quality camera and microphone

- Must have at least 25 MBPS internet speed

- Must consistently maintain good performance and seek skills development for professional growth.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





AMAZON BRAND MANAGER INTERN



Want to catapult out of that “Walmart uniform” and into a world of digital marketing?



We're hiring a Brand Manager Intern at our agency. If you're a tech-savvy gamer who thrives amidst organized chaos, then you are the one that we are looking for!



We will train you how to manage people effectively, communicate better with clients, and navigate tools such as Slack smoothly, while you work at home on your computer. You also get to learn how to sell on Amazon which is the number 1 wealth generation platform in the USA for beginners.

Yes, it's challenging. Yes, it's exciting. Yes, it could be the start of your new career!



We will train you on everything. MAG is an education company and we find it’s easier to find the right culture fit and then train the skills than the other way around.

So what are you waiting for? Toss away that nametag and make the switch today.

title: Outbound Sales Development Representative & Business Development Representative
description:
OUTBOUND SALES DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



This role is strategically focused on generating new business opportunities through targeted outbound outreach. The Outbound SDR serves as the first point of contact for potential clients, identifying prospects, initiating conversations, and driving them into the sales pipeline. You will manage outbound campaigns, conduct personalized outreach, and build strong engagement with high-value leads. This position requires strong persistence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build effective processes for high-touch outbound engagement.



Goal:

To create a steady flow of qualified outbound opportunities by identifying, engaging, and advancing potential clients into meaningful sales conversations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Outbound Prospecting: Identify and target potential clients through
, calls, and social outreach to generate qualified leads for the sales team.

- Personalized Outreach: Create tailored messaging for specific industries, decision-makers, or company profiles to increase engagement and response rates.

- Pipeline Generation: Build and maintain a strong pipeline of outbound leads, ensuring consistent activity and follow-ups.

- Lead Qualification: Evaluate outbound prospects to ensure alignment with service offerings and pass qualified opportunities to the sales team.

- Collaboration With Sales & Marketing: Work closely with sales to refine ideal client profiles and with marketing to improve outbound messaging and campaign performance.

- CRM Management: Keep detailed, accurate records of outreach activity, follow-ups, and prospect interactions within the CRM.

- Process Building & Optimization: Develop, refine, and scale processes for efficient and high-touch outbound engagement.



Qualifications:

- Experience in outbound sales, lead generation, or a similar role is preferred.

- Strong organizational skills with excellent attention to detail.

- Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding outreach and pipeline targets.

- Advanced knowledge of HubSpot preferred; experience with other CRM tools is a plus.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

- Motivated self-starter with the ability to work independently and drive tasks forward.

- Comfortable with leadership, taking initiative, and improving workflows.

- Strong interpersonal skills: able to communicate value clearly, handle objections, and build rapport during outbound conversations.

- Has a history of building processes around high-touch outbound client engagement.





--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



Do you enjoy doing sales while collaborating with people? How about doing content on TikTok, Instagram, or on Loom? Can you express yourself fluently in English? If you said yes to all three, My Amazon Guy has the perfect job offer for you!

title: Marketing Systems & Growth Architect

This is a systems-first, hands-on role responsible for transforming our CRM and marketing automation ecosystem into a clean, scalable, revenue-driving engine. This is not a brand marketing or campaign execution role. This is a technical marketing systems leadership position focused on structure, integrity, and long-term scalability.

- Align marketing automation with sales handoffs and outbound outreach

- Prevent overlapping messaging and ensure accurate intent-driven actions

- Standardize tracking, UTMs, and attribution across marketing and sales platforms

- Improve visibility into MQL ? SQL ? Opportunity progression and reporting accuracy

- Reduce unnecessary broadcast activity and reporting ambiguity

- Comfortable enforcing governance and setting system standards

title: Senior Developer & IT Documentation Specialist
description:

We are looking for a Senior Developer who is a versatile, all-around technical expert capable of managing end-to-end development of systems, applications, and web platforms. The ideal candidate thrives in a remote, collaborative environment and is comfortable supporting cross-functional teams with both front-end and back-end solutions, system integrations, automation, and technical troubleshooting.

mbers, document workflows and technical tools, and support ad-hoc tasks to improve team efficiency and continuity.

- Experience with APIs, database integration, and automation tools (Zapier, HubSpot, Airtable).

Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in IT, computer science, or other relevant fields

- Exceptional communication capabilities, both written and verbal

- Ability to multitask and prioritize

- Proven ability to understand and write technical documents

- In-depth knowledge of IT systems and processes

- Proficient with Microsoft Office, G Suite applications, and computer security systems

- Proficient with, or able to quickly become proficient with, a range of general and specialized applications, software, and hardware used in the organization and the industry.

- Expert in problem-solving, critical thinking, and an understanding of complex system dependencies

title: Creative Generalist & Creative Strategist
description:
CREATIVE GENERALIST



We’re hiring a Creative Generalist with strong design and video editing chops to produce compelling visual assets for our paid media campaigns, landing pages, and brand communication. This hybrid role supports 2–3 DTC brands to start and is perfect for someone who thrives on fast-paced creative production, balancing aesthetics with performance goals. You’ll be responsible for creating everything from static ads and animated social assets to UGC edits and conversion-driven landing page graphics.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design static, motion, and video ad creatives for Meta, TikTok, and Google

- Edit high-performing UGC ads with strong hooks, CTAs, captions, and transitions

- Repurpose testimonials, reviews, and influencer content for paid and organic use

- Create
, SMS, and promotional visuals aligned with brand identity

- Stylize social proof assets (e.g., screenshots, quotes) into branded, engaging formats

- Follow platform-specific best practices for ad creatives

- Ensure design supports performance goals like ROAS and CAC

- Maintain brand consistency across diverse formats and placements

- Collaborate with media buyers, marketers, and creatives to meet campaign goals

- Stay current with trends in ad design and DTC creative performance



Qualifications:

- At least 2 years of experience in graphic design and video editing for digital marketing.

- Advanced skills in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects).

- Proven experience creating high-converting static and motion ads for Meta, TikTok, or Google.

- Strong eye for layout, color, typography, and brand consistency.

- Experience editing UGC and social proof content for performance-driven campaigns.

- Able to follow creative briefs, meet tight deadlines, and collaborate well with remote teams.

- Portfolio demonstrating versatility across static design, motion, and video editing.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





CREATIVE STRATEGIST



The Creative Strategist will own the research, ideation, and optimization of creative assets across paid ads,
/SMS, landing pages, and UGC. They'll translate brand goals, market data, and consumer psychology into briefs, scripts, and testing roadmaps, partnering with designers, editors, media buyers, and UGC creators to execute.



This role focuses on conversion optimization and creative direction — guiding creative generalists, reviewing and approving output, and ensuring all creatives are aligned with CRO goals. The strategist does not handle direct web design, but must have strong CRO experience to boost campaign effectiveness.



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze client creative performance, benchmark competitors, and identify positioning and messaging opportunities across the full funnel.

- Develop creative roadmaps for DTC brands, concept new hooks and angles, and build testing frameworks across multiple ad formats.

- Create detailed UGC briefs, collaborate with creators through production, and curate social proof for ads and owned channels.

- Partner with media buyers and cross-functional teams to ensure creative aligns with funnel stages, KPIs, and brand standards.

- Guide creative generalists and support
/SMS and CRO-focused landing page strategy without executing web design.

- Track and interpret performance data, document insights, and iterate continuously to optimize campaigns.

- Present strategies, testing plans, and performance recaps to clients and internal leadership to support retention and revenue goals.



Qualifications:     

- Proven experience in Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and creative strategy for digital marketing.

- Ability to analyze creative performance metrics and translate data insights into actionable design or messaging improvements.

- Strong leadership and feedback skills to guide generalists and align creative output with performance goals.

- Ability to drive creative decisions that enhance campaign effectiveness and conversion rates.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

title: Assistant Client Coordinator (Remote – U.S. Business Hours)
description:

We are partnering with a growing U.S.-based home care agency dedicated to delivering compassionate, reliable care to clients in their homes. We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Assistant Client Coordinator to join the team remotely from the Philippines as an Independent Contractor.



Role Overview:

As an Assistant Client Coordinator, you will support administrative and coordination functions related to client services, ensuring accurate documentation, system updates, and operational tracking. This role helps maintain continuity of services while reducing administrative burden on Client Managers and Coordinators. The position requires working U.S. business hours to support real-time coordination and service efficiency.

Update client profiles and service records in home care systems (WellSky/Personal Care)

Support overall coordination processes to ensure continuity of care services

Phone intake for private paying clients, book in-person assessments

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Ability to work consistently during U.S. business hours

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, dedicated workspace

Commitment to being part of a small, growing remote team

Agrees to undergo HIPAA and Cybersecurity training





What We Offer:

Opportunity for bonuses based on performance

Remote work with flexible but consistent U.S. hours

A supportive team environment focused on growth and quality care

title: Credit Repair & Business Funding
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S.-based business funding company helping entrepreneurs access $50K–$250K+ in 0% business credit and strategic financing.



We are looking for a highly experienced Virtual Assistant who understands business funding at a deep level — not just processing applications, but structuring profiles for maximum approvals.



This is NOT an entry-level position.



You must have real experience funding clients through major U.S. banks and lenders.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



• Structuring and processing 0% business credit card applications

• Managing client funding strategy (stacking 3–5 cards strategically)

• Working with major banks including:

• Chase (Ink, Unlimited, etc.)

• American Express (Business Gold, Platinum, etc.)

• Bank of America

• Wells Fargo

• U.S. Bank

• Truist

• Understanding underwriting guidelines and approval data points

• Advising on credit profile positioning (utilization, inquiries, age, etc.)

• Managing reconsideration calls if needed

• Processing personal funding applications (personal loans, credit cards, etc.)

• Tracking approvals, limits, and optimizing stacking sequence

• Communicating professionally with clients







Required Experience



You MUST have:



Proven experience funding U.S. business owners

Experience with 0% interest credit card stacking

Knowledge of high-limit approval strategies

Understanding of credit profile optimization

Experience handling reconsideration calls

Familiarity with lender underwriting data points

Experience processing personal loans & personal credit cards

Strong understanding of credit utilization, inquiries, tradelines, and FICO impact



If you have never funded clients before — do NOT apply.



What We’re Looking For



We want someone who:



• Thinks strategically

• Knows how to maximize approvals

• Understands lender psychology

• Can identify weak profiles before submission

• Knows which banks pull which bureaus

• Understands timing between applications

• Knows how to avoid triggering fraud flags



This role requires deep knowledge — not just admin support.

title: Clinical Operation Support Admin
description:
ABOUT 10X HEALTH SYSTEM

10X Health System is a pioneering company at the forefront of the health and wellness industry, dedicated to revolutionizing the way individuals approach their personal health and well-being. With a philosophy rooted in the principle that optimal health is the foundation for a life lived to the fullest, 10X Health provides cutting-edge solutions and personalized health plans designed to empower individuals to achieve and maintain peak physical and mental performance.



The company's comprehensive approach to health combines the latest advances in medical science, nutrition, fitness, and technology to offer a suite of services that include state-of-the-art diagnostic testing, individualized treatment protocols, and ongoing support from a team of world-class health professionals. 10X Health's commitment to innovation and results has established it as a leader in the health optimization space, catering to those who strive to push the boundaries of what is possible in their health journey.



POSITION SUMMARY

The Clinical Operations Support Admin plays a critical role in supporting daily clinical operations and ensuring seamless coordination across departments. This individual will be cross-trained in both clinical support functions and operational workflows to provide flexible, high-impact assistance to the Clinical Operations team. This role requires strong attention to detail, systems proficiency, and the ability to manage multiple moving pieces in a fast-paced healthcare environment. The ideal candidate thrives in structured processes while remaining adaptable to evolving operational needs.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Support daily clinical operations, including lab order management, medical records coordination, and internal medical case requests

• Complete pre-charting data entry prior to provider encounters to ensure charts are accurate and encounter-ready

• Assist with post-encounter documentation, including transcription of medication instructions

• Provide scheduling and patient coordination support, including appointment management, calendar adjustments, appointment confirmations, and reminders.

• Collaborate cross-functionally with clinical, scheduling, and administrative teams to ensure a seamless patient experience



COMPETENCIES

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• High level of accuracy in documentation and data entry

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and shifting priorities

• Clear and professional communication skills

• Systems proficiency (EHR, CRM, scheduling platforms, Microsoft Office/Google Workspace)

• Process-oriented mindset with ability to follow SOPs

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive medical information

• Collaborative and team-oriented approach



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Experience in healthcare, medical administration, or clinical operations preferred

• Familiarity with lab coordination, medical documentation, or scheduling workflows preferred

• Experience working within EHR systems strongly preferred

• Strong technical aptitude and ability to learn new systems quickly



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, 10X Health System recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Experienced Graphic Designer (Social Media & Brand)
description:
About the Role:



We’re a pet care brand focused on delivering a high standard of service and experience.



For us, design isn’t just about making things look good.

It’s how we communicate trust, care, and professionalism to every pet parent we reach.



Every post and material we put out reflects a brand that values clarity, intention, and consistency. We don’t do cluttered, overdesigned, or trend-chasing graphics.



We’re looking for a designer who understands that strong design is simple, intentional, and consistent.



This is a project-based role to start, giving both sides a chance to see if we fit and align for longer-term collaboration.



If you’ve worked with brands before — and you care about the quality behind what you create — keep reading.



What You’ll Be Doing:



• Designing social media content (carousels, covers, single posts) that are clean, clear, and on-brand

• Turning captions and ideas into visuals that are easy to understand and engaging

• Creating marketing materials (flyers, posters, digital promos, print assets, etc.) that align with the brand

• Following a clear and consistent design direction across all outputs

• Designing for different content needs (educational, promotional, and engaging)

• Maintaining consistency in layout, spacing, and overall visual identity

• Revising designs based on feedback with strong attention to detail

• Delivering work on time and communicating clearly when needed



What You Bring:



• Proven graphic design experience (portfolio required)

• Strong skills in Canva or other editing tools (Adobe is a plus, not required)

• A clean, modern design style — you know when to keep it simple

• Understanding of both digital and print design basics

• Strong attention to spacing, alignment, and readability

• Ability to follow direction while still thinking creatively

• Reliable, organized, and responsive



Bonus If You:



• Have experience designing for pet brands or service-based businesses

• Understand how design supports engagement and conversion



How to Apply:



Please submit:

• Your portfolio with recent or current designs from the accounts you’re currently handling

• Your availability

• Your rate (hourly or per project)



Important: When applying, please include the word “holistic” in your
 subject line so we know you read this job post. Thank you!

- Trend Awareness: Stay updated on the latest design trends and tools to continuously enhance the quality of our work.

- Additional Design Projects: Assist on additional design projects as needed, contributing to a dynamic and creative work environment.



Qualifications:

- Technical Skills: Proficiency with basic and current design tools ( Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, Figma & Photoshop).

- Collaboration Tools: Experience with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides) for collaborative work.

- Communication: Strong communication skills, both verbal and written, in English.

- Efficiency: Ability to work efficiently and meet deadlines while managing multiple projects.

- Attention to Detail: A keen eye for detail and a strong understanding of design principles, including typography, color theory, and layout.

- Availability: Must be available to work Monday to Friday, 9am-5pm CT.







Job Type: Full Time, 20-40 hours per week

Work Location: Remote



Application Process:

Please send your resume, cover letter, and any relevant work samples to 
 with the subject line "Graphic Artist - [Your Name]".



For candidates who are shortlisted, you will receive an
 from us with further instructions. This

As part of the application process, candidates will be required to complete a design skill test. This will help us assess your design capabilities and ensure they meet our standards for quality and creativity.



About the Role:



This role is designed for a skilled Graphic Artist who is passionate about design and eager to contribute to our festive mission. You will be a key player in crafting visual materials that support our marketing and branding efforts, ensuring our holiday displays and services are presented in the best possible light. If you have a creative mind, an eye for detail, and the ability to deliver high-quality work efficiently, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Real Estate Operations Lead
description:
PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.



We are pioneers in how modern real estate companies should be built — powered by strong systems, smart technology, data-driven decision-making, and operational efficiency.



We’re building with intention.

With structure.

With technology at the core.

With performance that compounds over time.



Our goal is to create a brand that sets the standard. A company that leads. A platform built to scale intelligently and sustainably across markets.



And for the right person, this isn’t just a job inside that company.



It’s a front-row seat to its growth.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Role: Real Estate Operations Lead

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Shift: Night Shift — Canada MST

Role Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Compensation: Top-tier salary + performance bonuses + growth-based increases



We believe strong operators deserve strong compensation. If you take ownership and help us grow confidently, you will be rewarded accordingly.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Why This Role Is a Big Opportunity



This isn’t just about processing files.



This is about helping build a company that scales smoothly.



As PropZap expands into new markets and increases transaction volume, you’ll be part of strengthening the operational backbone that allows that growth to happen confidently.



As we grow, your scope grows.



More responsibility.

More visibility.

More leadership potential over time.



If you’re looking for long-term stability and upward movement instead of hopping between short-term roles, this is that kind of opportunity.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities:

You will own and lead the backend operations that power our agents and client experience.

Full Real Estate Operations Leadership (Hands-On)



You will personally execute and oversee:

- Transaction and listing coordination

• Contract preparation, amendments, compliance, and document management

• MLS drafts, uploads, and accuracy checks

• FINTRAC, signatures, deadlines, and audit-ready files

• CRM hygiene, pipelines, task boards, and workflow tracking

• Calendar management, reminders, and operational follow-ups



You will ensure nothing slips, nothing is messy, and everything is executed with precision.



Listing & Marketing Operations:

- Coordinate photos, drone, measurements, floorplans, and virtual tours

• Manage listing timelines, deliverables, and launch readiness

• Prepare polished listing descriptions and marketing instructions

• Oversee signs, lockboxes, open houses, and showing instructions

• Maintain organized listing folders, media libraries, and assets

• Coordinate with marketing vendors and internal resources



Agent & Client Backend Support:

- Act as the primary operational support behind agents

• Communicate professionally with clients, lawyers, vendors, and partners

• Track conditions, deadlines, and next steps

• Ensure agents can focus on selling while operations run flawlessly



Systems, Process, and Scale:

- Maintain clean, reliable, and scalable operational systems

• Identify inefficiencies and proactively improve workflows

• Document processes and help build SOPs as the business evolves

• Support leadership with operational insights and execution

• Assist in hiring, training, and onboarding future operations tea
mbers



Who This Role Is Great For



Someone who enjoys ownership.



Someone who likes being the person everything runs through smoothly.



Someone who wants to grow inside a scaling company.



• Experience in real estate operations (U.S. or Canadian experience is a plus)

• Organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable managing multiple files at once

• Clear and professional communicator

• Proactive and solutions-focused

• Interested in long-term growth



Highly Ideal:

• Experience mentoring others

• Experience improving workflows

• Experience in fast-growing environments



--------------------------------------------------------------



What You Gain



• Above-market compensation

• Performance bonuses tied to impact

• Long-term stability inside a scaling company

• Direct exposure to leadership

• A clear path toward greater operational responsibility

• A role that expands as the company expands



Imagine being two or three years into a company that has expanded across markets — and knowing you helped build the operational backbone that supported that growth.



That’s what this role offers.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Send the following to: 



• Resume

• Portfolio (if available)

• 2-minute intro video introducing yourself

• Summary of your real estate operations experience

• Expected monthly salary (PHP)

• Internet speed test link

• Any DISC test result



Subject Line: Real Estate Operations Lead – Your Name



If you’re ready to grow with a company that’s expanding — and build something meaningful behind the scenes — we’d love to hear from you.

description:
PropZap — Building the Future of Real Estate in North America



PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.



We are pioneers in how modern real estate companies should be built — powered by strong systems, smart technology, data-driven decision-making, and operational efficiency.



We’re building with intention.

)

--------------------------------------------------------------



Who This Is Perfect For



This role is ideal for someone who wants stability with upside.



Someone who wants to stop freelancing unpredictably and build something consistent.

Someone who enjoys ownership and wants their work to matter.



• Proven hands-on experience managing significant Meta Ads budgets

• Strong understanding of direct-response marketing

• Comfortable with analytics and attribution

• Strong copywriting and creative strategy skills

• Structured and disciplined with testing



Highly Ideal:

Bonus If You Have:

• AI tools and automation knowledge

--------------------------------------------------------------



What You’ll Gain



• Premium compensation aligned with performance

• Long-term stability inside a scaling company

• Direct collaboration with founders

• Real ownership and influence over strategy

• Clear path toward leadership

• The ability to grow as the company grows



Imagine being two or three years into a company that has expanded across multiple markets — and knowing you helped build the engine that powered that expansion.



That’s the opportunity here.



We’re building something designed to grow.



If you want your career to grow with it, we’d love to meet you.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Send the following to: 



• Resume (required)

• Portfolio (required)

• Case studies or performance summaries of Meta campaigns (required)

• Intro video (preferred)

• Expected monthly compensation (required)

• Internet speed test link (required)

• Any DISC test result (if available)



Subject Line: Performance Marketing Manager – Your Name



If you’re ready to stop hopping and start building something that scales — this might be the role you’ve been waiting for.

title: Data & Research Assistant
description:
We’re looking for a Data & Research Assistant who enjoys digging for information, organizing details, and turning scattered data into something useful and reliable.

You’ll help verify information, update records, and make sure the data we use is complete and reliable. From time to time, you’ll summarize findings or assist the team by pulling specific data needed for reports or decisions.

What We Offer:

If you like working with information and enjoy keeping things accurate and organized, we’d love to hear from you.

title: AI Influencer Content Producer & Social Strategist
description:
Thank you for taking a look at this job posting. I am a founder of an AI Influencer Content agency. Our top influencer has 1.2M follower across all social media accounts. We are currently a team of 3 people altogether and we're looking to add one more person. This is not a big agency and our culture is friendly, respectful, independent and hard-working. If it sounds like something you'd enjoy and you're qualified for this role, I would love to hear from you. Please read the job posting thoroughly and submit all requirements for the job application. Thank you.



The Mission: We are seeking an intelligent, highly curious, and data-driven AI Influencer Content Producer & Social Strategist. In the rapidly evolving AI landscape, we don't just need a "user" of tools; we need a pioneer who treats every generation as a learning opportunity. You will bridge the gap between technical production and social media growth by managing the end-to-end lifecycle of two AI Influencers (and likely more), ensuring that quality over quantity remains the guiding principle. that said, quantity is still important.



Key Responsibilities

Market & Performance Analysis: Monitor Instagram, X, and TikTok to identify viral hooks and aesthetic trends within the influencer niche.



Data-Driven Production: Analyze post statistics—likes, views, and comment sentiment—to help d
 (along with your sense of what looks good) which content styles to scale and which to pivot.



High-Fidelity AI Generation: Utilize Google Nano Banana Pro (via wavespeed.ai) and KlingAI to create ultra-realistic images and videos.



Continuous Improvement (Kaizen): Apply a Kaizen mindset to every workflow, constantly refining prompts and processes to achieve higher realism and engagement.



Resource Intelligence: Intelligently manage generation credits on Kling and wavespeed.ai to maximize the "hit rate" of successful content.



Post-Production: Use CapCut and visual media tools like Photoshop (or photopea) to polish content, focusing on natural motion, perfect aesthetics, and matching the specific "voice" of the influencer.



AI Collaboration: Utilize team access to Grok and Gemini to refine prompts and brainstorm innovative content strategies.



Candidate Requirements

Aesthetic Excellence & Eye for Detail: You must have a "really good eye" for what looks high-quality and premium. You can spot and fix artifacts, deformities, or "uncanny" AI strangeness before content ever goes live.



Visual Media Proficiency: Experience with tools like Photoshop (or photoea) for image refinement and a tool like CapCut for video editing is essential.



Ownership & Autonomy: You must be a self-motivated, independent thinker who takes full ownership of the role and can operate effectively with minimal supervision.



Coachability: While independent, you must be excellent at taking direction and working diligently to meet specific expectations for both quality and volume.



Radical Open-Mindedness: A "must-have" trait. You must be excited by change and eager to master new tools as the AI market evolves weekly.



Analytical Sharpness: Proven ability to interpret social media metrics and translate those numbers into creative production shifts.





Equipment: Must possess a reliable computer and a stable, high-speed internet connection. Software tools will be provided. Access to your own image and video editing tools is a big plus.



Terms & Compensation



Schedule: Full-time (40 hours per week). One hour per week is reserved for tea
etings.



Output: Focused on quality and performance results; specific volume is undefined to allow for deep-dive production and analysis, although volume is also important.



Compensation: $5.52 USD/hour paid weekly in USDT/USDC cryptocurrency.



Location: Remote



Benefits:



10 paid Philippine Regular Holidays.



Eligibility for 5 days of flexible Paid Time Off (PTO) after 180 days of continuous service.



5 days of Service Incentive Leave (SIL) after one year of continuous service.



Confidentiality: All workflows, assets, and strategies are strictly proprietary and remain the exclusive property of the employer.





How to Apply

To be considered for this role, please submit your application including the following:



Resume: Detail your relevant experience with AI tools and social media strategy.



Portfolio: Provide a portfolio of your work. We are looking for content focused on AI Influencer realism, or at least related content that proves you have the technical and aesthetic skills required for this role. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



The "Stand Out" Question: Answer the question: "Why are you the right person for the job?" Do not just answer this to "check the box." We want to know why you stand out from other candidates. Make it memorable.



Keyword Requirement: Include the word "kaizen" somewhere in your submission. This confirms you have read the entire posting and understand our philosophy of continuous improvement.



Note: Candidates who do not include the word "kaizen" or fail to submit a portfolio and necessary documents, will not be considered.

title: AI Content Production Specialist
description:
Job Title: AI Content Production Specialist

Type: Full-Time

Pay: $5.52/hr



About the Role:

We are seeking a motivated AI Content Production Specialist to create high-quality visual content featuring people. The work involves generating, editing, and post-processing AI images to ensure they are realistic, visually appealing, and ready for distribution across various projects connected to social media accounts with a combined following of over 700K.



This role offers creative control within the provided guidelines, giving you the freedom to make artistic decisions while maintaining consistency with brand standards and project objectives. You’ll be part of a small, collaborative team where mutual respect, communication, and consideration of others’ ideas are valued — a refreshing contrast to large organizations where you can feel like just another cog in the machine.



When there is less active need for content creation, the role will shift toward researching, evaluating, and recommending new AI tools and models that enhance realism and improve the content production pipeline.



Responsibilities:



Generate high-quality AI images of people using A1111 or SDXL-based tools



Apply effective prompting best practices, including the correct use of LoRAs, to achieve realistic and consistent results



Edit and post-process images to professional quality standards



Use Photopea or Photoshop for tasks such as Generative Fill (Magic Replace), Liquify, and other tools



Exercise creative judgment while working within defined guidelines and style directions



Work independently to deliver content that meets established standards and deadlines



Research, recommend, and eventually implement new AI tools or models that enhance realism and improve workflow efficiency, especially during periods of lower content demand



Requirements:



Experience with A1111 and/or SDXL is mandatory



Strong understanding of AI prompting techniques and LoRA integration is required



Proficiency in Photopea or Photoshop is required



Proven experience with AI image generation and post-processing workflows



Excellent eye for detail and ability to produce polished, realistic visuals



Ability to make independent decisions and deliver content that meets project standards



Coachable, eager to learn, and open to improving skills through feedback



Reliable, self-motivated, and able to meet deadlines without supervision



Device and stable internet connection required for remote work



All necessary software tools and access will be provided



Application Instructions:

Please
 your full application to 

 with the subject line “AI Content Production Specialist Application”, and include the following:



Your portfolio that specifically includes work related to creating images of people—from generation to editing and post-processing



Your resume



A brief cover letter explaining why you are the best candidate for this role. Keep it short but make it memorable — show us what makes you stand out.



Include the code “REALVISION2025” at the bottom of your message to confirm you’ve read this job posting in full.



Applications missing any of the above or without relevant portfolio examples will not be considered, as we do not have time to review unrelated work.

title: Admin Assistant
description:
About the Company:

We are a fast-paced e-commerce business specializing in high-quality sneakers and clothing, with a strong presence on platforms like Amazon. We pride ourselves on excellent customer service, fast shipping, and staying ahead of the latest trends. We're looking for a dedicated and organized Virtual Assistant to provide executive support to our team, handling key operations and tasks that keep our business running smoothly.



Job Description:

We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Virtual Assistant to serve as an Executive Assistant for our founder and e-commerce company. The ideal candidate will be highly organized, self-motivated, and have experience in e-commerce and Amazon-related tasks. You will be responsible for a wide variety of administrative and operational duties to support the growth and efficiency of our business.



Responsibilities:

Customer Support & Order Management

Amazon Customer Messages: Responding to customer inquiries and ensuring prompt resolution of issues.

Filing Lost Shipment Claims: Investigating shipment issues and filing claims with carriers or Amazon.

Sourcing Products: Researching potential products to add to the inventory based on trends, sales data, and customer demand.

Find Orders From

title: Account Management Specialist
description:
------------------------------------------------ APPLY THROUGH THIS LINK: 
 ---------------------------------------------



Why Housecall Pro?



Help us build solutions that build better lives. At Housecall Pro, we show up to work every day to make a difference for real people: the home service professionals that support America’s 100 million homes.We’re all about the Pro, and dedicate our days to helping them streamline operations, scale their businesses, and—ultimately—save time so they can be with their families and live well. We care deeply about our customers and foster a culture where our company, employees, and Pros grow and succeed together. Leadership is as focused on growing tea
mbers’ careers as they expect their teams to be on creating solutions for Pros.



Role Overview:



As a Specialist, Account Management, you support the account management team in driving success for our Pros by assisting with account retention, satisfaction, and engagement. You ensure Pros receive timely responses and helpful guidance tailored to their unique needs. You collaborate cross-functionally to solve complex challenges and continuously work to optimize the customer experience. You are eager to learn, quick to adapt, and passionate about supporting others through proactive outreach and problem-solving.



Our team is passionate, empathetic, hard working, and above all else focused on improving the lives of our service professionals (our Pros). Our success is their success.



What you do each day:  



Respond to Pro inquiries via phone,
, or chat to ensure timely support and follow-up

Assist with the execution of renewal and expansion efforts by flagging opportunities to the account management team

Help organize and maintain accurate records in customer relationship management (CRM) tools (i.e. Salesforce)

Monitor account activity and escalate issues or trends as needed

Support preparation for business reviews by gathering key metrics and customer insights

Contribute to the development and improvement of internal processes and documentation

Coordinate cross-functional communication to help resolve account challenges efficiently



Qualifications: 



1+ years of experience in account management, customer success, or sales

Proficiency with CRM systems and customer engagement tools (i.e. Salesforce, Zendesk)

English Fluency

Bachelor’s degree or equivalent work experience a plus

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities

Familiarity with data analysis or reporting tools is a plus

CRM experience is a plus



What will help you succeed in this role:



Enthusiasm for learning and growing within a customer-facing team

Strong communication and interpersonal skills

High attention to detail and a proactive approach to problem-solving

Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams

A customer-first mindset with a passion for improving the experience of our Pros



Founded in 2013, Housecall Pro helps home service professionals (Pros) streamline every aspect of their business. With easy-to-use tools for scheduling, dispatching, payments, and more, Housecall Pro enables Pros to save time, grow profitably, and provide best-in-class service.



Housecall Pro’s brand portfolio includes Business Coaching by Housecall Pro, a business coaching solution for home services businesses. Our brands are united by a singular mission to champion our Pros to success.



We support more than 40,000 businesses and have over 1,800 ambitious, mission-driven, genuinely fun-loving employees across the United States and all over the world. If you want to do work that impacts real people, supported by a team that will invest in you every step of the way, we’d love to hear from you.



Housecall Pro celebrates diversity and we are committed to creating an inclusive environment. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate on the basis of gender, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, disability, gender identity/expression, sexual orientation, veteran or military status, or any other category protected under the law. #LI-remote



Location Dependent Information

This role is open to candidates and the expected salary range for this role is $17,000-$18,900 USD/year. The specific salary for the successful candidate will be determined based on permissible, non-discriminatory factors such as skills, experience, and geographic location. This is a full time contract role.

 ---------------------------------------------

title: Squarespace + Kit VA — Author Brand Site (The Books Are Already Written. The World Needs to Find Them.)
description:
Here is what is happening right now.

A children's book series is sitting in final production. The illustrations are done. The pages are built. The files are at the printer. In less than two weeks, Book 1 goes live on Amazon.

Every book has a QR code in the back.

When a parent finishes reading to their child at bedtime and picks up the book to scan that code — they need to land somewhere. They need to feel something. And they need to hand over their
 address so we never lose them.

Right now that page does not exist.

That is your first job.
