title: Full-Time Advanced AI Visual Artist ($8–$10/hr)
description:
Thank you for taking a look at this job posting. I’m the founder of an AI Influencer Content agency. Our top influencer has 1.2M followers across all social media accounts. We’re currently a team of 4 and looking to add one more person. This is not a big agency — our culture is friendly, respectful, independent, and hard-working. If that sounds like something you’d enjoy and you’re qualified for this role, I’d love to hear from you.



Please read the full posting and submit all requirements listed below. Thank you.



The Mission



We are seeking an intelligent, highly curious Advanced AI Visual Artist with an independent mindset. In the rapidly evolving AI landscape, we don’t just need a “user” of tools — we need a pioneer who treats every generation as a learning opportunity. 

You will take ownership of visual production for 4 proprietary virtual influencers, focusing 100% on advanced content creation. Your work will range from standard content sets for our influencer accounts to highly specific, bespoke visual commissions for our top-tier clients — all while maintaining absolute character continuity across multi-asset projects. While output volume matters, aesthetic perfection and realism remain the guiding principles.



Key Responsibilities



Standard Content Production: Produce consistent, high-quality visual content sets for our influencer accounts on a regular cadence, maintaining character identity and brand aesthetic across all content.



Bespoke Asset Production: Generate highly realistic, specialized visual assets tailored to specific, complex client briefs and custom commission requests.



Character Continuity & Visual Storytelling: Design sequential, multi-asset sets that tell a cohesive visual story while maintaining strict character consistency (facial features, body consistency, structural composition, lighting) across vastly different scenarios.



Advanced Technical Generation: Utilize advanced, specialized workflows (e.g., ComfyUI in Runpod, specific checkpoints, custom LoRAs, and API-based editing tools like Seedream and Flux via cloud platforms) to achieve exact, highly customized stylistic visions.



Tool Evolution: Stay current with the rapidly changing AI tooling landscape. You are expected to actively evaluate, adopt, and integrate new tools and models as relevant ones become available.



Market-Driven Creativity: Anticipate what types of visual scenarios and aesthetics drive the highest engagement and client satisfaction within the custom digital avatar space.



Post-Production Excellence: Polish all raw generations using Photoshop or Photopea to correct structural errors, perfect lighting, and deliver flawless final renders.



Candidate Requirements



Technical Mastery: Expert-level proficiency with advanced AI generation tools and local/cloud-based workflows. You must know how to navigate complex prompting and utilize specialized models to get exact, high-fidelity results.



Aesthetic & Structural Precision: A masterful eye for composition, lighting, and realism. You can spot and fix minute structural details that others miss.



Creative Autonomy (Kaizen Mindset): You are a self-starter who constantly refines your workflows. You know how to build out a cohesive visual project from scratch that perfectly matches a character’s established persona.



Adaptability: Comfort with rapidly evolving tools is essential. You should be eager to learn and integrate new AI models, nodes, and platforms as the space develops.



LLM Familiarity: Working knowledge of LLM tools such as ChatGPT, Gemini, or Grok for prompt crafting, image analysis, and workflow optimization is a strong plus.



Terms & Compensation



Compensation: $8.00–$10.00 USD/hour, commensurate with skill level and portfolio quality. Rate review after 6 months based on performance.



Payment Schedule: Paid weekly in USDT/USDC cryptocurrency.



Schedule: Full-time (40 hours per week). Consistency and reliability are mandatory.



Location & Structure: 100% Remote. Our core team is currently based in the Philippines, which is why our baseline pay and holiday structures are set up accordingly.



Confidentiality: A general acknowledgement and agreement to keep all company assets, workflows, and client data private is required.



How to Apply

Send your application via
 to: 



Ensure your application includes:



Resume/Experience: Detail your experience with advanced AI generation workflows.



Portfolio (CRITICAL): Provide a link showcasing your ability to handle complex posing, character consistency, and specialized stylistic requests. Your portfolio must include realism work. Applications without a relevant portfolio will not be considered.



Why You: Tell us why you are the best candidate for this role. Answer in a way that makes you stand out — show us what makes you unique and why we should choose you over everyone else.



Keyword Requirement: Include the word “kaizen” somewhere in your submission to confirm you’ve read the entire posting.



Top candidates will be invited to complete a paid trial period of up to one week (compensated at the agreed hourly rate), after which a final hiring decision will be made.

title: Senior Recruiter
description:
We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Recruiter to lead and execute full-cycle and strategic recruitment initiatives across a variety of roles within the organization. This role demands not only excellent sourcing and assessment skills, but also a deep understanding of strategic talent acquisition practices—from workforce planning to pipeline development. The Senior Recruiter will partner closely with department heads and senior leadership to build recruitment strategies that align with business goals and support organizational growth.

Key Responsibilities:

Lead and oversee the strategic recruitment process, including proactive talent sourcing, candidate engagement, and workforce planning for both immediate and future hiring needs.

Serve as a consultative partner to department heads and executives, offering insights and solutions to hiring challenges and building long-term recruitment plans.

Conduct job intake meetings with hiring managers to define the ideal candidate profile, assess role criticality, and align on recruitment strategies.

Design and implement targeted sourcing campaigns on platforms like LinkedIn, OnlineJobs, Indeed, and other niche job boards.

Conduct behavioral and structured interviews; assess for both skillset and culture fit.

Review, update, and optimize job descriptions in alignment with market trends and company branding.

Administer hiring assessments and analyze candidate performance against role requirements.

Monitor and report recruitment metrics (e.g., time-to-fill, source effectiveness, conversion rates) to evaluate hiring performance and improve the process.

Mentor and support junior recruiters and recruitment assistants when needed.

Continuously explore and introduce new tools, methods, and channels to enhance recruitment effectiveness and employer branding.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Psychology, Behavioral Science, or a related field.

At least 3- 5 years of proven experience in strategic and full-cycle recruitment, preferably in a remote or international setting.

Strong background in sourcing executive, specialist, and volume positions across various departments.





Demonstrated expertise in using ATS (e.g., BambooHR) and sourcing tools (e.g., LinkedIn Recruiter, OnlineJobs.ph, Indeed).

Proficient in Google Workspace (Drive, Sheets, Docs) and digital collaboration tools.

Excellent interpersonal and communication skills; capable of influencing and negotiating with senior stakeholders.

High degree of initiative and autonomy; able to work independently in a fully remote environment.

Analytical mindset with the ability to use data to drive recruitment decisions

Strong sense of discretion and ability to handle sensitive hiring information with confidentiality.

We have 12+ years of commercial and industrial experience, operating across Florida, Ohio, Texas, and Utah for major national clients. We are in an active growth phase and need a sharp, reliable Virtual Assistant to support our US operations full-time.

Position Overview

We are looking for a highly organized, self-motivated Virtual Assistant to handle daily business development and operations tasks. This is a long-term position with room to grow. You will work directly with the company owner and be a key part of our scaling strategy.

Responsibilities

• Submit vendor portal applications and subcontractor onboarding documents on our behalf

• Conduct outreach via
 and LinkedIn to GCs, project managers, and national clients

• Make outbound cold calls to General Contractors, Project Managers, and national clients to introduce RM Data Telecom LLC and secure work opportunities on platforms including Field Nation, ConstructConnect, and direct accounts

• Follow up by phone with leads generated from
 outreach and vendor portal applications

• Qualify prospects and schedule calls or meetings with the owner for high-value opportunities

• Maintain detailed call logs and update the CRM tracker with all outreach activity daily

• Manage LinkedIn and Google Business Profile — posts, responses, and engagement

• Send review request
s to past and current clients

• Draft professional
s, follow-up sequences, and correspondence

• Research target companies and contacts for outreach campaigns

• Assist with document preparation, data entry, and general administrative tasks

• Complete additional tasks as assigned by the owner

Requirements

• Excellent written and spoken English — professional and error-free

• Prior experience in cold calling, outbound sales, or phone-based client outreach is required

• Strong attention to detail and ability to follow SOPs

title: TikTok Content Researcher & Brief Writer
description:
TikTok Content Researcher & Brief Writer



Type: Part-time, 10-20 hours/week

Pay: $3-5/hr USD (based on experience)

Location: Remote





THE ROLE



We're a content marketing agency that works with consumer apps. Our main client right now is a fast-growing app in the manifestation and spirituality space for women, but we work with other clients too. We need someone who lives on TikTok and understands what makes short-form content go viral.



This role has four parts:



Part 1: Account Monitoring & Content Extraction



We'll give you a list of TikTok accounts to watch. Your job is to:



- Track what they're posting daily (hooks, text overlays, formats, captions, hashtags)

- Identify which videos are performing well and why

- Extract the content formula from high-performing videos (what's the hook, what emotion does it hit, what's the CTA)

- Convert winning formats into content briefs using our template so our creators can shoot their own versions



Part 2: Independent Research & Idea Generation



- Scroll the manifestation, subliminal, love spell, and SP (specific person) niche on TikTok daily

- Find trending formats, hooks, and angles we haven't tried yet

- Surface new accounts worth watching

- Pitch content ideas with a clear explanation of why they'd work for our audience (women 20-35 dealing with breakups, situationships, no-contact, anxious attachment)





Part 3: Cross-Niche Format Hunting



Some of our best-performing content came from taking a viral format in a completely different niche (travel, fitness, finance, dating apps, etc.) and adapting the hook structure and psychology for our audience. Your job is to:



- Watch what other apps and brands are doing on TikTok to market themselves, regardless of niche

- Identify formats, hook structures, and video concepts that are getting views because of how they're made, not what they're about

- Bring those to us with a quick note on how you'd adapt it for our niche (e.g. "this travel app used X hook structure, here's how it could work for manifestation content")





Part 4: On-Demand App & Brand Teardowns



Sometimes we'll send you a specific app or TikTok account and say "break this down." When that happens, your job is to:



- Go through all of their TikTok content and identify their top-performing posts

- Reverse-engineer their full marketing strategy (what formats they use, how they hook, how they convert viewers into downloads)

- Pull out the best ideas and turn them into content briefs using our formats and templates

- Deliver a full breakdown we can act on immediately



This is especially useful when we're exploring new product launches and need a full content strategy built out before go-live.





WHAT YOU'LL DELIVER



- Daily reports on monitored accounts (what they posted, what worked, what flopped)

- Content briefs based on winning content, formatted in our template

- A running list of new content ideas with TikTok links as references

- Notes on emerging trends, sounds, or formats in the niche

- Cross-niche format finds with a short explanation of how to adapt them for our content

- On-demand teardowns of apps/brands we send you, with actionable briefs ready to go





YOU'RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU...



- Have experience writing UGC content briefs or working with short-form video creators

- Understand TikTok's algorithm (hook retention, engagement signals, why some videos get pushed and others don't)

- Are familiar with the manifestation, spirituality, or self-improvement niche — or willing to immerse yourself quickly

- Can tell the difference between a video that went viral because of the hook vs. the format vs. the topic vs. the sound

- Write clearly and concisely in English

- Are self-motivated and don't need to be micromanaged

- Have experience with TikTok analytics or content strategy





BONUS POINTS



- You've managed UGC campaigns or creator programs before

- You know what "SP," "subliminal," "no contact," "law of assumption," or "scripting" mean

- You have samples of content briefs you've written





HOW TO APPLY



Send us:



1. Pick any TikTok video in the manifestation or spirituality niche with over 100K views. Write a short breakdown of why it performed well (hook, format, emotion, CTA). Keep it under 200 words. (You can search SP Subliminal, SP Manifestation, SP Spells as a starting point)



2. Find a consumer app (not e-commerce) in any niche that's marketing itself on TikTok. Pick their best-performing video and explain how you'd adapt the format and hook structure for the manifestation niche. Keep it under 200 words.



3. Any relevant work samples (content briefs, social media reports, UGC campaigns)



We want someone who gets the emotional mechanics behind why content works, not surface-level observations.



Important: Start your application with the word "moonrise" so we know you actually read this posting.

title: Virtual Assistant – Property Management Support
description:
a residential and commercial real estate firm managing approximately 200,000 SF across 100+ doors in the Indianapolis and surrounding markets. We are seeking a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our Leasing and Maintenance departments with day-to-day administrative, coordination, and communication tasks.



The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, and comfortable operating in a fast-paced property management environment. This role is designed to allow our on-site team to focus on high-value activity while the VA manages routine processes, tenant communications, vendor coordination, and reporting functions.



LEASING DEPARTMENT RESPONSIBILITIES

Prospective Tenant & Inquiry Management

Respond to all inbound leasing inquiries 
, phone, and online) within our required response times to ensure no lead goes cold.

Qualify prospective tenants by collecting preliminary information and documenting in the CRM or property management software

Track and update the leasing pipeline; flag stalled leads for agent review



Application Processing & Tenant Onboarding

Distribute rental applications and collect completed documentation from applicants

Verify completeness of application packages; coordinate with applicants on missing items

Initiate background and credit screening requests; track results and communicate status to leasing team

Prepare and send lease drafts from approved templates for agent review

Coordinate lease execution via DocuSign

Issue welcome packets, move-in checklists, and utility transfer instructions to new tenants

Create and maintain tenant files in property management software (Rentvine).



Lease Administration & Renewals

Track lease expiration dates and generate 90/60/30-day renewal reminder reports

Send renewal notices and collect tenant intent to renew or vacate

Prepare renewal documentation and route for review and execution

Update lease data, rent escalation schedules, and tenant contact records in the system

Maintain accurate vacancy reports and availability matrices for internal and marketing use



Marketing & Listing Support

Post and update vacancy listings on through Rentvine

Maintain listing accuracy (square footage, rent, photos, availability dates) across all channels

Compile monthly leasing activity summaries and occupancy reports for management review

Coordinate photography scheduling, virtual tour links, and marketing collateral updates

Update owners on status of vacant homes weekly



MAINTENANCE DEPARTMENT RESPONSIBILITIES

Work Order Intake & Coordination

Receive, log, and categorize inbound maintenance requests from tenants, staff, and property inspections

Enter all work orders into the property management system with proper priority classification (emergency / urgent / routine)

Confirm receipt of maintenance requests to tenants with estimated response windows

Route work orders to the appropriate in-house technician or approved vendor based on type and location

Follow up with vendors to confirm scheduling and communicate appointment windows to tenants



Vendor & Contractor Management

Maintain the approved vendor and contractor database (contacts, licensing, insurance, trade specialty)

Request and track certificates of insurance for all active vendors; flag expirations

Solicit bids for routine repairs, capital projects, or recurring services per defined thresholds

Issue purchase orders and work authorizations per established approval levels

Track open POs and confirm vendor completion before routing invoices for approval



Work Order Tracking & Tenant Communication

Monitor the status of all open work orders and escalate overdue items to the maintenance supervisor

Send tenant status updates at key milestones: scheduling confirmed, work in progress, work complete

Distribute post-maintenance satisfaction surveys and log tenant feedback

Document completed repairs with notes, photos, and invoices in the work order record

Compile weekly maintenance status reports for management (open, closed, aging, and cost-by-property)



Preventive Maintenance Scheduling

Maintain and execute the preventive maintenance calendar for all properties

HVAC filter changes, inspections, and tune-ups

Roof, gutter, and exterior inspections (seasonal)

Fire safety, sprinkler, and extinguisher inspections

Elevator certifications and service agreements

Parking lot and common area condition checks

Notify tenants in advance of scheduled maintenance access per lease requirements

Log all PM completions and update asset maintenance history in the system



Invoice & Cost Tracking

Receive vendor invoices; match to approved work orders or POs

Flag discrepancies, overages, or unapproved charges for management review

Code invoices to correct property, unit, and GL category before routing for payment approval

Maintain a maintenance cost tracker by property for budget monitoring purposes



BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT & OWNER PROSPECTING RESPONSIBILITIES

Prospecting & Lead Generation

Research and identify prospective property owners and investors within target markets (Indianapolis and surrounding areas) using public records, CoStar, county assessor databases, LinkedIn, and other sources

Build and maintain a prospecting list segmented by asset class (office, retail, industrial, mixed-use, residential, multifamily residential, etc.), ownership type, and geographic submarket

Identify owner pain points through research signals: high vacancy, deferred maintenance, absentee ownership, recent transfer, or management turnover

Conduct outreach via
, LinkedIn, or direct mail on behalf of the Managing Partner using approved templates and messaging sequences - 
 & 
 

Log all prospecting activity, outreach history, and follow-up status in the CRM (pipeline stage, contact details, notes, next action)

Track and report weekly prospecting metrics: contacts added, outreach sent, responses received, and meetings booked



Outreach Campaigns & Follow-Up Sequences

Execute multi-touch outreach sequences 
 + LinkedIn + follow-up cadence) for warm and cold prospects per approved playbook

Personalize outreach templates with property-specific or owner-specific details to improve response rates

Monitor reply rates and flag positive responses immediately for Managing Partner review and handoff

Re-engage dormant prospects at defined intervals (30/60/90-day touchpoints) with updated market data or relevant content

Draft and send value-add content to prospects (market reports, cap rate snapshots, management fee comparisons) per approved materials

Maintain opt-out and do-not-contact lists; ensure all outreach complies with CAN-SPAM and applicable communication standards



Discovery Call & Meeting Scheduling

Respond promptly to all prospect replies expressing interest; qualify intent and readiness before scheduling

Book discovery calls and introductory meetings directly on the Managing Partners' calendar using the approved scheduling tool (Zoom Scheduler)

Confirm preferred meeting format (phone, Zoom, or in-person)

Send calendar invites with agenda, dial-in or video link, and relevant background on the prospect

Include a pre-meeting intake form where appropriate to gather client business, portfolio size, current management situation, and ownership goals

Send confirmation and reminder communications to prospects 24 to 48 hours before scheduled meetings

Reschedule canceled or no-show appointments within 24 hours and document in the CRM

Prepare and distribute a brief pre-call summary for the Managing Partner before each meeting (property details, ownership history, known context, and talking points)



CRM & Pipeline Maintenance

Maintain clean, current records for every prospect in the CRM: contact info, property details, outreach history, pipeline stage, and next action date

Move prospects through pipeline stages accurately: Identified, Contacted, Engaged, Meeting Booked, Proposal Sent, Closed/Won/Lost

Flag high-priority opportunities or warm responses for same-day Managing Partner notification

Generate a weekly prospecting pipeline report summarizing new contacts, stage movements, meetings booked, and conversion metrics

Archive or remove inactive contacts per defined criteria; maintain list hygiene and data accuracy

Coordinate handoff documentation when a prospect converts to a new management agreement (contact info, property details, notes, agreement terms)



Market Research & Target List Development

Pull ownership data from county assessor records, CoStar, and public databases to identify underserved or at-risk properties in target markets

Research ownership entities (LLCs, trusts, private investors) to identify decision-makers and contact information

Monitor market signals relevant to prospecting: property sales, permit activity, management company changes, foreclosure filings, and significant vacancy changes

Compile competitive intelligence on other property management companies (fee structures, service offerings, client reviews) to support the Managing Partners positioning conversations

Assist with preparation of pitch materials, one-pagers, and capabilities summaries for prospecting meetings as directed



GENERAL ADMINISTRATIVE RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage shared inboxes and route communications to the appropriate tea
mber

Maintain organized digital filing systems for leases, vendor contracts, work orders, and correspondence

Draft and format internal reports, owner updates, and tenant notices from provided templates or outlines

Prepare meeting agendas and compile supporting documentation for weekly tea
etings

Track key dates, deadlines, and action items; send proactive reminders to the responsible party

Assist with data entry, system updates, and records maintenance across property management platforms

Support the team with special projects, research, and process documentation as assigned



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

2+ years of experience in property management, real estate administration, or a closely related field

Proficiency with at least one property management platform (Aptly, AppFolio, Yardi, Buildium, Rentvine or similar)

Demonstrated experience with work order management and tenant communication workflows

Strong written and verbal communication skills; professional tone in all tenant and vendor correspondence

Highly organized with ability to manage multiple priorities and track details across many properties simultaneously

Proficient in Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Calendar)

Comfortable with digital document execution platforms (DocuSign, Adobe Sign, Dotloop, etc.)

Self-directed and reliable; able to work independently with minimal daily supervision



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Familiarity with residential and commercial real estate leasing (office, retail, industrial) preferred

Experience supporting a multi-property portfolio or managing tasks across multiple buildings

Background in vendor coordination, contractor management, or facilities support

Experience with CRM or pipeline tracking tools (Trello, Aptly, Leadsimple, HubSpot, or similar)

Exposure to AI productivity tools and workflow automation (Zapier, Make, or similar)

Bilingual (English/Spanish) a plus



TOOLS & SYSTEMS USED

Category

Tools / Platforms

Property Management

Aptly, AppFolio, Yardi, Buildium, Rentvine

Communication

Gmail, Google Meet, Slack, Zoom Video & Phone/VoIP

Document Management

Google Drive, Rentvine

Document Execution

DocuSign, Adobe Sign

Listings / Marketing

CoStar, LoopNet, Zillow, Tenant Turner, MIBOR, ICBR

Project & Task Tracking

Aptly, Rentvine, Trello, Notion

Automation / Workflow

Zapier, Make (Integromat), Aptly, 

CRM / Pipeline


; Salesforce

Office Suite

Google Workspace





SUCCESS METRICS (90-Day Targets)

All inbound leasing inquiries responded to within defined SLA (target: same business day, max 48 hours)

Work order intake logged and routed within 2 hours of receipt for routine items; immediately for emergencies

Vendor COI database 100% current (no expired certificates)

Lease expiration report maintained with 90-day rolling accuracy

Preventive maintenance calendar executed on schedule with less than 10% task slippage

Zero tenant-reported communication gaps on maintenance or leasing status updates

title: Client Concierge Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

TThe Client Concierge Coordinator serves as a pivotal support role for clients attending our Essentials Workshops and other Cardone Ventures events. This individual is responsible for ensuring that every client has a seamless and remarkable experience from the 
nt of purchase through event attendance. The role includes managing communications, conducting welcome calls, coordinating event scheduling, and providing customer service support via
, phone, and other communication channels. This person will proactively handle client needs, such as confirming event attendance, addressing concerns, and upselling additional seats or tickets.



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Driving an increase in client engagement and event participation by effectively managing communications and follow-ups to ensure high attendance rates, upselling additional seats or tickets, and maximizing event participation



OBJECTIVES

- Manage post-sale client interactions to confirm ticket payments and ensure attendance at purchased events.

- Audit pre-event task completion and manage reminders to ensure clients are ready for their events.

- Assist the Client Concierge Manager in resolving client concerns, answering queries, and enhancing client satisfaction.

- Facilitate event scheduling, including follow-ups with clients who have not scheduled their attendance and rescheduling as necessary.

- Upsell additional event tickets or seats by effectively using sales scripts tailored to various Cardone Ventures events and workshops.

- Build trust and maintain positive client relationships through open and interactive communication.

- Manage various client communications platforms, including HubSpot, Asana, G-Suite, Slick Text, and Aloware, ensuring timely responses and accurate information sharing.

- Monitor and manage und
 calls and tasks, marketing responses, and communication blasts to drive client engagement.

- Support with scrubbing and managing deals related to 10X360 and Essential Workshops to ensure accurate tracking and client follow-up

- Ensure response times to client inquiries are within a 24-hour window, maintaining a high standard of customer service.



COMPETENCIES

- Proven experience in de-escalating client situations while maintaining a positive representation of the Cardone Ventures brand.

- Proficiency in HubSpot, Asana, and G-Suite tools (Sheets, Documents, Gmail, Calendars, Slides).

- Strong communication skills with the ability to memorize and effectively utilize essential sales scripts.

- High level of business acumen to engage with business owners and understand their needs.

- Capable of executing process improvements to streamline client communications and event coordination.

- Ability to manage and prioritize multiple tasks, including daily priority meetings, pre-event qualifications, and managing client communications across multiple platforms.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

- At least 2 years’ experience in a customer service role in a professional environment



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

- Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Amazon PPC & Walmart Connect Marketplace HELIUM10

Qualifications



Proven experience managing Amazon advertising campaigns



Experience with Walmart marketplace advertising preferred



Strong knowledge of Helium 10

Experience in health, wellness, supplements, or CPG is strongly preferred



Ability to analyze data and make strategic recommendations



Strong communication, organization, and time-management skills



Detail-oriented and able to manage multiple products and campaigns efficiently



Experience with listing optimization and keyword research is a plus



Preferred Skills



Experience with supplement brands



Familiarity with Amazon Seller Central and Walmart Seller Center



Experience with product launches and ranking strategies



Knowledge of marketplace compliance and ad copy best practices for supplements



Ability to work independently and proactively identify growth opportunities



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



Data-driven



Reliable and organized



Proactive and growth-focused



Experienced in marketplace advertising



Comfortable working in a fast-paced e-commerce environment

title: Shopify Store Manager
description:
Dear,



We are looking for an experienced and driven Shopify Store Manager to lead our frontend operations full-time. In 2025, we generated $12M+ in revenue and are continuing to scale as a fast-growing fashion dropshipping company. We are looking for a hands-on leader who can manage a team, optimize performance, and take full ownership of our frontend operations.



About the Role: 

You will be responsible for leading a team of 10 people, including product listers, media buyers, video editors, ads launchers, and photo editors. You will oversee the full frontend operation from store performance and conversion rate optimization to ad creatives and new store builds.



MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH:



- Shopify (store management, store builds, CRO)

- Klaviyo 
 marketing and flows)

- Fashion dropshipping (managing stores in this niche specifically)

- Frontend operations (ads, creatives, funnels, product pages)

- Leading and coordinating a marketing/creative team



Responsibilities:



1) Managing and leading a team of 10 across multiple frontend departments.

2) Overseeing product listing, ad creative production, and media buying.

3) Optimizing conversion rates across all active stores.

4) Building and launching new Shopify stores from the ground up.

5) Tracking KPIs across departments and improving processes continuously.

6) Coordinating between media buyers, editors, and designers to ensure aligned output.

7) Identifying bottlenecks and implementing systems to improve team efficiency.



Applicants must:



- Have proven experience managing Shopify stores in a fashion or dropshipping context.

- Have experience leading a team of at least 5+ people.

- Be available full-time and during weekends

- Be organized, process-driven, and results-oriented.

- Be available to start immediately or within short notice.



Application Instructions:



If you believe you are a good fit, please apply with a short introduction video of yourself (be original, do not read from a script).



Answer the following questions in your application (not in your video):



1) How many years of experience do you have with Shopify?

2) What was your most recent role, and what were your day-to-day responsibilities?

3) What type of e-commerce or dropshipping stores did you manage (markets, niches, number of stores)?

4) Do you have experience with Klaviyo? If yes, describe how you have used it. 

5) Have you managed or built Shopify stores in the fashion niche specifically?

6) Can you describe your experience with frontend operations (ads, creatives, funnels, product pages)?

7) What are your experiences with Meta and Google ads?

8) Are you available full-time?

9) Are you available on weekends if needed?

10) Do you currently have other jobs or clients?

11) When can you start?



We are looking for someone who takes full ownership, leads with clarity, and consistently drives results.



I look forward to your proposal!



Best regards, 

Tess

description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



We are hiring an Operations & Administrative VA to support the backend of a growing coaching business and personal brand.

CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Backend Operations & Systems

Upload and organize digital products



Support
 flows, lead capture, and basic automation setup



Assist with workshop setup, registration tracking, and coordination



Website & Content Updates

title: Title: Meta Ads and Google Ads Specialist (Wellness + E-commerce + Content)
description:
About the Company:

We are a U.S.-based premium wellness and recovery brand focused on performance, longevity, and results. Our services and products cater to high-performing individuals, athletes, and clients who value quality over price.



We combine hands-on services with wellness technology and an e-commerce product line.



We are not a volume-based business. We focus on attracting the right clients



Role Overview:

We are looking for a skilled Ads Specialist to manage and optimize Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Ads campaigns for both local service-based marketing and e-commerce.



This role is focused on generating high-quality leads and customers, not cheap or low-value traffic.





Responsibilities:



Meta Ads (Primary)

 • Build, manage, and optimize Meta ad campaigns (TOF, MOF, BOF)

 • Understand and apply strategies based on Meta’s Andromeda update

 • Create and test audiences (high-income targeting, interest stacking, retargeting)

 • Optimize campaigns for conversions and qualified leads

 • Collaborate on creative direction and messaging



Google Ads

 • Manage search campaigns and local service ads

 • Perform keyword research focused on high-intent users

 • Optimize for ROI and lead quality

 • Set up and manage conversion tracking



Creative + Content Support

 • Edit short-form videos (Reels, Ads, UGC-style content)

 • Create or assist with ad creatives (hooks, angles, variations)

 • Basic image editing and carousel creation

 • Understand what converts vs what only looks good



Requirements:

 • Proven experience running Meta Ads (must show results or case studies)

 • Strong understanding of Meta’s Andromeda update

 • Experience with Google Ads (Search + Local campaigns)

 • Experience in wellness, fitness, health, or e-commerce (preferred)

 • Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

 • Strong understanding of funnels and conversion optimization

 • Data-driven mindset (can analyze and improve performance)

 • Strong English communication



Nice to Have:

 • Experience with high-ticket services

 • Experience working with U.S.-based businesses

 • Understanding of premium or luxury brand positioning

 • Familiarity with landing pages and CRO



Compensation:

 • Monthly rate based on experience

 • Performance-based bonuses available

 • Long-term opportunity with growth





How to Apply:



Please include:

 1. Experience with Meta and Google Ads

 2. Case studies or results (screenshots preferred)

 3. Video editing experience

 4. Experience in wellness or e-commerce (if any)

 5. Monthly rate





Important:

We are not looking for someone who runs generic ads.

We are looking for someone who understands strategy, positioning, and attracting high-quality clients.

title: Meta Ads Specialist
description:
About Us:



At Simplified Impact, we help businesses grow through data-driven digital marketing strategies, with a strong focus on performance advertising. We manage and scale Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns for clients, focusing on lead generation and revenue growth



We are looking for a Meta Ads Specialist who can take ownership of day-to-day campaign performance (from launch and optimization to testing and scaling) while working closely with our Paid Ads Lead on overall strategy..

This role is ideal for someone who already has hands-on experience managing Meta Ads, understands how to optimize for real business results (not just clicks), and enjoys working in a performance-driven environment.





Key Responsibilities:

Meta Ads Campaign Management & Optimization:

Work alongside the Paid Media Specialist to launch, manage, and optimize Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns focused on lead generation and conversions. Analyze performance data and adjust budgets, audiences, and creatives to reach client goals.





Reporting & Performance Monitoring:

Monitor KPIs such as CPA/CPL, CTR, frequency, and conversion rates. Share performance insights and flag issues or opportunities for scaling.





Creative Testing & Ad Improvements:

Implement creative and audience testing. Suggest new angles and improve ad creatives using Canva when needed, following brand guidelines.





Ad Account Setup & Tracking Support:

Support ad account setup, including pixel installation, event tracking, and domain verification. Coordinate with developers or tea
mbers to ensure accurate tracking and data flow.





Lead Funnel &
 Support (As Needed):

Assist with basic CRM workflows and follow-up sequences to support lead nurturing and conversion.





Marketing Platform Support:

Work within platforms such as HubSpot, Klaviyo or Go High Level to support lead management and automation related to paid ads.





Required Skills and Experience:

2+ years hands-on experience managing Meta Ads with lead generation or conversion goals





Experience analyzing Ads Manager data and optimizing based on performance metrics





Basic design skills for creating and adjusting ad creatives using tools such as Canva (Photoshop experience is a plus, not required).





Experience or exposure to
 marketing tools such as HubSpot, Klaviyo, or Go High Level, particularly for follow-up campaigns and lead nurturing.





Understanding of lead generation fundamentals, including form-based leads, conversion tracking, and basic funnel concepts.





Strong attention to detail and ability to follow briefs and processes provided by the Paid Ad Specialist.





Ability to work collaboratively within a fast-paced team and support marketing initiatives targeting Western markets.





Desired Attributes:

Proactive and able to suggest optimizations, not just follow instructions





Organized, reliable, and able to work with minimal supervision





Results-driven and comfortable working in a performance-focused environment





Good communication skills and ability to collaborate with a remote team





Interested in long-term growth in performance marketing





How to Apply:

If you’re interested in supporting high-performing Meta Ads campaigns and growing your skills in paid advertising, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume and any relevant examples of work (ad creatives, reports, or campaigns—if available)

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
PropZap — Build the Platform That Agents and Clients Actually Rely On



PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.



We’re not just building software.



We’re building the experience that agents use every day to run their business — and the experience clients rely on when making one of the biggest decisions of their lives.



Every message sent. Every listing viewed. Every interaction between agent and client. It all flows through the platform.



That means what we build isn’t just internal. It directly affects how people buy, sell, and experience real estate.



As we grow, we’re focused on creating something that feels seamless, reliable, and easy to use — for both agents and clients. And that takes thoughtful engineering.



--------------------------------------------------------------

Role: Full Stack Developer

Location: Remote

Role Type: Any

Compensation: TBD



We believe great engineers are force multipliers. As we grow, we are willing to pay premium for developers who can build clean systems, think independently, and contribute to something long-term.



--------------------------------------------------------------

Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America



Why This Role Is a Big Opportunity

• Influence how systems are designed

• Contribute to architecture decisions

• Build features that are actually used

• Work on a platform that grows over time



If you’ve been working on short-term projects, disconnected builds, or repetitive dev work — this is your chance to be part of something cohesive.



A system that evolves.

A product that scales.

A codebase that matters.



--------------------------------------------------------------

What You’ll Be Working On



You’ll help build and connect the core systems behind the platform, including:

• Backend infrastructure and services

• APIs and integrations

• Frontend interactions (as needed)

• Data flow and system architecture

• Internal tools and automation

This is a true full-stack role — where understanding how everything connects is just as important as writing the code itself.



--------------------------------------------------------------

Responsibilities:



Back-End Engineering

 • Design, build, and support server-side software.

 • Enhance system speed while facilitating growth capabilities.

 • Deploy robust protocols to safeguard sensitive information.

 • Connect external platforms and third-party interfaces seamlessly.



API Development and Maintenance

 • Develop and maintain RESTful APIs for mobile and web applications.

 • Ensure APIs are secure, efficient, and well-documented.

 • API Lifecycle Management

 • Engineer and sustain RESTful endpoints catering to both mobile and web platforms.

 • Guarantee that all interfaces remain safe, high-performing, and clearly cataloged.



Code Quality and Reviews

 • Produce readable, sustainable, and streamlined programming logic.

 • Audit peer submissions and offer helpful insights to colleagues.

 • Verify compliance with established industry benchmarks and internal protocols.



Cross-Functional Engagement

 • Work closely with interface specialists, design teams, and project owners.

 • Engage in iterative workflows, ranging from initial roadmapping to post-release evaluations.

 • Offer architectural advice and support to less experienced engineers.

 • Client-Side & End-to-End Contributions

 • Support front-end requirements on an as-needed basis.

 • Partner on comprehensive initiatives to bridge the gap between user interfaces and server logic.



Quality Assurance & Troubleshooting

 • Author diverse test suites covering logic, connections, and user flows.

 • Investigate and rectify glitches within multiple hosting setups and environments.



Technical Reporting

 • Generate and update comprehensive manuals for server architecture and connectivity.

 • Map out data structures, release workflows, and essential system specifications.



Work Includes but is not limited to:

 • Constructing and preserving server-side ecosystems.

 • Managing the reliability and responsiveness of digital products.

 • Hardening systems against vulnerabilities and data leaks.

 • Structuring and refining data storage schemas.

 • Coordinating with UI teams to link visual components with functional back-end processes.

 • Compiling and curating detailed engineering guides.

 • Evaluating scripts and coaching burgeoning talent.

 • Handling miscellaneous interface or end-to-end requirements.

 • Contributing to flexible delivery cycles and meeting short-term milestones.



Who This Role Is Built For

Someone who enjoys building things that people actually use.

Someone who understands that great products are not just about code — but about how people experience them.

Someone who wants to take ownership of what they build and see it make a real difference.



Strong candidates typically:

 • Have experience across both frontend and backend development

 • Understand how systems connect and support real user experiences

 • Think beyond features and consider how everything works together

 • Write clean, scalable, and maintainable code

 • Can troubleshoot issues across different parts of a system

 • Are comfortable working independently and making decisions



Technology Mindset

We’re not hiring based on one specific stack.

We’re looking for engineers who understand how to build products that people rely on.



You should be comfortable with:

 • Backend systems and server-side logic

 • API design and integrations

 • Databases and data structure design

 • Supporting frontend requirements when needed

 • Debugging across environments

 • Writing production-ready code



What You Gain

• The opportunity to build a product used daily by agents and clients

 • A long-term role inside a company scaling across North America

 • Direct impact on how people experience real estate through technology

 • Ownership over meaningful work — not just isolated tasks

 • The chance to grow alongside a platform that continues to evolve

As the platform grows, the experience improves — and the people building it grow with it.



--------------------------------------------------------------

How to Apply



Send the following to: 

• Resume

• Portfolio / GitHub (required)

• Summary of projects you’ve built or contributed to

• Expected compensation

• Internet speed test link

• Any DISC test result (if available)

• Intro video (optional but preferred)



Subject Line: Full Stack Developer – Your Name



--------------------------------------------------------------

If you want to build something that scales, contribute to real product development, and be part of a company that is serious about technology — we want to hear from you.

title: Recruiting Operations Executive Full-Cycle Hiring | Onboarding | Client Call Booking | GoHighLevel + CEIPAL/ATS Required
description:
We are a U.S.-based commercial services company with a growing staffing division. We are building a structured, accountable, and scalable recruiting, onboarding, and client acquisition operation across multiple territories.



We are hiring a Talent Operations & Staffing Growth Lead to oversee recruiting support across two business functions:

	1.	Commercial services recruiting and HR support for our cleaning and field operations

	2.	Staffing division recruiting and client acquisition support for roles such as admin, accounting, finance, controllers, customer service, project managers, light industrial, and general labor



This is not a basic virtual assistant role.

This is not a simple admin support position.



This is a high-accountability role for someone who understands recruiting operations, sourcing, onboarding, CRM and ATS pipeline management, compliance documentation, recruiter training, and business development support.



We need someone who can bring order, structure, follow-through, and leadership across both our recruiting and staffing workflows.



What You Will Do



You will help oversee and execute:

	•	Full-cycle recruiting support from job posting through onboarding readiness

	•	Candidate sourcing across multiple role categories

	•	Resume review, screening coordination, follow-up, and pipeline movement

	•	Onboarding tracking, document collection, and file readiness

	•	CRM and ATS updates, notes, tags, tasks, and workflow accuracy

	•	Outbound outreach to qualify leads and book client calls

	•	Recruiter support, training, and process reinforcement

	•	SOP execution, checklist management, and workflow improvement

	•	Weekly reporting and status visibility for leadership



Business Areas You Will Support



This role supports both:



1. Commercial Services Workforce Support

	•	Recruiting and onboarding support for commercial cleaning and field operations roles

	•	HR and file readiness coordination

	•	Documentation follow-up and operational support



2. Staffing Division Support

	•	Sourcing and pipeline management for staffing roles such as:

	•	Administrative

	•	Accounting

	•	Finance

	•	Controllers

	•	Customer service

	•	Project managers

	•	Light industrial

	•	General labor



You will also help support client acquisition efforts by qualifying leads, booking calls, and keeping staffing opportunities moving inside the CRM.



Required Experience



You must already have hands-on experience with:

	•	GoHighLevel

	•	An ATS platform such as CEIPAL, Bullhorn, Zoho Recruit, JobAdder, or similar

	•	Full-cycle recruiting support

	•	Candidate sourcing

	•	Pipeline management

	•	Onboarding coordination

	•	Documentation tracking

	•	CRM note-taking, task management, and workflow updates

	•	Outbound calling or client follow-up

	•	Reporting to leadership

	•	Training or guiding recruiters, coordinators, or support staff



Applicants without direct GoHighLevel and ATS experience will not be considered.



Skills We Need



The ideal candidate is:

	•	Highly organized

	•	Strong in follow-up and execution

	•	Detail-focused and process-driven

	•	Comfortable working inside SOPs and improving them

	•	Confident making outbound calls to candidates and business contacts

	•	Strong in written and spoken English

	•	Able to manage multiple moving parts without losing accuracy

	•	Capable of bringing structure to both systems and people

	•	Comfortable helping train recruiters and reinforce standards



Systems Required



You must have experience using:

	•	GoHighLevel

	•	CEIPAL or another structured ATS

	•	Google Workspace

	•	Microsoft Office

	•	General recruiting and onboarding systems



Experience with automation, reporting tools, and process documentation is strongly preferred.



Performance Will Be Measured By

	•	Pipeline movement speed and accuracy

	•	Candidate sourcing activity

	•	Onboarding completion and file readiness

	•	Documentation accuracy

	•	Recruiter workflow consistency

	•	Call booking and lead follow-up

	•	CRM and ATS data quality

	•	Overall process discipline and responsiveness



Work Requirements

	•	Full-time availability, 40 hours per week

	•	Must be responsive during EST business hours

	•	Must attend weekly leadership meetings

	•	TimeProof tracking required



To Apply



Please do not apply unless you can provide all 3 items below:



1. Video Introduction (2–4 minutes)

Please explain:

	•	Your recruiting operations background

	•	Your GoHighLevel experience

	•	Your ATS experience

	•	What types of roles you have recruited for

	•	Your sourcing experience

	•	Your onboarding/documentation experience

	•	Your client outreach or call booking experience

	•	Your experience training or guiding recruiters

	•	One process you improved successfully



2. Resume

Your resume must clearly show recruiting, operations, onboarding, HR, staffing, or sourcing experience.



3. Systems List

Please list all systems you have personally used, including:

	•	ATS platforms

	•	CRM systems

	•	HR systems

	•	Automation tools

	•	Reporting tools



Compensation

	•	Base pay: $800/month

	•	Paid weekly and milestone-based

	•	Performance bonuses based on:

	•	responsiveness

	•	pipeline management

	•	onboarding completion

	•	documentation accuracy

	•	call booking results

	•	CRM and ATS quality

	•	recruiter support and process consistency



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to help build a structured recruiting, staffing, onboarding, and client acquisition operation across both our commercial services business and staffing .



Summary:

We are hiring a full-time Talent Operations & Staffing Growth Lead with direct GoHighLevel and ATS experience. This role supports both our commercial services workforce recruiting and our staffing division for admin, accounting, finance, customer service, project managers, light industrial, and general labor roles. You will oversee sourcing, pipeline management, onboarding readiness, recruiter support, CRM/ATS accuracy, and client call booking. This is a structured, high-accountability role for someone who can bring order, execution, and leadership.

This is not a one-off project. It's an ongoing role with consistent weekly work.



---



What you'll own:



• Receive a short vision brief fro
 (1 paragraph per site)

• Turn that brief into a full project plan with timelines and milestones

• Design the site — layout, UI, visual style, brand feel

• Coordinate developers and content writers to execute

• Keep projects moving without coming back to me for direction

• Send me a short weekly update on what's live, in progress, and next

Applications without examples will not be considered.

title: Recruiting & Onboarding Assistant (Support to Recruiting Manager)
description:
Job Title: Recruiting & Onboarding Assistant

Full-Time | Remote | TimeProof Required | GoHighLevel + ATS Experience Required



We are a U.S.-based commercial services company building a structured, accountable internal hiring and onboarding operation. We are hiring a strong Recruiting & Onboarding Assistant to support our Recruiting Manager and help keep recruiting workflows, candidate communication, onboarding steps, and documentation fully organized, accurate, and moving forward.



This is not a basic assistant role.

This is not a passive support position.



We need someone who is highly organized, process-driven, detail-focused, and capable of taking ownership of recruiting coordination, onboarding follow-up, system updates, and documentation control. The right person must be able to keep things on track, maintain clean records, and step in with confidence when structure is needed.



This role is execution-focused and requires strong follow-through, responsiveness, and the ability to help take pressure off leadership by managing the details correctly.



Core Responsibilities



1) Recruiting Support

	•	Post and maintain job ads across platforms

	•	Source applicants through job boards, databases, and social channels

	•	Review resumes and complete initial screening steps

	•	Schedule interviews and maintain clear candidate notes

	•	Manage candidate follow-ups by SMS,
, and phone inside GoHighLevel

	•	Keep candidates moving through the pipeline with accurate statuses and timely follow-up

	•	Help ensure no qualified candidate is left sitting without action



2) Onboarding Support

	•	Coordinate onboarding steps from start to finish

	•	Send required forms, links, and instructions and confirm completion

	•	Communicate expectations, next steps, and start details clearly

	•	Track onboarding and training progress in GoHighLevel and the ATS

	•	Follow up on missing items until everything is complete

	•	Confirm readiness before candidates are activated, scheduled, or cleared forward



3) Compliance and Documentation

	•	Collect and organize W-9/W-4 forms, IDs, licenses, certifications, and required onboarding documents

	•	Store files correctly and maintain complete digital records

	•	Keep tags, tasks, notes, and checklists accurate and up to date

	•	Help ensure all files are complete, organized, and audit-ready

	•	Identify missing documentation quickly and follow through until resolved



4) Client and Candidate Communication

	•	Make calls as needed to confirm interview availability, onboarding status, scheduling, start requirements, and hiring needs

	•	Communicate professionally with both candidates and internal stakeholders

	•	Document outcomes, next steps, and follow-up actions inside the system

	•	Help keep communication clear, timely, and organized across the process



5) Process Support and SOP Execution

	•	Maintain and update SOPs, checklists, and recruiting/onboarding workflows

	•	Help improve workflow structure by documenting what is working and what is being missed

	•	Create and maintain templates for repeatable steps such as follow-ups, checklists, and candidate messaging

	•	Support the Recruiting Manager by helping bring consistency and order to day-to-day execution



6) Systems Coordination and Reporting

	•	Keep pipelines, tasks, follow-ups, notes, and statuses current in GoHighLevel

	•	Maintain ATS accuracy and ensure candidate records are up to date

	•	Provide weekly updates and status reporting to the Recruiting Manager

	•	Help ensure nothing is missed, delayed, or left incomplete

	•	Be capable of stepping in and keeping operations moving when the manager is unavailable or overloaded



What We Need in This Role



We are looking for someone who can do more than just assist. This person needs to be strong enough to help hold the process together, keep workflows clean, and take over key coordination tasks without constant hand-holding.



The right candidate must be:

	•	Highly organized

	•	Strong in follow-up

	•	Detail-focused

	•	Comfortable with structure and process

	•	Confident handling communication by phone,
, and text

	•	Able to keep multiple moving parts organized at once

	•	Reliable, responsive, and consistent

	•	Capable of taking initiative when something is missing or off track



Required Experience



You must already have hands-on experience with:

	•	GoHighLevel, including pipelines, tags, tasks, notes, forms, and workflows

	•	An ATS or recruiting CRM such as Zoho Recruit, CEIPAL, Bullhorn, Tracker, JobAdder, or similar

	•	Google Workspace, including Docs and Sheets

	•	Recruiting support, onboarding coordination, or hiring operations

	•	Documentation tracking and file organization

	•	Candidate communication and scheduling



Non-Negotiables

	•	Strong organization and follow-through

	•	Clear spoken and written English

	•	Comfortable with phone communication

	•	Able to follow defined processes and maintain clean records

	•	Reliable, responsive, and consistent during EST work hours

	•	TimeProof tracking required

	•	Must already understand how to work inside systems without creating confusion or missed steps



Schedule and Tracking

	•	Full-time, 40 hours per week

	•	Weekly meeting plus quick check-ins as needed

	•	TimeProof required, including screenshots and activity logs



To Apply



All 3 items below are required. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



1) Video Introduction (2 to 4 minutes)



Please cover:

	•	Your recruiting or onboarding background

	•	Your experience with GoHighLevel

	•	Your ATS experience

	•	Your experience with candidate communication and phone follow-up

	•	Your documentation and onboarding process experience

	•	An example of a checklist, SOP, or workflow you have supported or maintained



2) Resume



3) Systems List



Please list the tools and systems you have personally used.

title: Workforce Analyst
description:
Workforce Analyst (Remote)

Full-Time | Remote | US-Based Healthcare Company 



Submission of a CV/resume is required to be considered for this position. Applications without a resume will not be considered



About the Role

We’re looking for a Workforce Analyst to help turn large volumes of workforce, scheduling, and operations data into clear, actionable insights. This role will own the process of gathering data from multiple systems, cleaning and combining it, and building automated dashboards and reports in Power BI and Excel to support decision-making across the organization.



You’ll work closely with leadership, central scheduling, and operations teams to identify trends, improve labor efficiency, and support data-driven management of staffing operations.



Key Responsibilities

• Collect, clean, and consolidate data from multiple systems (HRIS, timekeeping, scheduling, agency, and productivity tools).

• Build, maintain, and automate Power BI dashboards and Excel reports for workforce metrics (e.g., HPPD, utilization, coverage, call-outs, agency usage, etc.).

• Create and maintain data models, charts, and visualizations that clearly tell a story.

• Develop and document standard reporting templates and refresh processes.

• Identify and correct inconsistencies between data sources.

• Support ad-hoc data analysis requests from leadership.

• (Preferred) Work with APIs, data connectors, and Power Automate/Power Query to automate data pulls directly from systems.





Qualifications

• 2+ years of experience as a Workforce Analyst, Data Analyst, or similar role.

• Advanced Excel skills (formulas, pivot tables, Power Query, macros preferred).

• Strong Power BI experience (DAX, data modeling, interactive dashboards).

• Solid understanding of data integrity, cleaning, and normalization.

• Experience combining data from multiple systems/sources.

• Excellent attention to detail and analytical thinking.

• (Preferred) Experience with APIs, Power Automate, Google Sheets, or other data connectors.

• (Preferred) Experience with workforce management, scheduling, or HR data.

• Strong communication skills in English.





What We Offer

• Full-time remote position based in the Philippines.

• Competitive compensation based on experience.

• Work with an international operations and analytics team.

• Growth opportunities into data engineering, automation, or operations leadership roles.



Schedule

• Full-Time

• Must be available during U.S. Eastern Standard Time business hours

If you are organized, dependable, and ready to support a fast-growing healthcare team, we encourage you to apply today.

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

title: Lead Qualification Assistant – Amazon Research
description:
Lead Qualification Assistant – Amazon Research (Remote)

Flexible Working Hours | Remote 



About Us:

The Amazon Whisperer is a fast-growing eCommerce marketing agency helping consumer brands scale profitably on Amazon and other marketplaces. We work with a large volume of brands and rely on clean, accurate data to identify high-potential opportunities.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented Lead Qualification Assistant to help us manually qualify a large list of Amazon seller leads. This is a straightforward, repeatable task and is ideal for someone who is comfortable with spreadsheets, basic research, and working independently.



The Role:

This role is focused entirely on manual lead qualification using a provided spreadsheet and clear instructions.

You will be working through tens of thousands of leads, one by one, and gathering basic data to help us determine whether a brand is worth contacting.

This is not a strategic role and does not require advanced Amazon knowledge — just accuracy, consistency, and reliability.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Open a provided link to a brand’s Amazon store or product listing

Confirm the brand has active products listed on Amazon

Open Helium 10 and:

Check the estimated monthly revenue of products on the first page

Enter required data into a spreadsheet:

Monthly revenue estimate

Confirmation of active products

Any basic notes (if applicable)

Move on to the next lead and repeat the process

Clear SOPs and examples will be provided.





Requirements:

Comfortable working with Google Sheets

Basic familiarity with Amazon product listings

Willingness to follow a repetitive, process-driven task

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Reliable internet connection

Ability to work independently without constant supervision

Prior experience with Helium 10 is a plus (but not required — guide will be provided)





Pay & Hours:

Flexible hours

Long-term work available due to the large volume of leads

Performance-based continuation (consistent accuracy = ongoing work)



Who This Role Is Best For: 

Entry-level virtual assistants

Anyone looking for simple, stable, process-based work

Detail-oriented individuals who prefer clear instructions and minimal ambiguity

title: Amazon Graphic Design Specialist
description:
Graphic Design Specialist – Amazon Marketing Agency (Remote)



Full-Time | Remote | Competitive Salary + PTO



About Us:



The Amazon Whisperer is a fast-growing, full-service Amazon marketing agency that delivers profitable sales growth for consumer brands. We specialize in Amazon SEO, PPC, listing optimization, catalog management, and compelling, conversion-focused creative design is at the heart of what we do. We’re looking for a Graphic Design Specialist to help bring our clients’ listings to life through world-class images and storefronts that drive traffic and convert sales.



The Role:



The Graphic Design Specialist is responsible for producing Amazon-optimized creative assets, including main images, listing graphics, A+ content, premium A+ content, brand stories, and storefronts. You’ll work closely with our Design Lead to adapt proven templates to different products, ensuring copy, callouts, and visuals are tailored to the right customer profile. You’ll also respond to edit requests from the Project Manager and Brand Managers, ensuring existing creative assets are always accurate and optimized.



This is a fast-paced, high-volume design role where you’ll be producing 140–160 images per month, supporting a wide range of Amazon brands and product categories. Tasks will be assigned in Asana, and you’ll be expected to deliver them on time and with minimal revisions needed.



Responsibilities:



- Work with the Design Lead and Project Manager to complete creative deliverables in Asana

- Adapt image templates to new products while maintaining brand tone and strategy

- Optimize main images to improve click-through rate and visibility

- Design infographics and lifestyle images that target specific customer profiles

- Ensure listing images require minimal edits after upload

- Check for accurate language, spelling, and benefit callouts

- Design and upload A+ Content, Brand Stories, and Storefronts

- Support Premium A+ builds when needed

- Respond to feedback and revision requests from Brand and Project Managers

- Maintain consistency with brand guidelines and internal creative standards



Requirements:



- Minimum 1 year experience working with Amazon listing design

- Minimum 3 years of experience using Photoshop or similar design software

- Highly creative mindset with a strong eye for layout and consumer psychology

- Fast, reliable computer with dual monitors, 16GB+ RAM, and ample storage

- Fast internet connection to handle large file uploads/downloads

- Extremely organized and reliable, able to manage multiple active projects

- Strong English communication skills, written and verbal

- Ability to type 55+ words per minute

- Comfortable using Google Drive, Asana, and other collaboration tools

- Familiar with AI tools such as ChatGPT, MidJourney, Sora, Adobe Firefly, Gamma, etc.



Company Culture:



At The Amazon Whisperer, we highly value transparency, communication, and trust. This is not just another job, it’s a place where your ideas are valued, hard work is rewarded, and growth opportunities are everywhere. We’re building a team that operates like a unit: supportive, proactive, and relentlessly focused on client success. If you’re looking for a long-term remote role where you can grow your creative career, you’re in the right place.



What You’ll Get:



- Competitive pay

- 13 days PTO (including public holidays)

- 100% remote work

- Room to grow into roles like Senior Designer, Design Lead, and beyond

- A collaborative and growth-minded team environment



Apply today and be part of a company that’s scaling fast and doing things differently in the Amazon space. We’re not looking for average. We’re looking for exceptional.



Submit your application here:
