title: Manager Operations Analytics & Systems
description:
Manager, Operations Analytics & Systems



Only applicants who meet the required experience will be considered. Please highlight your relevant experience in your application. Submission of a CV/resume is required to be considered for this position. Applications without a resume will not be considered 



Role Overview

This role is responsible for overseeing the company’s analytics, systems, and workflow functions as a unified operational capability. The Manager ensures that data, tools, and processes are aligned, scalable, and designed to support efficient decision-making across the organization.

This position manages technical and analytical tea
mbers, sets standards, defines priorities, and acts as the connective layer between leadership, operations, and execution teams. As the organization grows, this role expands naturally to oversee additional analytics, systems, or process-oriented roles.

Core Responsibilities

Team Leadership and Direction

Manage and mentor analysts, engineers, and systems-focused tea
mbers

Set priorities, timelines, and deliverables across analytics and systems work

Ensure clear ownership, accountability, and quality across all outputs

Review work for accuracy, usability, and alignment with business objectives

Analytics and Reporting Oversight

Own the company’s operational and workforce reporting strategy

Define and maintain standard metrics, definitions, and source-of-truth logic

Ensure dashboards and reports are actionable, consistent, and trusted

Translate leadership questions into structured analytical workstreams

Validate assumptions, calculations, and interpretations before distribution

Systems and Workflow Governance

Oversee the design and evolution of internal systems and workflows

Ensure tools are configured intentionally and work well together

Approve major workflow changes, automations, and integrations

Maintain consistency in how data flows across platforms

Prevent tool sprawl and fragmented processes

Cross Functional Alignment

Serve as the bridge between leadership, operations, analytics, and technical teams

Gather requirements and convert them into clear execution plans

Ensure insights from analytics are reflected in system or workflow changes

Support stakeholders in understanding and using tools and reports effectively

Documentation and Standards

Ensure documentation exists for systems, workflows, and reporting assets

Establish standards for naming, access, permissions, and maintenance

Reduce reliance on institutional knowledge held by individuals

Continuous Improvement and Scale

Identify recurring inefficiencies across tools, data, and workflows

Drive ongoing improvements based on usage patterns and feedback

Prepare systems and analytics functions to scale as the organization grows

Support onboarding of future roles within analytics, systems, or operations

What Success Looks Like

Leadership consistently relies on reporting and systems for decisions

Metrics are clearly defined and universally understood

Tools and workflows reduce manual effort and operational friction

Analytics insights translate into concrete operational actions

The organization scales without breaking processes or visibility

Qualifications

Experience managing analytics, systems, or operations-focused teams

Strong understanding of operational data, reporting, and performance metrics

Strong systems thinking and workflow design capability

Ability to translate business needs into structured technical and analytical work

Excellent communication, prioritization, and organizational skills

Ideal Candidate Traits

Thinks holistically about how data, tools, and people interact

Comfortable balancing strategic oversight with practical execution

Values clarity, consistency, and scalability

Enjoys building durable systems rather than one-off solutions

Able to grow with the organization as scope and responsibility expand

Equal Opportunity Employer

We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and strongly value diversity. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, age, disability, sexual orientation, or any other protected status.

title: Agile Functional Tester (Web, API & End-to-End)
description:
Are you a detail-obsessed QA tester who loves catching bugs before they reach production?

Do you thrive in an Agile team environment where your work directly impacts product quality and user trust?

We’re looking for a QA Functional Tester to join a Canadian FINTECH company through L’EVATE Inc., a staffing partner connecting top Filipino talent with global businesses.



Why This Role is Exciting

This isn’t just another QA job. You’ll be working on web platforms, APIs, and backend systems that power real-world financial solutions. Your testing expertise will ensure our applications are reliable, scalable, and user-friendly.

You’ll collaborate with developers, product owners, and automation testers — helping shape quality standards across the entire SDLC.



What You’ll Do

• Design, execute, and maintain manual test cases for web apps, APIs, and backend systems

• Perform functional, integration, regression, and exploratory testing

• Ensure traceability between user stories, test cases, and defects

• Run end-to-end test scenarios and validate data integrity

• Log and manage defects using Jira/Azure DevOps

• Join Agile ceremonies (sprint planning, daily standups, retrospectives)

• Communicate risks and testing progress with clear reports



What We’re Looking For

• 3–6 years QA functional testing experience (manual, web + API)

• Strong understanding of Agile SDLC (Scrum/Kanban)

• Skilled at writing clear and comprehensive test cases

• Experience with Postman, Swagger, or Fiddler for API testing

• Familiar with defect tracking in Jira or Azure DevOps

• Excellent communication skills and attention to detail

• Ability to work EST Time Zone



Nice-to-Haves

• Degree/Diploma in Computer Science, IT, or related

• Basic SQL knowledge (data validation)

• Exposure to performance, security, or accessibility testing

• Knowledge of automation concepts



What’s In It for You

• Be part of a Top Canadian FINTECH company

• Long-term role with career growth opportunities

• Competitive compensation based on skills & experience

• 100% remote, Philippines-based



How to Apply (Follow Instructions Exactly)

To make sure we find the best testers, please apply with:

1. Subject Line: QA Functional Tester – [Your Full Name]

2. Resume/CV – Your updated version

3.. Optional (Bonus): If you’ve used Postman/Swagger, send a screenshot of a test request you’ve written.



**Due to a high number of applicants, only those shortlisted will be contacted**



Apply Today

If you’re passionate about quality, collaboration, and problem-solving, we want you on our team. Apply now and take the next step in your QA career with a leading Canadian FINTECH!

title: Record Label Internship (Artist Growth & Promotion)
description:
Company: Core Mind Technology

Employment Type: Internship

Work Setup: Remote

Schedule: US hours



About the Internship

We’re an AI-focused record label building and developing AI artists—and we’re looking for interns to help grow fanbases, increase streams, and secure brand opportunities through smart, consistent online promotion. This is a task-based internship with clear performance goals and a pathway to a permanent salary.





Company Structure

The internship is with Jennings Global Entertainment, operating under Core Mind Technology.

Interns will collaborate within Core Mind Technology’s AI, automation, and digital growth ecosystem while supporting Jennings Global Entertainment’s AI music roster.



Internship Type

Task-Based (complete assigned growth tasks and deliverables)

Remote / Online

Growth-focused and performance-drivenInternship Nature

This is a performance-driven internship, not a traditional hourly role.

Interns are evaluated based on measurable growth outcomes (streams, engagement, audience growth, and monetization).

Tasks are structured, assigned, and tracked to ensure clarity and accountability.



What You’ll Do

As an intern, you will be responsible for managing and growing five (5) AI artists. Your work will focus on:

Promoting AI artists online to gain more fans and drive music streams

Running and managing artist pages (social platforms and/or creator pages you’re assigned)

Creating and executing growth tasks (daily/weekly deliverables)

Increasing engagement through trends, short-form content ideas, community interaction, and consistent posting

Supporting brand deal opportunities through page growth and audience development





Tools & Workflow

Interns may use scheduling tools, analytics dashboards, trend research, and platform-native insights.

Clear daily and weekly deliverables are provided to guide growth execution.



What We’re Looking For

We’re looking for someone who:

Understands social media growth (TikTok, IG Reels, YouTube Shorts, X, etc.)

Is consistent and can follow a posting schedule

Can think creatively about content, trends, and community engagement

Is motivated by measurable outcomes (fans, views, streams, conversion)

Is organized and able to manage multiple artists at once







What You’ll Gain

Hands-on experience managing a modern “AI music label” workflow

A real chance to grow into a paid permanent role based on performance

Portfolio-worthy experience in digital marketing, music promo, and artist development

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter / Sales Representative
description:

- Self-motivated with a results-oriented mindset and a proactive approach.

title: Lead Generation - Permanent WFH
description:
We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Lead Generation Specialist to drive consistent and high-quality leads from hospitals across the United States. This in-house role will be responsible for

identifying, researching, and engaging decision-makers in the healthcare industry to support our sales and marketing goals. 



The ideal candidate has experience in
 outreach, understands hospital industry dynamics, and is capable of creating and executing campaigns that align with our brand voice while building trust and opening conversations with qualified prospects. 



 



???? Key Responsibilities: 



Identify and build lists of verified hospital contacts based on our target audience (specific roles, titles, and regions). 

Conduct manual research to validate contact information and relevance. 

Develop tailored outreach messaging based on pain points and campaign objectives. 

Execute
 campaigns using platforms like SendGrid (aligned with Odoo). 

Monitor, manage, and respond to lead replies to nurture them through the pipeline. 

Maintain a consistent tone and messaging aligned with the Cube Care brand. 

Track campaign performance and report on lead quality, objections, and interest. 

Collaborate with sales and marketing to refine messaging and target segments. 

Ensure compliance with
 marketing best practices to avoid blacklisting, especially with healthcare servers. 

 



???? Key Performance Indicators (KPIs): 



Number of verified hospital contacts added monthly (target: 300+). 

Number of high-quality, engaged leads generated (target: 10–15 per month). 

 open rate (target: >35%) and reply rate (target: >8%). 

Number of
 campaigns executed per quarter (target: 2–3). 

Conversion rate from lead to opportunity (measured jointly with sales). 

Timely reporting and insights provided weekly. 

Consistency in messaging and alignment with brand tone and values. 

 



???? Requirements: 



Proven experience in lead generation, sales development, or
 outreach (healthcare industry preferred). 

Strong research skills and attention to detail. 

Familiarity with tools like SendGrid, Odoo (or similar CRM) 

Clear, persuasive written communication skills. 

Ability to work independently and manage time effectively. 

Comfortable handling large data lists and segmenting based on target criteria. 

 



???? Preferred: 



Prior experience generating leads within hospitals or the healthcare industry. 

Experience integrating CRM data for outreach and reporting. 







System Requirements:



Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording

title: Amazon Virtual Assistant
description:
Reporting to: CEO / Brand Operations Manager

Employment Type: Part-time (with potential to grow into full-time)

Location: Remote

Work Hours: 9am–5pm MST, with some availability during Chinese business hours



_______________________________________________________

ABOUT XOXO PARENTS



XOXO Parents is a fast-growing e-commerce brand focused on creating innovative, parent-designed products that make life easier for families. Since 2018, we’ve been committed to building helpful products that save time, strengthen connection, and bring more joy to everyday parenting.



We are looking for a sharp, proactive, and highly organized Amazon Virtual Assistant to support our growing Amazon business. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced remote environment, takes ownership, follows through, and enjoys creating order through systems, reporting, and execution.



_______________________________________________________

ROLE OVERVIEW



??This is an Amazon-focused support role that combines operations, inventory coordination, listing support, reporting, and day-to-day account maintenance. You will work closely with the CEO and Operations Manager to help keep our Amazon business running smoothly and profitably.



Your primary responsibility is to help manage the moving parts behind our Amazon operations, including Seller Central tasks, reporting, inventory tracking, supplier coordination, listing updates, and support for launches, promotions, and marketing initiatives.



_______________________________________________________

RESPONSIBILITIES



Amazon Operations Support

- Manage day-to-day tasks inside Amazon Seller Central

- Monitor account issues and escalate problems quickly

- Submit and track cases with Amazon Support

- Help maintain listing accuracy, backend details, and variation structure

- Upload and update product content, images, bullet points, A+ content, and keywords when needed

- Monitor suppressed listings, stranded inventory, pricing issues, and other account alerts

- Assist with flat files, listing edits, and catalog troubleshooting



Inventory & Supply Chain Coordination

- Track inventory levels across Amazon, warehouse/3PL, and incoming shipments

- Help maintain reorder timelines and replenishment forecasts

- Collaborate with supply and chain manager for freight partners, and 3PLs to support on-time inventory movement

- Help prepare and send purchase orders

- Maintain organized records of supplier communication, lead times, and order history

- Monitor inventory health to avoid stockouts, excess inventory, and IPI-related issues



Reporting & Admin

- Create weekly and monthly reports from Amazon Seller Central and other internal systems

- Track important KPIs such as sales, inventory status, ad performance support metrics, returns, and account health indicators

- Organize tasks, SOPs, and project updates in ClickUp

- Maintain clean documentation and ensure recurring tasks are completed on time



Amazon Marketing Support

- Support product launches, promotions, coupons, and deal setup

- Help track listing performance and conversion-related metrics

- Assist with keyword research and competitor monitoring

- Pull PPC reports and organize campaign data for review

- Support the team with content updates that improve visibility and conversion

- Help monitor customer feedback, reviews trends, and listing quality issues



Expected Results

- Amazon reports are delivered accurately and on time

- Inventory is tracked well and stockouts are minimized

- Reorders and supplier follow-up happen on schedule

- Seller Central issues are identified and handled quickly

- Listings stay updated, accurate, and properly organized

- Promotions and launches are executed with fewer errors

- Account health remains stable and operational issues are resolved fast

- The team has better visibility into sales, inventory, and Amazon performance



_______________________________________________________

REQUIREMENTS

Must-Have Skills

- Excellent written and verbal English

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

- Ability to manage multiple tasks and follow through without constant supervision

- Experience working with Amazon Seller Central

- Experience with inventory tracking, replenishment planning, and supplier coordination

- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to troubleshoot operational issues

- Comfortable communicating during both US and Chinese business hours when needed

- Reliable, proactive, and able to work independently in a remote environment

- Comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT and automation platforms to work more efficiently, while using good judgment and fact-checking outputs



Tech & Tools

- Amazon Seller Central

- Amazon Campaign Manager

- Helium 10

- Titan Tool (Preferred but not Required)

- ClickUp

- Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

- Excel or Google Sheets for inventory and reporting

- Canva for simple graphics or listing support

- Capcut for simple video or listing support

- WhatsApp and other remote communication tools



Nice to Have

- Experience supporting Amazon PPC reporting or campaign organization

- Experience with Amazon listing optimization

- Experience with flat files and variation setup

- Familiarity with 3PLs, freight forwarding, and shipment coordination

- Experience working with Chinese suppliers or manufacturers

- E-commerce brand experience, especially with physical products



_______________________________________________________

HOW TO APPLY

If you're ready to grow with a fun, passionate brand—and you love making things happen—we want to hear from you!



Complete all 3 steps:

1. Fill out the form: 

2. Submit your resume in this posting

3. Add the word EXPERT to your subject line



Let’s build something amazing together!

title: Executive Assistant (Project Manangement)- Real Estate

The Swick Real Estate Group & Downsize Allies | Centerville, OH



Our fast-growing real estate team is seeking a dependable and self-motivated Executive Assistant w/ project management experience to support our agents and clients through the downsizing and transaction process. This virtual role is essential in providing organized, compassionate, and professional support to homeowners and families during an important life transition. This position works directly with the President and has the ability to organize and complete efficiently and effectively a variety of recurring and new assignments.  Someone that is solution oriented to complete projects. Due to our clientele an expert command of the English language with little to no accent is very important of our perfect hire.



We are a highly productive team working full 8-hour days in a fast-paced environment. This role requires strong focus, ownership, and attention to detail, with the goal of fully managing transaction and administrative responsibilities so the team can perform at a high level.



Key Responsibilities

- Manage daily calendars, meetings, and
 correspondence

- Oversee scheduling and customer service for Airbnb, Furnished Finders, and rental properties

- Coordinate with vendors and manage business-related purchases

- Perform daily reconciliation for property redevelopment projects

- Manage transaction timelines, deadlines, and related tasks efficiently

- Communicate clearly and professionally with clients, agents, vendors, and stakeholders

- Prepare, review, and submit transaction documents accurately and on time

- Coordinate inspections, repairs, and closing-related appointments

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records in the CRM/database

- Ensure file compliance, accuracy, and quality control

- Conduct daily check-ins on active listings, contracts, and assigned projects



Qualifications

- Executive Assistant and Project Management experience preferred

- Strong organizational, communication, and time-management skills

- Detail-oriented, proactive, and solution-focused

- Project management knowledge (a plus)

- Construction background and familiarity with AI tools (Claude, HeyGen, Gamini, Nano, ChatGPT) (a plus)

- Coachable, dependable, and interested in long-term growth

- High proficiency in U.S. English

With over 30 years of real estate experience, The Swick Real Estate Group & Downsize Allies provides an all-inclusive downsizing and estate transition service. title: Country Real Estate Video Editor
description:
I’m a YouTube consultant working with a nationally ranked real estate agent in the United States Pacific Northwest who specializes in rural, ranch, and lifestyle horse properties. The two of us have been building this channel for two years and are now ready to expand the team.



We are looking for a video editor who can create longform YouTube real estate video content. You will be responsible for editing videos in a timely manner to maintain a consistent weekly release schedule. 



This position will start on a per-video basis and include training via Looms or YouTube videos I record, with the potential to become part-time in the future as I train you. 



I'll be hiring a few editors for an initial paid project. From there, I'll be choosing who to continue working with on an ongoing basis. This is also your chance to see if you'd enjoy this type of work and whether we communicate well together.



When you apply, please format your subject as “Video Editor Application-[Your Name Here]”



Position Overview

Your role will be editing longform real estate talking-head and property tour content in Descript and DaVinci Resolve:



• Use Descript’s AI features to build the initial edit of the video

• For talking head videos, edit the video according to a provided script 

• For property tour videos, edit to show the complete property

• Bring video into DaVinci Resolve to apply b-roll, graphics, and templated slides before rendering a final output. (B-roll will be provided through Envato Elements and our own stock footage)

• Write content for slides that summarize key points or statistics using bullet points

• Use Dropbox for file management and to connect to a Davinci Resolve library outside of Descript



For now, your workflow is partly in Resolve, but I am trying to move it fully into Descript.



Skills Needed

• Some basic DaVinci Resolve experience, or experience working with another non-linear editor app like Final Cut Pro or Adobe Premiere

• Ability to use Descript

• Proficiency in English grammar

• Being comfortable with writing lists in English that can sometimes include a lot of numbers like the cost of gas, price of groceries, home values, etc.



Qualities Needed to Be Successful

We can learn and perfect skills over time. Most importantly, I am looking for three qualities: 



Integrity – You’re a good fit if you can be honest with me when you need something or don’t know something or can’t hit a deadline. Open communication and honesty are very important to me. Everyone makes mistakes and I don’t expect perfection. 



Commitment – I value loyalty very highly and would love to find someone who can commit to a long-term working relationship. I understand that it might be a big ask with gig work. As the company grows, my commitment is to bring on a successful editor to part-time status if you're able to make that transition.



Desire to Learn – We are all learning. I want people who are open to learning new skills and taking on new projects.



Strong Moral Foundation – If you believe in treating others the way you want to be treated and you try to live that out, you'll fit right in here.



If this sounds like you, please apply below and I’ll personally read your application and view your work samples and answer any questions you might have. Please ask any questions you may have about the position, myself, or the agent.

title: Operations Assistant (Virtual)
description:
Operations Assistant (Virtual) Part-Time / Fully Remote



PLEASE SEND RESUME



MUST HAVE REQUIRED EXPERIENCE, ENGLISH FLUENCY AND STABLE HIGH SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION





Description



We’re an online brand redefining automotive accessories with luxury, custom-fit interior solutions designed for the discerning vehicle owner. As a growing ecommerce brand, we are looking for a sharp, reliable Virtual Operations Assistant to support our Head of Operations with the day-to-day management of our US operations. This role is central to keeping our inventory model accurate, our sales data current, and our reporting consistent. You'll work closely with the Head of Operations primarily through Slack,
, and periodic Google Meet check-ins, with clear deliverables and a structured set of recurring responsibilities.

This is a great fit for someone who thrives in a lean, fast-moving ecommerce environment and takes pride in clean data and reliable reporting.

Essential Functions

Own daily sales data entry and ensure model integrity across all US operations

Build and deliver daily sales reports with variance analysis against forecasted totals

Take full ownership of weekly and monthly SKU-level unit comparisons, including SKU mix and variance tracking

Manage end-of-month inventory hardcount reporting and lead variance analysis between actuals and projections

Proactively flag discrepancies and escalate to the Head of Operations when SKU performance exceeds defined thresholds

Execute SKU mix and forecast updates as directed, and monitor downstream impact on future inventory

Track and maintain daily average unit values across D2C and B2B channels

Surface potential purchase order implications following inventory model changes

Competencies

Analytically minded with a strong comfort working with numbers, spreadsheets, and data models

Strong attention to detail and data accuracy

Fluent in English

Ability to manage recurring tasks independently with minimal supervision

Clear and professional written communication in English

Comfortable working across multiple platforms and tools simultaneously

Proactive in flagging issues and following up without being prompted

Organized, deadline-driven, and reliable

Genuine curiosity about ecommerce operations and how data drives business decisions



Education & Experience



Bachelor's degree preferred

Minimum 2–3 years of experience in operations, logistics, or a related field

Prior experience supporting a DTC or ecommerce brand strongly preferred

Fluent in written and spoken English

Proficiency in Excel, Google Sheets, and Shopify required; familiarity with Slack and Replit a plus





Hourly Pay/Workload



$9/hour

10-20 hours per week

title: Mobile App Developer (Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term)
description:
About the Role



We are hiring a Mobile App Developer to join our remote team full-time, creating high-quality, user-friendly mobile applications for iOS and Android platforms.



This is a long-term, stable role with consistent monthly pay and real product impact. You’ll collaborate with designers, backend developers, and other tea
mbers in a structured and professional environment.



What You’ll Work On



~ Develop and maintain mobile applications for iOS and Android

~ Integrate apps with backend services and APIs

~ Ensure app performance, responsiveness, and security

~ Collaborate with designers for UI/UX implementation

~ Debug and optimize code for best performance



Tech Stack



~ Native: Swift (iOS), Kotlin/Java (Android)

~ Cross-platform: React Native, Flutter, or similar frameworks

~ REST APIs and integrations

~ Firebase, SQLite, or other mobile-friendly databases

~ App deployment to App Store and Google Play



What We Offer



~ Full-time remote position (40 hours per week)

~ Stable monthly salary (paid on time)

~ Long-term work with ongoing projects

~ Clear tasks and structured workflow

~ Supportive and professional team environment



Salary



~ Monthly Salary: $1,000 – $1,800 USD (based on experience)



Requirements



~ 2+ years experience in mobile app development

~ Experience with native or cross-platform development

~ Knowledge of app lifecycle, deployment, and updates

~ Understanding of mobile app security best practices

~ Good English communication (written and basic spoken)

~ Reliable internet connection

~ Ability to work full-time and meet deadlines



Nice to Have



~ Experience with cloud services (AWS, Firebase, GCP, etc.)

~ Experience with backend integration (REST, GraphQL)

~ Experience in app analytics and performance monitoring

~ Experience working remotely



Application Process



~ Application review

~ Short screening

~ Paid test task (if required)

~ Final selection



To Apply, Please Follow Instructions Carefully

Include your portfolio (if available)

Highlight your mobile app experience



Why should we hire you?

Confirm you are available full-time



Send your application via
 to: 



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.



We are looking for a motivated developer interested in a stable, long-term opportunity.

title: Media Specialist
description:
Job Title: Media Specialist

Location: Remote (Working Hours: 9 AM – 6 PM PST Monday to Friday)



Position Summary

We’re expanding our media team and looking for experienced, results-driven individuals ready to thrive in a fast-paced and dynamic environment. This is a unique opportunity to work closely with our in-house U.S. marketing team and support digital campaigns for some of the biggest car manufacturers in the world.



As a Media Specialist, you will play a key role in executing, monitoring, and optimizing paid media campaigns across Google, Meta 
/Instagram), TikTok, and more. This position offers hands-on exposure to high-budget accounts, advanced campaign strategies, and collaboration with a top-tier team.

We are seeking candidates with at least 3 years of paid media experience who are detail-oriented, accountable, and eager to contribute to a collaborative team.



Key Responsibilities

? Manage and optimize paid media campaigns across platforms (Google, Meta, TikTok, etc.)

? Pull, analyze, and update daily campaign performance reports

? Monitor budgets, pacing, and bidding strategies to ensure efficiency and strong ROI

? Support A/B testing and creative optimization to improve campaign results

? Collaborate with U.S.-based marketing and creative teams

? Follow established workflows and ensure quality assurance in campaign execution



Requirements

? Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience managing paid media campaigns across Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, TikTok Ads, etc.

? Strong attention to detail and ability to follow directions precisely

? Analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and optimize accordingly

? Proficiency in Google Sheets/Excel for tracking and reporting

? Familiarity with ad tracking (UTM parameters, Meta Pixel, GA4, etc.)

? Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace

? Must be available to work 9 AM – 6 PM PST, Monday to Friday



What We Offer

? Opportunity for overtime work and performance-based bonuses

? Training on internal tools, reporting processes, and workflow systems

? Work with a highly experienced U.S. marketing team and major global brands

? Clear path for career growth and skill development within a fast-growing company

Ready to join a high-performing digital media team?

Apply today and bring your skills to an exciting, fast-moving industry.
